items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 4T 的成对正交堆叠晶体管，用于随机存取存储器 (POST-RAM) 单元结构，并提出了三态内容可寻址存储器 (TCAM) 应用。 POST-RAM 单元具有垂直堆叠的读取和写入晶体管，仅利用两个晶体管的空间即可最大限度地提高面积效率。 POST-RAM 采用 InGaZnO (IGZO) 通道作为写入晶体管，采用单晶硅通道作为读取晶体管，从而实现极长的内存保留和快速的读取性能。进行全面的 3D-TCAD 仿真以验证所提出的设备结构的程序设计。此外，我们引入了一种自钳位搜索方案（SC2S），旨在提高 TCAM 操作的效率。结果最终表明，基于所提出的 POST-RAM 架构运行 TCAM 可以使能量延迟积 (EDP) 提高 20%。值得注意的是，与基于 16T SRAM 的 TCAM 相比，延迟性能可提高高达 40%。此外，所提出的方案可以将单元面积减少六倍以上，展示了空间的有效利用。

items.title: TraceFormer: S-parameter Prediction Framework for PCB Traces based on Graph Transformer.
items.abstract: Signal integrity becomes more critical to modern digital systems such as solid-state drives due to their high-speed operation. However, one of the challenges in signal integrity analysis is S-parameter modeling process for printed circuit boards (PCB). Due to increasing PCB design complexity, existing numerical methods take too long to solve governing equations for S-parameters. To overcome the issue, we present a novel deep learning framework, TraceFormer, to predict S-parameters of PCB traces. Our framework constructs a graph from PCB traces and tokenizes trace segments with geometric and topological information. A transformer encoder produces PCB representations from the tokens, followed by extraction networks which predict four different types of complex-valued S-parameters together. TraceFormer achieved above 0.99 R-squared score up to 15GHz for 4-port PCB designs, resulting in less than 3.1% and 4.2% errors in terms of the eye diagram's width and height, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 由于固态硬盘等现代数字系统的高速运行，信号完整性变得更加重要。然而，信号完整性分析的挑战之一是印刷电路板 (PCB) 的 S 参数建模过程。由于 PCB 设计复杂性不断增加，现有数值方法求解 S 参数控制方程所需的时间过长。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习框架 TraceFormer，用于预测 PCB 走线的 S 参数。我们的框架根据 PCB 迹线构建图表，并使用几何和拓扑信息标记迹线段。变压器编码器从标记生成 PCB 表示，然后是提取网络，一起预测四种不同类型的复值 S 参数。对于 4 端口 PCB 设计，TraceFormer 在高达 15GHz 的频率下实现了 0.99 以上的 R 平方分数，导致眼图宽度和高度误差分别低于 3.1% 和 4.2%。

items.title: Triplet Network-Based DNA Encoding for Enhanced Similarity Image Retrieval.
items.abstract: With the exponential growth of digital data, DNA is emerging as an attractive medium for storage and computing. Thus, design methods for encoding, storing, and searching digital data within DNA storage are of utmost importance. This paper introduces image classification as a measurable task for evaluating the performance of DNA encoders in similar image searches. Furthermore, we propose a novel triplet network-based DNA encoder to improve the accuracy and efficiency. The evaluation using the CIFAR-100 dataset demonstrates that the proposed encoder outperforms existing encoders in retrieving similar images, with an accuracy of 0.77, which is equivalent to 94% of the practical upper limit, and 16 times faster training time.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数字数据的指数级增长，DNA 正在成为一种有吸引力的存储和计算介质。因此，在 DNA 存储中编码、存储和搜索数字数据的设计方法至关重要。本文介绍了图像分类作为一项可测量的任务，用于评估 DNA 编码器在类似图像搜索中的性能。此外，我们提出了一种新型的基于三元组网络的 DNA 编码器，以提高准确性和效率。使用 CIFAR-100 数据集的评估表明，所提出的编码器在检索相似图像方面优于现有编码器，准确度为 0.77，相当于实际上限的 94%，并且训练时间快了 16 倍。

items.title: PVTSizing: A TuRBO-RL-Based Batch-Sampling Optimization Framework for PVT-Robust Analog Circuit Synthesis.
items.abstract: With the CMOS technology advancing and the complexity of circuits growing, the demand for analog/mixed-signal design automation tools is increasing quickly. Although some tools have been developed to tackle this challenge, the performance degradation caused by process, voltage, and temperature (PVT) variations has been less considered. This paper presents PVTSizing, an optimization framework for PVT-robust analog circuit synthesis. PVTSizing adopts trust region Bayesian optimization (TuRBO) for high-quality initial datasets and reference points. Multi-task reinforcement learning (RL) is utilized for PVT optimization. Both TuRBO and RL are batch-friendly, allowing parallel sampling of design solutions. Meanwhile, critic-assisted pruning and zoom target metrics are proposed to improve sample efficiency and reduce runtime. In addition, this framework naturally supports sizing over random mismatch. On 4 real-world circuits with TSMC 28/180nm process, PVTSizing achieves 1.9X --8.8X sample efficiency and 1.6X --9.8X time efficiency improvements compared to prior sizing tools from both industry and academia.
items.abstract_zh: 随着 CMOS 技术的进步和电路复杂性的增加，对模拟/混合信号设计自动化工具的需求正在迅速增加。尽管已经开发了一些工具来应对这一挑战，但很少考虑由工艺、电压和温度 (PVT) 变化引起的性能下降。本文提出了 PVTSizing，一种用于 PVT 鲁棒模拟电路综合的优化框架。 PVTSizing 采用信赖域贝叶斯优化 (TuRBO) 来获得高质量的初始数据集和参考点。多任务强化学习 (RL) 用于 PVT 优化。 TuRBO 和 RL 都是批量友好的，允许对设计解决方案进行并行采样。同时，提出了批评辅助剪枝和缩放目标度量来提高样本效率并减少运行时间。此外，该框架自然支持随机不匹配的大小调整。在采用 TSMC 28/180nm 工艺的 4 个实际电路上，与业界和学术界之前的尺寸调整工具相比，PVTSizing 实现了 1.9 倍 --8.8 倍的采样效率和 1.6 倍 --9.8 倍的时间效率改进。

items.title: ModSRAM: Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design for Large Number Modular Multiplication in SRAM.
items.abstract: Elliptic curve cryptography (ECC) is widely used in security applications such as public key cryptography (PKC) and zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP). ECC is composed of modular arithmetic, where modular multiplication takes most of the processing time. Computational complexity and memory constraints of ECC limit the performance. Therefore, hardware acceleration on ECC is an active field of research. Processing-in-memory (PIM) is a promising approach to tackle this problem. In this work, we design ModSRAM, the first 8T SRAM PIM architecture to compute large-number modular multiplication efficiently. In addition, we propose R4CSA-LUT, a new algorithm that reduces the cycles for an interleaved algorithm and eliminates carry propagation for addition based on look-up tables (LUT). ModSRAM is co-designed with R4CSA-LUT to support modular multiplication and data reuse in memory with 52% cycle reduction compared to prior works with only 32% area overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 椭圆曲线密码术（ECC）广泛应用于公钥密码术（PKC）和零知识证明（ZKP）等安全应用中。 ECC由模运算组成，其中模乘法占用了大部分处理时间。 ECC 的计算复杂性和内存限制限制了性能。因此，ECC 上的硬件加速是一个活跃的研究领域。内存处理（PIM）是解决这个问题的一种很有前途的方法。在这项工作中，我们设计了 ModSRAM，这是第一个能够高效计算大量模乘的 8T SRAM PIM 架构。此外，我们提出了 R4CSA-LUT，这是一种新算法，可减少交错算法的周期，并消除基于查找表 (LUT) 的加法进位传播。 ModSRAM 与 R4CSA-LUT 共同设计，支持内存中的模乘和数据重用，与之前的工作相比，周期减少了 52%，区域开销仅为 32%。

items.title: MENDNet: Just-in-time Fault Detection and Mitigation in AI Systems with Uncertainty Quantification and Multi-Exit Networks.
items.abstract: Hardware faults in AI accelerators, particularly in accelerator memory, can alter pre-trained deep neural network parameters, leading to errors that compromise performance. To address this, just-intime (JIT) fault detection and mitigation are crucial. However, existing fault detection/mitigation approaches, either interrupt continuous execution or introduce significant latency, making them less ideal for JIT implementation. To circumvent this issue, this paper explores uncertainty quantification in deep neural networks as a means of facilitating an efficient and novel fault detection approach in AI accelerators. Furthermore, in order to mitigate the impact of such faults, we propose MENDNet, which leverages the properties of multi-exit neural networks, coupled with the proposed uncertainty quantification framework. By tuning the confidence threshold for inference in each exit and leveraging the energy-based uncertainty quantification metric, MENDNet can make accurate predictions even in the presence of faults in the accelerator. When evaluated on state-of-the-art network-dataset configurations and with multiple fault rate-fault position combinations, our proposed approach furnishes up to 80.42% improvement in accuracy over a traditional DNN implementation, thereby instilling the reliability of the AI accelerator in mission mode.
items.abstract_zh: 人工智能加速器中的硬件故障，特别是加速器内存中的硬件故障，可能会改变预先训练的深度神经网络参数，从而导致出现损害性能的错误。为了解决这个问题，及时 (JIT) 故障检测和缓解至关重要。然而，现有的故障检测/缓解方法要么中断连续执行，要么引入显着的延迟，使其不太适合 JIT 实现。为了解决这个问题，本文探讨了深度神经网络中的不确定性量化，作为促进人工智能加速器中高效且新颖的故障检测方法的一种手段。此外，为了减轻此类故障的影响，我们提出了 MENDNet，它利用多出口神经网络的特性，并结合所提出的不确定性量化框架。通过调整每个出口的推理置信度阈值并利用基于能量的不确定性量化指标，即使加速器存在故障，MENDNet 也可以做出准确的预测。当对最先进的网络数据集配置和多种故障率-故障位置组合进行评估时，我们提出的方法比传统 DNN 实现的精度提高了 80.42%，从而提高了 AI 加速器在任务模式下的可靠性。

items.title: RL-PTQ: RL-based Mixed Precision Quantization for Hybrid Vision Transformers.
items.abstract: Existing quantization approaches incur significant accuracy loss when compressing hybrid convolution and transformer models with low bit-width. This paper presents RL-PTQ, a novel post-training quantization (PTQ) framework utilizing reinforcement learning (RL). Our focus is on determining the most effective bit-width and observer for quantization configurations tailored for mixed precision by grouping layers and addressing the challenges of quantization of hybrid transformers. We achieved the highest quantized accuracy for MobileViTs compared to the previous PTQ methods [5--7]. Furthermore, our quantized model on Processing In Memory (PIM) architecture exhibited an energy efficiency enhancement of 10.1× and 22.6× compared to the baseline model, on the state-of-the-art PIM accelerator [15] and GPU, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 现有的量化方法在压缩低位宽的混合卷积和变换器模型时会导致严重的精度损失。本文提出了 RL-PTQ，一种利用强化学习 (RL) 的新型训练后量化 (PTQ) 框架。我们的重点是通过对层进行分组来确定针对混合精度量身定制的量化配置的最有效位宽和观测器，并解决混合变压器量化的挑战。与之前的 PTQ 方法相比，我们为 MobileViTs 实现了最高的量化精度 [5--7]。此外，我们的内存处理 (PIM) 架构量化模型在最先进的 PIM 加速器 [15] 和 GPU 上与基准模型相比分别表现出 10.1 倍和 22.6 倍的能效提升。

items.title: Thermal Resistance Network Derivative (TREND) Model for Efficient Thermal Simulation and Design of ICs and Packages.
items.abstract: In the thermal design of 3-D integrated circuits (ICs) and packages, numerical simulation is extensively employed to investigate the impact of model parameters on hotspot temperature. However, conventional simulation approaches usually require plenty of computational resource and thus lead to expensive time cost for thermal designs. In this paper, we present a novel technique to efficiently and accurately conduct thermal simulation of 3-D ICs and packages, potentially reducing thermal design timeline from weeks to minutes. The proposed thermal resistance network derivative (TREND) model facilitates to focus the solution domain on the crucial regions for thermal designs and accelerate simulation without sacrificing accuracy. Also, the TREND model protects the internal details of chips and packages, which is quite suitable for modular thermal designs. The flexibility, accuracy, and efficiency of the proposed method are demonstrated through several numerical examples. Compared with the commercial software, a speed-up of 2695x is achieved in a typical thermal design case without the loss of accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 在 3D 集成电路 (IC) 和封装的热设计中，广泛采用数值模拟来研究模型参数对热点温度的影响。然而，传统的仿真方法通常需要大量的计算资源，从而导致热设计花费昂贵的时间成本。在本文中，我们提出了一种新技术，可以高效、准确地对 3D IC 和封装进行热仿真，从而有可能将热设计时间从几周缩短到几分钟。所提出的热阻网络导数（TREND）模型有助于将解决方案域集中在热设计的关键区域，并在不牺牲精度的情况下加速仿真。此外，TREND模型保护了芯片和封装的内部细节，非常适合模块化热设计。通过几个数值例子证明了该方法的灵活性、准确性和效率。与商业软件相比，在典型的热设计案例中实现了 2695 倍的加速，而没有损失精度。

items.title: Design of a Quantum Walk Circuit to Solve the Subset-Sum Problem.
items.abstract: Search algorithms based on quantum walks have emerged as a promising approach to solve computational problems across various domains, including combinatorial optimization, and cryptography. Stating a generic search problem in terms of a (quantum) search over a graph makes the efficiency of the algorithmic method depend on the structure of the graph itself. In this work, we propose a complete implementation of a quantum walk search on Johnson graphs, speeding up the solution of the subset-sum problem. We provide a detailed design of each sub-circuit, quantifying their cost in terms of gate number, depth, and width. We compare our solution against a Grover quantum search, showing a reduction of the T-count and T-depth for practically solvable problems. The proposed design provides a building block for the construction of efficient quantum search algorithms that can be modelled on Johnson graphs, filling the gap with the existing theoretical complexity analyses.
items.abstract_zh: 基于量子行走的搜索算法已成为解决各个领域（包括组合优化和密码学）计算问题的一种有前景的方法。用图上的（量子）搜索来表述通用搜索问题使得算法方法的效率取决于图本身的结构。在这项工作中，我们提出了约翰逊图上量子行走搜索的完整实现，加速了子集和问题的解决。我们提供每个子电路的详细设计，根据门数、深度和宽度量化其成本。我们将我们的解决方案与 Grover 量子搜索进行比较，显示了实际可解决问题的 T 计数和 T 深度的减少。所提出的设计为构建有效的量子搜索算法提供了一个构建块，该算法可以在约翰逊图上建模，填补了现有理论复杂性分析的空白。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Majority-Inverter Graph Minimization by Design Space Exploration.
items.abstract: The majority-inverter graph (MIG) is a homogeneous logic network widely used in logic synthesis for majority-based emerging technologies. Many logic optimization algorithms have been proposed for MIGs, including rewriting, resubstitution, and graph mapping. However, unlike AIGs, research on optimization flows for MIGs is limited. In this paper, we explore combinations of well-developed MIG optimization algorithms using an on-the-fly design space exploration strategy and present the latest best results on MIG size minimization of EPFL benchmarks. Significant reductions (of 88% and 79%) are observed for two specific benchmarks and an average of 14% improvement is achieved compared to the state-of-the-art flow.
items.abstract_zh: 多数逆变器图（MIG）是一种同质逻辑网络，广泛用于基于多数的新兴技术的逻辑综合。人们已经针对 MIG 提出了许多逻辑优化算法，包括重写、重新代入和图映射。然而，与 AIG 不同，MIG 优化流程的研究有限。在本文中，我们使用动态设计空间探索策略探索了成熟的 MIG 优化算法的组合，并展示了 EPFL 基准的 MIG 尺寸最小化的最新最佳结果。两个特定基准观察到显着降低（分别为 88% 和 79%），与最先进的流程相比，平均提高了 14%。

items.title: G-kway: Multilevel GPU-Accelerated k-way Graph Partitioner.
items.abstract: Graph partitioning is important for the design of many CAD algorithms. However, as the graph size continues to grow, graph partitioning becomes increasingly time-consuming. To overcome these challenges, we propose G-kway, an efficient multilevel GPU-accelerated k-way graph partitioner. G-kway introduces an effective union find-based coarsening and a novel independent set-based refinement algorithm to significantly accelerate both the coarsening and uncoarsening stages. Experimental results have shown that G-kway outperforms both the state-of-the-art CPU-based and GPU-based parallel partitioners with an average speedup of 8.6× and 3.8×, respectively, while achieving comparable partitioning quality.
items.abstract_zh: 图划分对于许多 CAD 算法的设计非常重要。然而，随着图大小的不断增长，图分区变得越来越耗时。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 G-kway，一种高效的多级 GPU 加速的 k-way 图分区器。 G-kway 引入了一种有效的基于联合查找的粗化和一种新颖的基于独立集的细化算法，以显着加速粗化和非粗化阶段。实验结果表明，G-kway 的性能优于最先进的基于 CPU 和基于 GPU 的并行分区器，平均加速分别为 8.6 倍和 3.8 倍，同时实现了相当的分区质量。

items.title: Geneva: A Dynamic Confluence of Speculative Execution and In-Order Commitment Windows.
items.abstract: Modern out-of-order microprocessors are increasingly expanding resources such as reorder buffer (ROB) and instruction queue (IQ) for memory-level parallelism (MLP). While this expansion effectively addresses the memory wall challenge, it also incurs notable cost and energy trade-offs. To tackle this, we propose Geneva, a microarchitecture that improves performance and saves energy. Geneva reallocates a portion of an ROB to serve as a dynamic queue (DQ), used as an ROB, IQ, or both depending on operational needs. Geneva saves energy by 15.6% and improves performance by 2.6% compared to the conventional out-of-order core.
items.abstract_zh: 现代无序微处理器越来越多地扩展资源，例如用于内存级并行性 (MLP) 的重排序缓冲区 (ROB) 和指令队列 (IQ)。虽然这种扩展有效地解决了内存墙的挑战，但它也带来了显着的成本和能源权衡。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了Geneva，一种可以提高性能并节省能源的微架构。日内瓦重新分配 ROB 的一部分作为动态队列 (DQ)，根据操作需要用作 ROB、IQ 或两者。与传统乱序核心相比，Geneva 节能 15.6%，性能提升 2.6%。

items.title: HAIL-DIMM: Host Access Interleaved with Near-Data Processing on DIMM-based Memory System.
items.abstract: Near-data processing (NDP), a solution to reduce data movement overhead between host and memory, should not interfere with host access to ensure system fairness. We propose a cost-effective and energy-efficient LRDIMM-based NDP architecture (HAIL-DIMM) that can seamlessly interleave NDP and host access and is a drop-in replacement for existing main memory modules. The proposed NDP exploits the interleaving capability of the memory controller to interleave NDP and host access naturally. To take advantage of bank interleaving, an atomic operation of the proposed NDP, which consists of data movement and computation, is recognized by the memory controller as a DDR READ/WRITE but by the HAIL-DIMM as NDP based on the request's address. We implement a prototype of the proposed NDP architecture on an FPGA platform as proof of concept. The evaluation results show that the NDP system achieves up to 2.19x speedup in latency and up to 45.4% energy saving for data movement over the baseline system for memory-bound workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 近数据处理（NDP）是一种减少主机和内存之间数据移动开销的解决方案，不应干扰主机访问以确保系统公平性。我们提出了一种经济高效且节能的基于 LRDIMM 的 NDP 架构 (HAIL-DIMM)，它可以无缝交错 NDP 和主机访问，并且是现有主内存模块的直接替代品。所提出的 NDP 利用内存控制器的交错功能来自然地交错 NDP 和主机访问。为了利用存储体交错，所提出的 NDP 的原子操作（包括数据移动和计算）被内存控制器识别为 DDR 读/写，但被 HAIL-DIMM 根据请求的地址识别为 NDP。我们在 FPGA 平台上实现了所提出的 NDP 架构的原型作为概念证明。评估结果表明，与内存受限工作负载的基准系统相比，NDP 系统在延迟方面实现了高达 2.19 倍的延迟加速，并且在数据移动方面节省了高达 45.4% 的能源。

items.title: Toward Controllable Hierarchical Clock Tree Synthesis with Skew-Latency-Load Tree.
items.abstract: Clock tree synthesis (CTS) constructs an efficient clock tree, meeting design constraints and minimizing resource usage. It serves as a bridge between placement and routing, facilitating concurrent optimization of multiple design objectives. To construct a clock tree with lower latency and load capacitance while maintaining a specified skew constraint, we introduce skew-latency-load tree (SLLT) which combines the merits of bound skew tree and Steiner shallow-light tree, along with an analysis and demonstration of the boundaries of these two tree types. We propose a method for constructing SLLT, which significantly reduces both the maximum latency and load capacitance compared to previous methods while ensuring skew control. Combining this routing topology generation method, we introduce a hierarchical CTS framework, and it is constructed by integrating partition schemes and buffering optimization techniques. We validate our solution at 28nm process technology, demonstrating superior performance compared to the solutions of OpenROAD and advanced commercial tool. Our approach outperforms in all metrics (max latency, skew, buffer number, clock capacitance), achieving a significant reduction in latency of 29.45% compared to OpenROAD and 6.75% compared to the commercial tool.
items.abstract_zh: 时钟树综合（CTS）构建高效的时钟树，满足设计约束并最大限度地减少资源使用。它充当布局和布线之间的桥梁，促进多个设计目标的并发优化。为了构建具有较低延迟和负载电容的时钟树，同时保持指定的时滞约束，我们引入了时滞延迟负载树（SLLT），它结合了绑定时滞树和斯坦纳浅光树的优点，并对这两种树类型的边界进行了分析和演示。我们提出了一种构建 SLLT 的方法，与以前的方法相比，该方法显着降低了最大延迟和负载电容，同时确保了偏差控制。结合这种路由拓扑生成方法，我们引入了分层CTS框架，它是通过集成分区方案和缓冲优化技术构建的。我们在 28nm 工艺技术上验证了我们的解决方案，与 OpenROAD 的解决方案和先进的商业工具相比，展示了卓越的性能。我们的方法在所有指标（最大延迟、偏斜、缓冲区数量、时钟电容）方面均表现出色，与 OpenROAD 相比，延迟显着降低了 29.45%，与商业工具相比，延迟显着降低了 6.75%。

items.title: A Software-Hardware Co-design Solution for 3D Inner Structure Reconstruction.
items.abstract: Volume imaging (3D model with inner structure) is widely applied to various areas, such as medical diagnosis and archaeology. Especially during the COVID-19 pandemic, there is a great demand for lung CT. However, it is quite time-consuming to generate a 3D model by reconstructing the internal structure of an object. To make things worse, due to the poor data locality of the reconstruction algorithm, researchers are pessimistic about accelerating it with ASIC. Besides the locality issue, we find that the complex synchronization is also a major obstacle for 3D reconstruction. To overcome the problems, we propose a holistic solution using software-hardware co-design. We first provide a unified programming model to cover various 3D reconstruction tasks. Then, we redesign the dataflow of the reconstruction algorithm to improve data locality. In addition, we remove unnecessary synchronizations by carefully analyzing the data dependency. After that, we propose a novel near-memory acceleration architecture, called Waffle, for further improvement. Experiment results show that Waffle in a package can achieve 3.51× ~ 3.96× speedup over a cluster of 10 GPUs with 9.35× ~ 10.97× energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 体积成像（具有内部结构的3D模型）广泛应用于医学诊断和考古等各个领域。特别是在COVID-19大流行期间，对肺部CT的需求很大。然而，通过重建物体的内部结构来生成3D模型是相当耗时的。更糟糕的是，由于重建算法的数据局部性较差，研究人员对用 ASIC 加速它持悲观态度。除了局部性问题之外，我们发现复杂的同步也是 3D 重建的主要障碍。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了使用软硬件协同设计的整体解决方案。我们首先提供一个统一的编程模型来涵盖各种 3D 重建任务。然后，我们重新设计了重建算法的数据流以提高数据局部性。此外，我们通过仔细分析数据依赖性来删除不必要的同步。之后，我们提出了一种新颖的近内存加速架构，称为 Waffle，以进行进一步改进。实验结果表明，在一个封装中的 Waffle 可以在 10 个 GPU 的集群上实现 3.51× ~ 3.96× 的加速，并具有 9.35× ~ 10.97× 的能效。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Efficient Built-in Self-Test for Microfluidic Large-Scale Integration (mLSI).
items.abstract: Control channels on microfluidic large-scale integration (mLSI) chips are prone to blockage and leakage defects. In this work, we propose a built-in self-test (BIST) method that drastically improves the test efficiency. Given n to-be-tested control channels, we reduced the number of test patterns for blockage and leakage tests from [EQUATION] to 1, and from ⌈log2(n + 1)⌉ to ⌈log2(χ(G) + 1)⌉, respectively, where χ(G) denotes the vertex chromatic number of a graph G consisting of n vertices. We fabricated our design and demonstrated the feasibility and efficiency of our method.
items.abstract_zh: 微流控大规模集成（mLSI）芯片上的控制通道容易出现堵塞和泄漏缺陷。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种内置自测试（BIST）方法，可以大大提高测试效率。给定n个待测试的控制通道，我们将堵塞和泄漏测试的测试模式数量分别从[方程]减少到1，从⌈log2(n + 1)⌉减少到⌈log2(χ(G) + 1)⌉，其中χ(G)表示由n个顶点组成的图G的顶点色数。我们进行了设计并证明了我们方法的可行性和效率。

items.title: SmartATPG: Learning-based Automatic Test Pattern Generation with Graph Convolutional Network and Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Automatic test pattern generation (ATPG) is a critical technology in integrated circuit testing. It searches for effective test vectors to detect all possible faults in the circuit as entirely as possible, thereby ensuring chip yield and improving chip quality. However, the process of searching for test vectors is NP-complete. At the same time, the large amount of backtracking generated during the search for test vectors can directly affect the performance of ATPG. In this paper, a learning-based ATPG framework, SmartATPG, is proposed to search for high-quality test vectors, reduce the number of backtracking during the search process, and thereby improve the performance of ATPG. SmartATPG utilizes graph convolutional network (GCN) to fully extract circuit feature information and efficiently explore the ATPG search space through reinforcement learning (RL). Experimental results indicate that the proposed SmartATPG outperforms traditional and artificial neural network (ANN)-based heuristic strategies on most benchmark circuits.
items.abstract_zh: 自动测试模式生成（ATPG）是集成电路测试中的一项关键技术。它寻找有效的测试向量，尽可能完整地检测出电路中所有可能的故障，从而保证芯片良率，提高芯片质量。然而，搜索测试向量的过程是NP完全的。同时，搜索测试向量过程中产生的大量回溯会直接影响ATPG的性能。本文提出了一种基于学习的ATPG框架SmartATPG，用于搜索高质量的测试向量，减少搜索过程中的回溯次数，从而提高ATPG的性能。 SmartATPG利用图卷积网络（GCN）充分提取电路特征信息，并通过强化学习（RL）有效探索ATPG搜索空间。实验结果表明，在大多数基准电路上，所提出的 SmartATPG 优于传统和基于人工神经网络 (ANN) 的启发式策略。

items.title: WinoGen: A Highly Configurable Winograd Convolution IP Generator for Efficient CNN Acceleration on FPGA.
items.abstract: The convolution neural network (CNN) has been widely adopted in computer vision tasks. In the FPGA-based CNN accelerator design, Winograd convolution can effectively improve computation performance and save hardware resources. However, building efficient and highly compatible IP for arbitrary Winograd convolution on FPGA remains underexplored. To address this issue, we propose a novel and efficient reformulation of Winograd convolution, named Structured Direct Winograd Convolution (SDW). We further develop WinoGen, a Chisel-based highly configurable Winograd convolution IP generator. Given arbitrary input/output tile size and kernel size, it can generate optimized high-performance IP automatically. Meanwhile, our generated IP can be compatible with multiple kernel sizes and tile sizes. Experimental results show that the IP generated by WinoGen achieves DSP efficiency up to 3.80 GOPS/DSP and energy efficiency up to 652.77 GOPS/W while showing 2.45× and 3.10× improvements when processing a same CNN model compared with state-of-the-arts.
items.abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）已广泛应用于计算机视觉任务中。在基于FPGA的CNN加速器设计中，Winograd卷积可以有效提高计算性能并节省硬件资源。然而，在 FPGA 上为任意 Winograd 卷积构建高效且高度兼容的 IP 仍有待探索。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖且有效的 Winograd 卷积重新表述，称为结构化直接 Winograd 卷积（SDW）。我们进一步开发了 WinoGen，一个基于 Chisel 的高度可配置的 Winograd 卷积 IP 生成器。给定任意输入/输出瓦片大小和内核大小，它可以自动生成优化的高性能IP。同时，我们生成的IP可以兼容多种内核大小和切片大小。实验结果表明，WinoGen 生成的 IP 的 DSP 效率高达 3.80 GOPS/DSP，能效高达 652.77 GOPS/W，同时在处理相同的 CNN 模型时与最先进的技术相比，分别提高了 2.45 倍和 3.10 倍。

items.title: Late Breaking Result: AQFP-aware Binary Neural Network Architecture Search.
items.abstract: Adiabatic Quantum-Flux-Parametron (AQFP) is a superconducting logic with extremely high energy efficiency. Recent research has made initial strides toward developing AQFP accelerator. However several critical challenges from both the hardware and software side remain, preventing the design from being a comprehensive solution. This paper proposes an AQFP-aware binary neural network architecture search framework that leverages software-hardware co-optimization to eventually search the AQFP-adapted neural network and the corresponding hardware configuration, providing a feasible AQFP-based solution for binary neural network (BNN) acceleration. Experimental results show that our framework consistently outperforms the representative AQFP-based framework.
items.abstract_zh: 绝热量子通量参量管（AQFP）是一种具有极高能效的超导逻辑。最近的研究在开发 AQFP 加速器方面取得了初步进展。然而，来自硬件和软件方面的一些关键挑战仍然存在，阻碍了设计成为全面的解决方案。本文提出了一种AQFP感知的二元神经网络架构搜索框架，利用软硬件协同优化，最终搜索适应AQFP的神经网络和相应的硬件配置，为二元神经网络（BNN）加速提供了可行的基于AQFP的解决方案。实验结果表明，我们的框架始终优于基于 AQFP 的代表性框架。

items.title: SEPE-SQED: Symbolic Quick Error Detection by Semantically Equivalent Program Execution.
items.abstract: Symbolic quick error detection (SQED) has greatly improved efficiency in formal chip verification. However, it has a limitation in detecting single-instruction bugs due to its reliance on the self-consistency property. To address this, we propose a new variant called symbolic quick error detection by semantically equivalent program execution (SEPE-SQED), which utilizes program synthesis techniques to find sequences with equivalent meanings to original instructions. SEPE-SQED effectively detects single-instruction bugs by differentiating their impact on the original instruction and its semantically equivalent program (instruction sequence). To manage the search space associated with program synthesis, we introduce the CEGIS based on the highest priority first algorithm. The experimental results show that our proposed CEGIS approach improves the speed of generating the desired set of equivalent programs by 50% in time compared to previous methods. Compared to SQED, SEPE-SQED offers a wider variety of instruction combinations and can provide a shorter trace for triggering bugs in certain scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 符号快速错误检测（SQED）极大地提高了形式化芯片验证的效率。然而，由于其依赖于自洽特性，它在检测单指令错误方面存在局限性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的变体，称为通过语义等效程序执行进行符号快速错误检测（SEPE-SQED），它利用程序合成技术来查找与原始指令具有相同含义的序列。 SEPE-SQED 通过区分单指令错误对原始指令及其语义等效程序（指令序列）的影响，有效地检测单指令错误。为了管理与程序综合相关的搜索空间，我们引入了基于最高优先级优先算法的 CEGIS。实验结果表明，与以前的方法相比，我们提出的 CEGIS 方法将生成所需的等效程序集的速度提高了 50%。与SQED相比，SEPE-SQED提供了更广泛的指令组合，并且可以在某些场景下提供更短的触发Bug的跟踪。

items.title: ElasticZRAM: Revisiting ZRAM for Swapping on Mobile Devices.
items.abstract: Modern mobile devices adopt two-level memory swapping consisting of ZRAM and storage devices to relieve memory pressure. In the swap subsystem, ZRAM can improve application responsiveness and reduce write traffic to storage devices while consuming physical memory and additional CPU cycles. To better utilize ZRAM and improve system performance, we propose ElasticZRAM, an elastic ZRAM to redesign the traditional memory swapping with full awareness of the characteristics of applications and NAND flash-based storage devices on mobile devices. Experimental results on Google Pixel 6 demonstrate that ElasticZRAM improves application response time by up to 24.8% with negligible overhead compared with state-of-the-arts.
items.abstract_zh: 现代移动设备采用由ZRAM和存储设备组成的两级内存交换来缓解内存压力。在交换子系统中，ZRAM 可以提高应用程序响应能力并减少存储设备的写入流量，同时消耗物理内存和额外的 CPU 周期。为了更好地利用 ZRAM 并提高系统性能，我们提出了 ElasticZRAM，这是一种弹性 ZRAM，它充分了解移动设备上应用程序和基于 NAND 闪存的存储设备的特点，重新设计了传统的内存交换。 Google Pixel 6 上的实验结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，ElasticZRAM 将应用程序响应时间提高了 24.8%，而开销可以忽略不计。

items.title: MASC: A Memory-Efficient Adjoint Sensitivity Analysis through Compression Using Novel Spatiotemporal Prediction.
items.abstract: Adjoint sensitivity analysis is critical in modern integrated circuit design and verification, but its computational intensity grows significantly with the circuit size, the number of objective functions, and the accumulation of time points. This growth can impede its wider application. The intimate link between the forward integration in transient analysis and the reverse integration in adjoint sensitivity analysis allows for the retention of Jacobian matrices from transient analysis, thereby speeding up sensitivity analysis. However, Jacobian matrices across multiple timesteps are often so large that they cannot be stored in memory during the forward integration process, necessitating disk storage and incurring significant I/O overhead. To address this, we develop a memory-efficient sensitivity analysis method that utilizes data compression to minimize memory overhead during simulation and enhance analysis efficiency. Our compression method can efficiently compress the sparse tensor that contains the Jacobian matrices over time by exploiting the spatiotemporal characteristics of the data and circuit attributes. It also introduces a shared-indices technique, a cutting-edge spatiotemporal prediction model, and robust residual encoding. We evaluate our compression method on 7 datasets from real-world simulations and demonstrate that it can reduce memory requirements by more than 16x on average, which is significantly more efficient than other state-of-the-art compression techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 伴随灵敏度分析在现代集成电路设计和验证中至关重要，但其计算强度随着电路尺寸、目标函数数量和时间点的积累而显着增长。这种增长可能会阻碍其更广泛的应用。瞬态分析中的正向积分与伴随灵敏度分析中的反向积分之间的密切联系允许保留瞬态分析中的雅可比矩阵，从而加速灵敏度分析。然而，跨多个时间步长的雅可比矩阵通常非常大，以至于在正向积分过程中无法存储在内存中，因此需要磁盘存储并产生大量的 I/O 开销。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种节省内存的敏感性分析方法，该方法利用数据压缩来最大限度地减少模拟过程中的内存开销并提高分析效率。我们的压缩方法可以通过利用数据和电路属性的时空特征，有效地压缩包含雅可比矩阵的稀疏张量。它还引入了共享索引技术、尖端的时空预测模型和鲁棒残差编码。我们在来自真实世界模拟的 7 个数据集上评估了我们的压缩方法，并证明它可以平均减少 16 倍以上的内存需求，这比其他最先进的压缩技术要高效得多。

items.title: SPARK: An Efficient Hybrid Acceleration Architecture with Run-Time Sparsity-Aware Scheduling for TinyML Learning.
items.abstract: Currently most TinyML devices only focus on inference, as training requires much more hardware resources. In this paper, we introduce SPARK, an efficient hybrid acceleration architecture with run-time sparsity-aware scheduling for TinyML learning. Besides a standalone accelerator, an in-pipeline acceleration unit is integrated within the CPU pipeline to support simultaneous forward and backward propagation. To better utilize sparsity and improve hardware utilization, a sparsity-aware acceleration scheduler is implemented to schedule the workload between two acceleration units. A unified memory system is also constructed to support transposable data fetch, reducing memory access. We implement SPARK using TSMC 22nm technology and evaluate different TinyML tasks. Compared with the baseline accelerator, SPARK achieves 4.1× performance improvement in average with only 2.27% area overhead. SPARK also outperforms off-shelf edge devices in performance by 9.4× with 446.0× higher efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 目前，大多数 TinyML 设备仅专注于推理，因为训练需要更多的硬件资源。在本文中，我们介绍了 SPARK，这是一种高效的混合加速架构，具有用于 TinyML 学习的运行时稀疏感知调度。除了独立加速器之外，CPU 管道中还集成了管道内加速单元，以支持同时向前和向后传播。为了更好地利用稀疏性并提高硬件利用率，实现了稀疏感知加速调度器来调度两个加速单元之间的工作负载。还构建了统一的内存系统来支持转置数据获取，减少内存访问。我们使用 TSMC 22nm 技术实现 SPARK，并评估不同的 TinyML 任务。与基线加速器相比，SPARK 平均实现了 4.1 倍的性能提升，而面积开销仅为 2.27%。 SPARK 的性能也比现成的边缘器件高出 9.4 倍，效率高出 446.0 倍。

items.title: Evaluating the Security of Logic Locking on Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks are susceptible to model piracy and adversarial attacks when malicious end-users have full access to the model parameters. Recently, a logic locking scheme called HPNN has been proposed. HPNN utilizes hardware root-of-trust to prevent end-users from accessing the model parameters. This paper investigates whether logic locking is secure on deep neural networks. Specifically, it presents a systematic I/O attack that combines algebraic and learning-based approaches. This attack incrementally extracts key values from the network to minimize sample complexity. Besides, it employs a rigorous procedure to ensure the correctness of the extracted key values. Our experiments demonstrate the accuracy and efficiency of this attack on large networks with complex architectures. Consequently, we conclude that HPNN-style logic locking and its variants we can foresee are insecure on deep neural networks.
items.abstract_zh: 当恶意最终用户完全访问模型参数时，深度神经网络很容易受到模型盗版和对抗性攻击。最近，提出了一种称为 HPNN 的逻辑锁定方案。 HPNN 利用硬件信任根来防止最终用户访问模型参数。本文研究逻辑锁定在深度神经网络上是否安全。具体来说，它提出了一种结合了代数和基于学习的方法的系统 I/O 攻击。这种攻击逐步从网络中提取关键值，以最大限度地减少样本复杂性。此外，它采用严格的程序来确保提取的关键值的正确性。我们的实验证明了这种攻击对具有复杂架构的大型网络的准确性和效率。因此，我们得出结论，我们可以预见的 HPNN 式逻辑锁定及其变体在深度神经网络上是不安全的。

items.title: Invited: Graph Learning for Parameter Prediction of Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm.
items.abstract: In recent years, quantum computing has emerged as a transformative force in the field of combinatorial optimization, offering novel approaches to tackling complex problems that have long challenged classical computational methods. Among these, the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) stands out for its potential to efficiently solve the Max-Cut problem, a quintessential example of combinatorial optimization. However, practical application faces challenges due to current limitations on quantum computational resource. Our work optimizes QAOA initialization, using Graph Neural Networks (GNN) as a warm-start technique. This sacrifices affordable computational resource on classical computer to reduce quantum computational resource overhead, enhancing QAOA's effectiveness. Experiments with various GNN architectures demonstrate the adaptability and stability of our framework, highlighting the synergy between quantum algorithms and machine learning. Our findings show GNN's potential in improving QAOA performance, opening new avenues for hybrid quantum-classical approaches in quantum computing and contributing to practical applications.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，量子计算已成为组合优化领域的变革力量，为解决长期以来挑战经典计算方法的复杂问题提供了新方法。其中，量子近似优化算法（QAOA）因其有效解决最大割问题（组合优化的典型例子）的潜力而脱颖而出。然而，由于当前量子计算资源的限制，实际应用面临挑战。我们的工作使用图神经网络（GNN）作为热启动技术来优化 QAOA 初始化。这牺牲了经典计算机上负担得起的计算资源，以减少量子计算资源开销，从而提高了 QAOA 的有效性。各种 GNN 架构的实验证明了我们框架的适应性和稳定性，突出了量子算法和机器学习之间的协同作用。我们的研究结果表明，GNN 在提高 QAOA 性能、为量子计算中的混合量子经典方法开辟新途径并为实际应用做出贡献方面具有潜力。

items.title: Combining Parameterized Pulses and Contextual Subspace for More Practical VQE.
items.abstract: In this paper, we explore the integration of parameterized quantum pulses with the contextual subspace method. The advent of parameterized quantum pulses marks a transition from traditional quantum gates to a more flexible and efficient approach to quantum computing. Working with pulses allows us to potentially access areas of the Hilbert space that are inaccessible with a CNOT-based circuit decomposition. Compared to solving the complete Hamiltonian via the traditional Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE), the computation of the contextual correction generally requires fewer qubits and measurements, thus improving computational efficiency. Plus a Pauli grouping strategy, our framework, SpacePulse, can minimize the quantum resource cost for the VQE and enhance the potential for processing larger molecular structures.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索了参数化量子脉冲与上下文子空间方法的集成。参数化量子脉冲的出现标志着从传统量子门到更灵活、更高效的量子计算方法的转变。使用脉冲使我们能够访问希尔伯特空间中基于 CNOT 的电路分解无法访问的区域。与通过传统的变分量子本征求解器（VQE）求解完整的哈密顿量相比，上下文校正的计算通常需要更少的量子位和测量，从而提高了计算效率。加上泡利分组策略，我们的框架 SpacePulse 可以最大限度地降低 VQE 的量子资源成本，并增强处理更大分子结构的潜力。

items.title: CAMO: Correlation-Aware Mask Optimization with Modulated Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Optical proximity correction (OPC) is a vital step to ensure print-ability in modern VLSI manufacturing. Various OPC approaches based on machine learning have been proposed to pursue performance and efficiency, which are typically data-driven and hardly involve any particular considerations of the OPC problem, leading to potential performance or efficiency bottlenecks. In this paper, we propose CAMO, a reinforcement learning-based OPC system that specifically integrates important principles of the OPC problem. CAMO explicitly involves the spatial correlation among the movements of neighboring segments and an OPC-inspired modulation for movement action selection. Experiments are conducted on both via layer patterns and metal layer patterns. The results demonstrate that CAMO outperforms state-of-the-art OPC engines from both academia and industry.
items.abstract_zh: 光学邻近校正 (OPC) 是确保现代 VLSI 制造中可打印性的重要步骤。人们提出了各种基于机器学习的OPC方法来追求性能和效率，这些方法通常是数据驱动的，几乎不涉及OPC问题的任何特定考虑，从而导致潜在的性能或效率瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 CAMO，一种基于强化学习的 OPC 系统，专门集成了 OPC 问题的重要原理。 CAMO 明确涉及相邻片段运动之间的空间相关性以及 OPC 启发的运动动作选择调制。对通孔层图案和金属层图案都进行了实验。结果表明，CAMO 的性能优于学术界和工业界最先进的 OPC 引擎。

items.title: LaMUX: Optimized Logic-Gate-Enabled High-Performance Microfluidic Multiplexer Design.
items.abstract: After decades of development, flow-based microfluidic biochips have become an increasingly attractive platform for biochemical experiments. The fluid transportation and the on-chip device operation are controlled by microvalves, which are driven by external pneumatic controllers. To meet the increasingly complex experimental demands, the number of microvalves has significantly increased, making it necessary to adopt multiplexers (MUXes) for the actuation of microvalves. However, existing MUX designs have limited coding capacities, resulting in area overhead and excessive chip-to-world interface. This paper proposes a novel gate structure for modifying the current MUX architecture, along with a mixed coding strategy that achieves the maximum coding capacity within the modified MUX architecture. Additionally, an efficient synthesis tool for the mixed-coding-based MUXes (LaMUXes) is presented. Experimental results demonstrate that the LaMUX is exceptionally efficient, substantially reducing the usage of pneumatic controllers and microvalves compared to existing MUX designs.
items.abstract_zh: 经过几十年的发展，基于流的微流控生物芯片已成为越来越有吸引力的生化实验平台。流体输送和片上设备操作由微型阀控制，微型阀由外部气动控制器驱动。为了满足日益复杂的实验需求，微型阀的数量显着增加，因此需要采用多路复用器（MUX）来驱动微型阀。然而，现有的多路复用器设计的编码能力有限，导致面积开销和过多的芯片到世界的接口。本文提出了一种用于修改当前 MUX 架构的新颖门结构，以及在修改后的 MUX 架构内实现最大编码容量的混合编码策略。此外，还提出了一种用于基于混合编码的 MUX (LaMUXes) 的高效综合工具。实验结果表明，LaMUX 非常高效，与现有的 MUX 设计相比，大大减少了气动控制器和微型阀的使用。

items.title: PHD: Parallel Huffman Decoder on FPGA for Extreme Performance and Energy Efficiency.
items.abstract: Huffman decoding is crucial in data compression, and the self-synchronization-based parallel decoding algorithm enables subsequence-level parallelism. This paper introduces PHD, the first accelerator designed for self-synchronization-based parallel Huffman decoding on a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA). Designing PHD poses challenges, including managing fine-grained parallelism, addressing limited on-chip memory, and handling inter-codeword dependency. PHD incorporates bit-level, subsequence-level, and tile-level parallelism, utilizes hybrid memory to store the codebook efficiently, and introduces the ONCE MORE optimization to reduce decoding loop iterations. Experimental results demonstrate that PHD outperforms the state-of-the-art GPU-based baseline regarding latency (9.4X to 12.8X reduction) and energy consumption (12.4X to 18.2X reduction).
items.abstract_zh: 霍夫曼解码在数据压缩中至关重要，基于自同步的并行解码算法可实现子序列级并行。本文介绍了 PHD，这是第一个为现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 上基于自同步的并行霍夫曼解码而设计的加速器。设计 PHD 带来了挑战，包括管理细粒度并行性、解决有限的片上内存以及处理码字间依赖性。 PHD融合了比特级、子序列级和瓦片级并行性，利用混合存储器有效地存储码本，并引入ONCE MORE优化来减少解码循环迭代。实验结果表明，PHD 在延迟（减少 9.4 倍至 12.8 倍）和能耗（减少 12.4 倍至 18.2 倍）方面优于基于 GPU 的最先进基准。

items.title: GCS-Timer: GPU-Accelerated Current Source Model Based Static Timing Analysis.
items.abstract: Composite Current Source (CCS) timing model plays an important role in modern static timing analysis (STA) because it precisely captures the timing behavior of a design at advanced nodes. However, CCS is extremely time-consuming due to its accurate but complicated timing models. To overcome this challenge, we introduce GCS-Timer, a GPU-accelerated CCS-based timing analysis algorithm. Unlike existing methods that perform model order reduction to trade accuracy for speed, GCS-Timer achieves high accuracy through a fast simulation-based analysis using GPU computing. Experimental results show that GCS-Timer can complete CCS analysis with better accuracy and achieve 3.2X faster runtime compared with a 16-threaded industrial standard timer. The source code is available at https://github.com/cuhk-eda/GCS-Timer.
items.abstract_zh: 复合电流源 (CCS) 时序模型在现代静态时序分析 (STA) 中发挥着重要作用，因为它可以精确捕获高级节点设计的时序行为。然而，CCS 由于其精确但复杂的时序模型而极其耗时。为了克服这一挑战，我们引入了 GCS-Timer，一种基于 GPU 加速的 CCS 时序分析算法。与执行模型降阶以牺牲精度换取速度的现有方法不同，GCS-Timer 通过使用 GPU 计算进行基于仿真的快速分析来实现高精度。实验结果表明，GCS-Timer能够以更高的精度完成CCS分析，并且与16线程工业标准定时器相比，运行时间提高了3.2倍。源代码可在 https://github.com/cuhk-eda/GCS-Timer 获取。

items.title: Size-Optimized Depth-Constrained Large Parallel Prefix Circuits.
items.abstract: Binary adders are a critical building block in integrated circuit (IC) design. In addition to the widely used 32/64/128-bit adders, large (1024/2048 bits) adders are important in applications such as cryptography. However, most current adder design methods target regular bitwidths, and cannot efficiently generate large adders with good performance. In practice, adders are often integrated into circuits such as a multiplier-accumulator (MAC), resulting in complex non-uniform input arrival times. To address these challenges, we propose a new algorithm for efficiently generating high-quality adders for non-uniform input arrival times. It is based on a novel divide-and-conquer-friendly problem formulation, and can effectively generate and maintain the most useful adder structures through dynamic programming. Experimental results show that it outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods in both quality and runtime. The adders generated by our algorithm have 2.8%, 8.3%, and 10.3% reductions in delay, area, and power, respectively, compared to those generated by a commercial synthesis tool.
items.abstract_zh: 二进制加法器是集成电路 (IC) 设计中的关键构建模块。除了广泛使用的 32/64/128 位加法器之外，大型（1024/2048 位）加法器在密码学等应用中也很重要。然而，当前大多数加法器设计方法都以常规位宽为目标，并且不能有效地生成具有良好性能的大型加法器。在实践中，加法器通常集成到乘法累加器 (MAC) 等电路中，从而导致复杂的非均匀输入到达时间。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种新算法，可以针对非均匀输入到达时间有效生成高质量加法器。它基于一种新颖的分而治之的友好问题表述，可以通过动态编程有效地生成和维护最有用的加法器结构。实验结果表明，它在质量和运行时间方面都优于当前最先进的方法。与商业综合工具生成的加法器相比，我们的算法生成的加法器在延迟、面积和功率方面分别减少了 2.8%、8.3% 和 10.3%。

items.title: FLAME: Fully Leveraging MoE Sparsity for Transformer on FPGA.
items.abstract: MoE (Mixture-of-Experts) mechanism has been widely adopted in transformer-based models to facilitate further expansion of model parameter size and enhance generalization capabilities. However, the practical deployment of MoE mechanism for transformer on resource-constrained platforms, such as FPGA, remains challenging due to heavy memory footprints and impractical runtime costs introduced by the MoE mechanism. Diving into the MoE mechanism, we raise two key observations: (1) Expert weights are heavy but cold, making it ideal to leverage expert weight sparsity. (2) There exists highly skewed expert activation paths for MoE layers in transformer-based models, making it feasible to conduct expert prediction and prefetching. Motivated by these two observations, we propose FLAME, the first algorithm-hardware co-optimized MoE accelerating framework designed to fully leverage MoE sparsity for efficient transformer deployment on FPGA. First, to leverage expert weight sparsity, we integrate an N:M pruning algorithm, allowing for the pruning of expert weights without significantly compromising model accuracy. Second, to settle expert activation sparsity, we propose a circular expert prediction (CEPR) strategy. CEPR prefetches expert weights from external storage to on-chip cache before the activated expert index is determined. Last, we co-optimize both MoE sparsity through the introduction of an efficient pruning-aware expert buffering (PA-BUF) mechanism. Experimental results demonstrate that FLAME achieves 84.4% accuracy of expert prediction with merely two expert caches on-chip. In comparison with CPU and GPU, FLAME achieves 4.12× and 1.49× speedup, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: MoE（Mixture-of-Experts）机制已广泛应用于基于 Transformer 的模型中，以方便进一步扩展模型参数大小并增强泛化能力。然而，由于 MoE 机制带来的大量内存占用和不切实际的运行时成本，在资源受限的平台（例如 FPGA）上实际部署 Transformer 的 MoE 机制仍然具有挑战性。深入研究 MoE 机制，我们提出两个关键观察结果：（1）专家权重很重但很冷，因此非常适合利用专家权重稀疏性。 (2)基于Transformer的模型中MoE层存在高度倾斜的专家激活路径，使得进行专家预测和预取变得可行。受这两个观察的启发，我们提出了 FLAME，这是第一个算法-硬件协同优化的 MoE 加速框架，旨在充分利用 MoE 稀疏性在 FPGA 上高效部署变压器。首先，为了利用专家权重的稀疏性，我们集成了 N:M 修剪算法，允许在不显着影响模型准确性的情况下修剪专家权重。其次，为了解决专家激活稀疏性，我们提出了循环专家预测（CEPR）策略。在确定激活的专家索引之前，CEPR 将专家权重从外部存储器预取到片上缓存。最后，我们通过引入高效的剪枝感知专家缓冲（PA-BUF）机制来共同优化 MoE 稀疏性。实验结果表明，FLAME 仅用片上两个专家缓存即可实现 84.4% 的专家预测准确率。与CPU和GPU相比，FLAME分别实现了4.12倍和1.49倍的加速。

items.title: Voronoi Diagram-based Multiple Power Plane Generation on Redistribution Layers in 3D ICs.
items.abstract: In three-dimensional integrated circuits, the interconnection design among chiplets on redistribution layers (RDLs) is crucial for achieving high-performance computing systems. To optimize the inter-chip connections, most of the previous works focused on automatic signal net routing and pin assignment. The power/ground plane generation, is still a manual and time-consuming task, especially when generating the power planes of more than ten power supplies on a limited number of RDLs. This paper proposes a novel Voronoi diagram-based multiple power/ground plane generation methodology that simultaneously optimizes the power/ground planes of all power/ground nets by utilizing the white space of given RDLs, while considering the signal routing blockages, power integrity, and complex design rules. Experimental results show that the proposed approach can achieve not only optimal area utilization but also the best cross-layer power integrity in terms of the total number of redundant vias.
items.abstract_zh: 在三维集成电路中，再分配层（RDL）上小芯片之间的互连设计对于实现高性能计算系统至关重要。为了优化芯片间连接，之前的大部分工作都集中在自动信号网络布线和引脚分配上。电源/接地层的生成仍然是一项手动且耗时的任务，尤其是在有限数量的 RDL 上生成十多个电源的电源层时。本文提出了一种新颖的基于 Voronoi 图的多电源/接地平面生成方法，该方法利用给定 RDL 的空白空间同时优化所有电源/接地网络的电源/接地平面，同时考虑信号布线阻塞、电源完整性和复杂的设计规则。实验结果表明，所提出的方法不仅可以实现最佳的面积利用率，而且可以在冗余通孔总数方面实现最佳的跨层电源完整性。

items.title: Older and Wiser: The Marriage of Device Aging and Intellectual Property Protection of DNNs.
items.abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs), such as the widely-used GPT-3 with billions of parameters, are often kept secret due to high training costs and privacy concerns surrounding the data used to train them. Previous approaches to securing DNNs typically require expensive circuit redesign, resulting in additional overheads such as increased area, energy consumption, and latency. To address these issues, we propose a novel hardware-software co-design approach for DNN intellectual property (IP) protection that capitalizes on the inherent aging characteristics of circuits and a novel differential orientation fine-tuning (DOFT) to ensure effective protection.
items.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN)，例如广泛使用的具有数十亿参数的 GPT-3，由于训练成本高昂以及训练数据的隐私问题，通常保密。以前保护 DNN 的方法通常需要昂贵的电路重新设计，从而导致额外的开销，例如增加面积、能耗和延迟。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的硬件-软件协同设计方法来保护 DNN 知识产权 (IP)，该方法利用电路固有的老化特性和新颖的差分方向微调 (DOFT) 来确保有效的保护。

items.title: FastQuery: Communication-efficient Embedding Table Query for Private LLMs inference.
items.abstract: With the fast evolution of large language models (LLMs), privacy concerns with user queries arise as they may contain sensitive information. Private inference based on homomorphic encryption (HE) has been proposed to protect user query privacy. However, private embedding table query has to be formulated as a HE-based matrix-vector multiplication problem and suffers from enormous computation and communication overhead. We observe the overhead mainly comes from the neglect of 1) the one-hot nature of user queries and 2) the robustness of the embedding table to low bit-width quantization noise. Hence, in this paper, we propose a private embedding table query optimization framework, dubbed FastQuery. FastQuery features a communication-aware embedding table quantization algorithm and a one-hot-aware dense packing algorithm to simultaneously reduce both the computation and communication costs. Compared to prior-art HE-based frameworks, e.g., Cheetah, Iron, and Bumblebee, FastQuery achieves more than 4.3×, 2.7×, 1.3× latency reduction, respectively and more than 75.7×, 60.2×, 20.2× communication reduction, respectively, on both LLAMA-7B and LLAMA-30B.
items.abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）的快速发展，用户查询的隐私问题出现了，因为它们可能包含敏感信息。提出了基于同态加密（HE）的私有推理来保护用户查询隐私。然而，私有嵌入表查询必须被表述为基于 HE 的矩阵向量乘法问题，并且会遭受巨大的计算和通信开销。我们观察到开销主要来自于忽视 1）用户查询的独热性质和 2）嵌入表对低位宽量化噪声的鲁棒性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种私有嵌入表查询优化框架，称为 FastQuery。 FastQuery 具有通信感知嵌入表量化算法和单热感知密集打包算法，可同时降低计算和通信成本。与现有的基于 HE 的框架（例如 Cheetah、Iron 和 Bumblebee）相比，FastQuery 在 LLAMA-7B 和 LLAMA-30B 上分别实现了超过 4.3×、2.7×、1.3× 的延迟减少和超过 75.7×、60.2×、20.2× 的通信减少。

items.title: Enabling Low Latency for ECQF based Flow Aggregation Scheduling in Time-Sensitive Networking.
items.abstract: Cyclic Queuing and Forwarding (CQF) configures the same cycle length on the flow path, resulting in certain flows unschedulable. Enhanced CQF (ECQF) based flow aggregation utilizes variable cycle length to address this issue. However, it remains a conceptual model without a concrete implementation. In this paper, we propose a jointly optimize aggregation cycle and flows' offsets (JACO) mechanism to achieve ECQF-based flow aggregation. We also design an incremental heuristic algorithm for JACO. Finally, we evaluate the performance of JACO in different scenarios using OMNet++ simulation platform. Compared with ECQF, the results show that JACO reduces latency and improves resource utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 循环排队转发（CQF）在流路径上配置相同的循环长度，导致某些流不可调度。基于增强型 CQF (ECQF) 的流聚合利用可变周期长度来解决此问题。然而，它仍然是一个概念模型，没有具体的实现。在本文中，我们提出了一种联合优化聚合周期和流偏移（JACO）机制来实现基于ECQF的流聚合。我们还为 JACO 设计了增量启发式算法。最后，我们使用OMNet++仿真平台评估了JACO在不同场景下的性能。与ECQF相比，结果表明JACO降低了延迟并提高了资源利用率。

items.title: TBNet: A Neural Architectural Defense Framework Facilitating DNN Model Protection in Trusted Execution Environments.
items.abstract: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) have become a promising solution to secure DNN models on edge devices. However, the existing solutions either provide inadequate protection or introduce large performance overhead. Taking both security and performance into consideration, this paper presents TBNet, a TEE-based defense framework that protects DNN model from a neural architectural perspective. Specifically, TBNet generates a novel Two-Branch substitution model, to respectively exploit (1) the computational resources in the untrusted Rich Execution Environment (REE) for latency reduction and (2) the physically-isolated TEE for model protection. Experimental results on a Raspberry Pi across diverse DNN model architectures and datasets demonstrate that TBNet achieves efficient model protection at a low cost.
items.abstract_zh: 可信执行环境 (TEE) 已成为保护边缘设备上的 DNN 模型的有前途的解决方案。然而，现有的解决方案要么提供不充分的保护，要么引入较大的性能开销。综合考虑安全性和性能，本文提出了TBNet，一种基于TEE的防御框架，从神经架构的角度保护DNN模型。具体来说，TBNet 生成了一种新颖的两分支替代模型，分别利用 (1) 不可信的丰富执行环境 (REE) 中的计算资源来减少延迟，以及 (2) 物理隔离的 TEE 来保护模型。在 Raspberry Pi 上跨不同 DNN 模型架构和数据集的实验结果表明，TBNet 以低成本实现了高效的模型保护。

items.title: Gypsophila: A Scalable and Bandwidth-Optimized Multi-Scalar Multiplication Architecture.
items.abstract: Multi-Scalar Multiplication (MSM) is a fundamental cryptographic primitive, which plays a crucial role in Zero-knowledge proof systems. In this paper, we optimize the single MSM Process Element (PE) utilizing buckets with fewer conflicts, enhanced by Greedy-based scheduling, to achieve higher efficiency. The evaluation results show our optimized single MSM PE achieving a speedup of over two times on average, peaking at 3.63 times compared to previous works. Furthermore, we introduce Gypsophila, a scalable and bandwidth-optimized architecture for implementing multiple MSM PEs. Leveraging the characteristics of the bucket method, we optimize the data flow by balancing the throughput of bucket classification, bucket aggregation, and result aggregation in MSM. Simultaneously, multiple PEs with different data access patterns share a universal point input channel and post-processing unit, which improves the module utilization and mitigates the bandwidth pressure. Gypsophila with 16 PEs, accomplishes 16 MSM tasks in a mere 1.01% additional time, showcasing an approximate 7.8% reduction in area, with only about 116 of the bandwidth requirement, compared with 16 PEs without input channel and post-process unit sharing.
items.abstract_zh: 多标量乘法（MSM）是一种基本的密码学原语，在零知识证明系统中发挥着至关重要的作用。在本文中，我们利用冲突较少的桶来优化单个 MSM 处理元素（PE），并通过基于贪婪的调度来增强，以实现更高的效率。评估结果显示，我们优化的单一 MSM PE 与之前的工作相比平均加速超过两倍，峰值达到 3.63 倍。此外，我们还介绍了 Gypsophila，这是一种可扩展且带宽优化的架构，用于实现多个 MSM PE。利用桶方法的特点，我们通过平衡MSM中桶分类、桶聚合和结果聚合的吞吐量来优化数据流。同时，具有不同数据访问模式的多个PE共享通用点输入通道和后处理单元，提高了模块利用率并减轻了带宽压力。与没有输入通道和后处理单元共享的 16 个 PE 相比，具有 16 个 PE 的 Gypsophila 在仅仅 1.01% 的额外时间内完成了 16 个 MSM 任务，面积减少了约 7.8%，而带宽需求仅为约 116 个。

items.title: Auto-ISP: An Efficient Real-Time Automatic Hyperparameter Optimization Framework for ISP Hardware System.
items.abstract: Image Signal Processor (ISP) is widely used in intelligent edge devices across various scenarios. The intricate and time-consuming tuning process demands substantial expertise. Current AI-based auto-tuning operates discretely offline, relying on predefined scenes with human intervention, leading to inconvenient manipulation, with potentially fatal impacts on downstream tasks in unforeseen scenes. We propose a real-time automatic hyperparameter optimization ISP hardware system to address real-world scenarios. Our design features a tri-step framework and a hardware accelerator, demonstrating superior performance in human and computer vision tasks, even in real-time unforeseen scenes. Experiments showcase its practicality, achieving 1080P@75FPS/240FPS in FPGA/ASIC, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 图像信号处理器（ISP）广泛应用于各种场景的智能边缘设备。复杂且耗时的调整过程需要大量的专业知识。目前基于人工智能的自动调优都是离线离线运行，依赖于预定义的场景并进行人工干预，导致操作不方便，在不可预见的场景下对下游任务可能产生致命影响。我们提出了一种实时自动超参数优化 ISP 硬件系统来解决现实场景。我们的设计采用三步框架和硬件加速器，即使在实时不可预见的场景中，也能在人类和计算机视觉任务中展现出卓越的性能。实验验证了其实用性，在FPGA/ASIC上分别实现了1080P@75FPS/240FPS。

items.title: SSRESF: Sensitivity-aware Single-particle Radiation Effects Simulation Framework in SoC Platforms based on SVM Algorithm.
items.abstract: The ever-expanding scale of integrated circuits has brought about a significant rise in the design risks associated with radiation-resistant integrated circuit chips. Traditional single-particle experimental methods, with their iterative design approach, are increasingly ill-suited for the challenges posed by large-scale integrated circuits. In response, this article introduces a novel sensitivity-aware single-particle radiation effects simulation framework tailored for System-on-Chip platforms. Based on SVM algorithm we have implemented fast finding and classification of sensitive circuit nodes. Additionally, the methodology automates soft error analysis across the entire software stack. The study includes practical experiments focusing on RISC-V architecture, encompassing core components, buses, and memory systems. It culminates in the establishment of databases for Single Event Upsets (SEU) and Single Event Transients (SET), showcasing the practical efficacy of the proposed methodology in addressing radiation-induced challenges at the scale of contemporary integrated circuits. Experimental results have shown up to 12.78× speed-up on the basis of achieving 94.58% accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 集成电路规模的不断扩大，导致抗辐射集成电路芯片的设计风险显着上升。传统的单粒子实验方法及其迭代设计方法越来越不适合大规模集成电路带来的挑战。为此，本文介绍了一种专为片上系统平台量身定制的新型灵敏度感知单粒子辐射效应仿真框架。基于SVM算法实现了敏感电路节点的快速查找和分类。此外，该方法可以自动分析整个软件堆栈的软错误。该研究包括侧重于 RISC-V 架构的实际实验，涵盖核心组件、总线和内存系统。最终建立了单粒子扰动（SEU）和单粒子瞬态（SET）数据库，展示了所提出的方法在解决当代集成电路规模的辐射引起的挑战方面的实际功效。实验结果表明，在准确率达到94.58%的基础上，速度提升了12.78倍。

items.title: PMP: Pattern Morphing-based Memory Partitioning in High-Level Synthesis.
items.abstract: Memory partitioning is a widely used technique to reduce access conflicts on multi-bank memory in high-level synthesis. Previous memory partitioning methods mainly focus on a given access pattern extracted from stencil applications. Restricted by the pattern shape, these methods are prone to sub-optimal bank numbers or large overhead on address generation. In this work, we propose a pattern-morphing-based memory partitioning method, PMP, that only requires reduced hyperplane families to achieve the minimal bank number. To reduce the side effect of extra data padding, an integer linear programming problem is formulated for pattern morphing. Compared to the previous hyperplane-based memory partitioning, the experimental results show that our approach could achieve the optimal partition factor while saving 22% in LUTs, 21% in FlipFlops, 10% in DSPs, and 40% in memory overhead, on average.
items.abstract_zh: 内存分区是一种广泛使用的技术，用于减少高级综合中多存储体内存的访问冲突。以前的内存分区方法主要关注从模板应用程序中提取的给定访问模式。受模式形状的限制，这些方法很容易出现次优的存储体数量或地址生成的巨大开销。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于模式变形的内存分区方法（PMP），该方法只需要减少超平面族即可实现最小的存储体数量。为了减少额外数据填充的副作用，为模式变形制定了整数线性规划问题。与之前基于超平面的内存分区相比，实验结果表明，我们的方法可以实现最佳分区因子，同时平均节省 22% 的 LUT、21% 的 FlipFlops、10% 的 DSP 和 40% 的内存开销。

items.title: MoC: A Morton-Code-Based Fine-Grained Quantization for Accelerating Point Cloud Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Point Cloud Neural Network (PCNN) plays an essential role in various 3D applications, with some of them even being time-sensitive and safety-critical. However, the large scale of unordered points with lengthy features results in heavy computational workloads, making them far from real-time processing. To address this challenge, we propose MoC, a Morton-code-based fine-grained quantization for accelerating PCNNs. Specifically, we utilize Morton code to capture the spatial locality among points. Then, we gather nearby points with similar features into a region. Considering the similarity in features of nearby points, we propose to decompose features into base and offsets, where the offsets fall within a narrow range. Building upon this, we introduce a two-level mixed-precision quantization. In the first level, we quantize offsets with low precision, while keeping the base in high precision to ensure accuracy. For the second level, noticing the different data distribution of offsets across various regions, we employ two types of low precision at the region level, which provides opportunities to further accelerate feature computations. To support our algorithm, we design a hardware architecture that parallelizes the Morton code path with the critical path. In our extensive experiments on various datasets, our algorithm-architecture co-designed method demonstrates 12X, 6.3X, 4.7X, 3.8X, 3.4X and 2.8X speedup and 19.3X, 9.7X, 6.0X, 5.2X, 4.6X and 4.1X energy savings over CPU, Server and Edge GPUs, state-of-the-art ASICs (incl. PointAcc, MARS, PRADA) with negligible accuracy loss.
items.abstract_zh: 点云神经网络 (PCNN) 在各种 3D 应用中发挥着重要作用，其中一些应用甚至具有时间敏感性和安全性。然而，大规模的无序点和冗长的特征导致计算量很大，使得它们远离实时处理。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 MoC，一种基于 Morton 代码的细粒度量化，用于加速 PCNN。具体来说，我们利用莫顿代码来捕获点之间的空间局部性。然后，我们将附近具有相似特征的点聚集到一个区域中。考虑到附近点特征的相似性，我们建议将特征分解为基数和偏移量，其中偏移量落在一个狭窄的范围内。在此基础上，我们引入了两级混合精度量化。在第一级中，我们以低精度量化偏移，同时保持高精度基数以确保准确性。对于第二级，注意到不同区域的偏移量的不同数据分布，我们在区域级别采用两种类型的低精度，这为进一步加速特征计算提供了机会。为了支持我们的算法，我们设计了一个硬件架构，将 Morton 代码路径与关键路径并行化。在我们对各种数据集进行的广泛实验中，我们的算法架构联合设计方法证明了与 CPU、服务器和边缘 GPU、最先进的 ASIC 相比，加速比提高了 12 倍、6.3 倍、4.7 倍、3.8 倍、3.4 倍和 2.8 倍，能源节省了 19.3 倍、9.7 倍、6.0 倍、5.2 倍、4.6 倍和 4.1 倍（包括 PointAcc、MARS、PRADA），准确性损失可以忽略不计。

items.title: Effectively Sanitizing Embedded Operating Systems.
items.abstract: Embedded operating systems, considering their widespread use in security-critical applications, are not effectively tested with sanitizers to effectively root out bugs. Sanitizers provide a means to detect bugs that are not visible directly through exceptional or erroneous behaviors, thus uncovering more potent bugs during testing.
items.abstract_zh: 考虑到嵌入式操作系统在安全关键型应用中的广泛使用，它们没有经过消毒剂的有效测试来有效地根除错误。消毒剂提供了一种通过异常或错误行为检测不直接可见的错误的方法，从而在测试过程中发现更有效的错误。

items.title: Cross-Layer Exploration and Chip Demonstration of In-Sensor Computing for Large-Area Applications with Differential-Frame ROM-Based Compute-In-Memory.
items.abstract: In-sensor computing has emerged as a promising approach to mitigating huge data transmission costs between sensors and processing units. Recently, the emerging application scenarios have raised more demands of sensory technology for large-area and flexible integration. However, with thin-film technologies that are capable of providing flexible and large-area integration support, the implementation of in-sensor computing can be strongly restricted due to the low device performance, large-area integration variation, and costly interface between sensors and CMOS processors. To address this challenge, we propose an in-sensor computing architecture to facilitate high-parallelism NN pre-processing and effective data compression. The boundaries of computing parallelism are expanded by adopting compact ROM-based compute-in-memory scheme next to sensing array. Differential-frame computing provides not only excellent robustness, but also high data sparsity. A bio-inspired data compression method with residual recovery caches and zero-skip circuits further enhances output sparsity without accumulated error. Based on the proposed cross-layer design optimization, an LTPS TFT-based ROM CiM chip has been fabricated and experimentally measured. The system-level evaluation demonstrates 3.85× speedup and 5.10× energy efficiency improvement compared with traditional architecture with separated sensors and processors, outperforming existing in-sensor computing works in large-area thin-film technology scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 传感器内计算已成为一种有前途的方法，可以减轻传感器和处理单元之间巨大的数据传输成本。近年来，新兴的应用场景对传感技术提出了更多大面积、灵活集成的需求。然而，凭借能够提供灵活和大面积集成支持的薄膜技术，由于器件性能低、大面积集成变化以及传感器和 CMOS 处理器之间昂贵的接口，传感器内计算的实现可能受到强烈限制。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种传感器内计算架构，以促进高并行性神经网络预处理和有效的数据压缩。通过在传感阵列旁边采用基于 ROM 的紧凑型内存计算方案，扩展了计算并行性的边界。差分帧计算不仅提供出色的鲁棒性，而且提供高数据稀疏性。具有残留恢复缓存和零跳跃电路的仿生数据压缩方法进一步增强了输出稀疏性，而不会累积错误。基于所提出的跨层设计优化，基于 LTPS TFT 的 ROM CiM 芯片已经制造出来并进行了实验测量。系统级评估表明，与传感器和处理器分离的传统架构相比，加速性能提高了3.85倍，能效提高了5.10倍，在大面积薄膜技术场景下的性能优于现有的传感器内计算工作。

items.title: Drift: Leveraging Distribution-based Dynamic Precision Quantization for Efficient Deep Neural Network Acceleration.
items.abstract: Quantization is one of the most hardware-efficient ways to reduce inference costs for deep neural network (DNN) models. Nevertheless, with the continuous increase of DNN model sizes (240× in two years) and the emergence of large language models, existing static quantization methods fail to utilize the sparsity and redundancy of models sufficiently. Motivated by the pervasive dynamism in data tensors across DNN models, we propose a dynamic precision quantization algorithm to further reduce computational costs beyond statically quantized DNN models. Furthermore, we find that existing precision-flexible accelerators cannot support the DNN models with dynamic precision. To this end, we design a novel accelerator, Drift, and achieve online scheduling to efficiently support dynamic precision execution. We conduct experiments with various DNN models, including CNN-based and Transformer-based models. Evaluation results show that Drift achieves 2.85× speedup and 3.12× energy saving compared to existing precision-flexible accelerators with statically quantized models.
items.abstract_zh: 量化是降低深度神经网络 (DNN) 模型推理成本的最硬件效率最高的方法之一。然而，随着DNN模型尺寸的不断增加（两年内240×）和大型语言模型的出现，现有的静态量化方法无法充分利用模型的稀疏性和冗余性。受 DNN 模型中数据张量普遍存在的动态性的推动，我们提出了一种动态精度量化算法，以进一步降低静态量化 DNN 模型之外的计算成本。此外，我们发现现有的精度灵活的加速器无法支持动态精度的 DNN 模型。为此，我们设计了一种新颖的加速器Drift，并实现在线调度，以高效支持动态精度执行。我们使用各种 DNN 模型进行实验，包括基于 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的模型。评估结果表明，与现有静态量化模型的精密柔性加速器相比，Drift 实现了 2.85 倍加速和 3.12 倍节能。

items.title: NeuroSelect: Learning to Select Clauses in SAT Solvers.
items.abstract: Modern SAT solvers depend on conflict-driven clause learning to avoid recurring conflicts. Deleting less valuable learned clauses is a crucial component of modern SAT solvers to ensure efficiency. However, a single clause deletion policy cannot guarantee optimal performance on all SAT instances. This paper introduces a new clause deletion metric to diversify existing clause deletion policies. Then, we propose to use machine learning to evaluate and select clause deletion policies adaptively based on the input instance. We show that our method can reduce the runtime of the state-of-the-art SAT solver Kissat by 5.8% on large industry benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 现代 SAT 求解器依靠冲突驱动的子句学习来避免重复出现的冲突。删除价值较低的学习子句是现代 SAT 求解器确保效率的重要组成部分。但是，单个子句删除策略无法保证所有 SAT 实例上的最佳性能。本文引入了一种新的子句删除度量来使现有的子句删除策略多样化。然后，我们建议使用机器学习根据输入实例自适应地评估和选择子句删除策略。我们证明，我们的方法可以在大型行业基准测试中将最先进的 SAT 求解器 Kissat 的运行时间缩短 5.8%。

items.title: PowerRChol: Efficient Power Grid Analysis Based on Fast Randomized Cholesky Factorization.
items.abstract: Efficient power grid analysis is critical in modern VLSI design. It is computationally challenging because it requires solving large linear equations with millions of unknowns. Iterative solvers are more scalable, but their performance relies on preconditioners. Existing preconditioning approaches suffer from either high construction cost or slow convergence rate, both resulting in unsatisfactory total solution time. In this work, we propose an efficient power grid simulator based on fast randomized Cholesky factorization, named PowerRChol. We first propose a randomized Cholesky factorization algorithm with provable linear-time complexity. Then we propose a randomized factorization oriented matrix reordering approach. Experimental results on large-scale power grids demonstrate the superior efficiency of PowerRChol over existing iterative solvers, showing 1.51X, 1.93X and 3.64X speedups on average over the original RChol [3], feGRASS [11] and AMG [14] based PCG solvers, respectively. For instance, a power grid matrix with 60 million nodes and 260 million nonzeros can be solved (at a 1E-6 accuracy level) in 148 seconds on a single CPU core.
items.abstract_zh: 高效的电网分析对于现代 VLSI 设计至关重要。它在计算上具有挑战性，因为它需要求解具有数百万个未知数的大型线性方程。迭代求解器更具可扩展性，但其性能依赖于预处理器。现有的预处理方法要么构造成本高，要么收敛速度慢，导致总求解时间不理想。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于快速随机 Cholesky 分解的高效电网模拟器，名为 PowerRChol。我们首先提出了一种具有可证明的线性时间复杂度的随机 Cholesky 分解算法。然后我们提出了一种面向随机因式分解的矩阵重新排序方法。大规模电网的实验结果证明了 PowerRChol 比现有迭代求解器具有更高的效率，与原始基于 RChol [3]、feGRASS [11] 和 AMG [14] 的 PCG 求解器相比，平均加速分别为 1.51 倍、1.93 倍和 3.64 倍。例如，具有 6000 万个节点和 2.6 亿个非零值的电网矩阵可以在单个 CPU 内核上在 148 秒内求解（以 1E-6 精度级别）。

items.title: INSPIRE: Accelerating Deep Neural Networks via Hardware-friendly Index-Pair Encoding.
items.abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference consumes significant computing resources and development efforts due to the growing model size. Quantization is a promising technique to reduce the computation and memory cost of DNNs. Most existing quantization methods rely on fixed-point integers or floating-point types, which require more bits to maintain model accuracy. In contrast, variable-length quantization, which combines high precision for values with significant magnitudes (i.e., outliers) and low precision for normal values, offers algorithmic advantages but introduces significant hardware overhead due to variable-length encoding and decoding. Also, existing quantization methods are less effective for both (dynamic) activations and (static) weights due to the presence of outliers.
items.abstract_zh: 由于模型规模不断增大，深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理消耗了大量的计算资源和开发工作。量化是一种很有前途的技术，可以减少 DNN 的计算和内存成本。大多数现有的量化方法依赖于定点整数或浮点类型，这需要更多的位来维持模型的准确性。相比之下，可变长度量化结合了具有显着幅度（即异常值）的值的高精度和正常值的低精度，提供了算法优势，但由于可变长度编码和解码而引入了显着的硬件开销。此外，由于存在异常值，现有的量化方法对于（动态）激活和（静态）权重都不太有效。

items.title: Digital CIM with Noisy SRAM Bit: A Compact Clustered Annealer for Large-Scale Combinatorial Optimization.
items.abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems (COP) are NP-hard and intractable to solve using conventional computing. The Ising model-based annealer has gained increasing attention recently due to its efficiency and speed in finding approximate solutions. However, Ising solvers for travelling salesman problems (TSP) usually suffer from a scalability issue due to quadratically increasing number of spins. In this paper, we propose a digital computing-in-memory (CIM) based clustered annealer to solve tens of thousands of city-scale TSP with only a few mega-byte (MB) of static random access memory (SRAM), using hierarchical clustering to solve input sparsity and digital CIM flexibility to solve weight sparsity. The intrinsic process variations between SRAM devices are utilized to generate the noisy bit errors during pseudo-read under reduced supply voltage, realizing the annealing process. The design space of cluster size and programmability is explored to understand the trade-offs of solution quality and hardware cost, for TSP scale ranging from 3080 to 85900 cities. The proposed design speeds up the convergence by >109× with <25% solution quality overhead compared with the CPU baseline. The comparison with state-of-the-art scalable annealers shows a >1013× improvement on functionally normalized area and power.
items.abstract_zh: 组合优化问题 (COP) 是 NP 难题，很难使用传统计算来解决。基于 Ising 模型的退火器由于其寻找近似解的效率和速度最近受到越来越多的关注。然而，旅行商问题 (TSP) 的 Ising 求解器通常会因旋转次数呈二次方增加而遇到可扩展性问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于内存数字计算（CIM）的集群退火器，只需几兆字节（MB）的静态随机存取存储器（SRAM）即可解决数万个城市规模的TSP，使用层次集群来解决输入稀疏性，并使用数字CIM灵活性来解决权重稀疏性。利用SRAM器件之间固有的工艺差异，在降低的电源电压下进行伪读取期间产生噪声位错误，从而实现退火过程。探索集群规模和可编程性的设计空间，以了解解决方案质量和硬件成本的权衡，TSP 规模范围为 3080 到 85900 个城市。与 CPU 基准相比，所提出的设计将收敛速度提高了 >109 倍，且解决方案质量开销<25%。与最先进的可扩展退火炉的比较表明，功能归一化面积和功率提高了 >1013 倍。

items.title: An NTT/INTT Accelerator with Ultra-High Throughput and Area Efficiency for FHE.
items.abstract: As a core arithmetic operation and security guarantee of Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), Number Theoretic Transform (NTT) of a large degree is the primary source of computational and time overhead. In this paper, we propose a scalable and conflict-free memory mapping algorithm that breaks the memory bound and releases a large amount of on-chip resources. A flexible and no-stall hardware/software pipeline architecture is designed to boost the throughput of NTT/INTT of N = 216 to over 48,543 operations per second with area efficiency, which 4× and 10× speed up the FPGA-based (HPCA'23) and GPU-based (HPCA'23) schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 数论变换(NTT)作为全同态加密(FHE)的核心算术运算和安全保障，很大程度上是计算量和时间开销的主要来源。在本文中，我们提出了一种可扩展且无冲突的内存映射算法，该算法打破了内存限制并释放了大量的片上资源。灵活且无停顿的硬件/软件管道架构旨在将 N = 216 的 NTT/INTT 吞吐量提高到每秒超过 48,543 次操作，并具有面积效率，这将基于 FPGA (HPCA'23) 和基于 GPU (HPCA'23) 方案的速度提高了 4 倍和 10 倍。

items.title: Double-Win NAS: Towards Deep-to-Shallow Transformable Neural Architecture Search for Intelligent Embedded Systems.
items.abstract: Thanks to the evolving network depth, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved impressive performance across various intelligent embedded scenarios towards embedded intelligence. Nonetheless, this trend also leads to degraded hardware efficiency as the network evolves deeper and deeper. In contrast, shallow networks exhibit superior hardware efficiency, which, unfortunately, suffer from inferior accuracy. To tackle this dilemma, we establish the first deep-to-shallow transformable neural architecture search (NAS) paradigm, namely Double-Win NAS (DW-NAS), which is dedicated to automatically exploring deep-to-shallow transformable networks to marry the best of both worlds. Extensive experiments on two NVIDIA Jetson intelligent embedded systems clearly show the superiority of DW-NAS over previous state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 由于网络深度不断发展，卷积神经网络（CNN）在各种智能嵌入式场景中实现了令人印象深刻的性能，以实现嵌入式智能。尽管如此，随着网络越来越深入，这种趋势也会导致硬件效率下降。相比之下，浅层网络表现出卓越的硬件效率，但不幸的是，其准确性较低。为了解决这个困境，我们建立了第一个从深到浅的可变换神经架构搜索（NAS）范式，即双赢NAS（DW-NAS），它致力于自动探索从深到浅的可变换网络，以结合两个世界的优点。在两个 NVIDIA Jetson 智能嵌入式系统上进行的大量实验清楚地表明了 DW-NAS 相对于之前最先进方法的优越性。

items.title: Knowing The Spec to Explore The Design via Transformed Bayesian Optimization.
items.abstract: AI chip scales expediently in the large language models (LLMs) era. In contrast, the existing chip design space exploration (DSE) methods, aimed at discovering optimal yet often infeasible or un-produceable Pareto-front designs, are hindered by neglect of design specifications. In this paper, we propose a novel Spec-driven transformed Bayesian optimization framework to find expected optimal RISC-V SoC architecture designs for LLM tasks. The highlights of our framework lie in a tailored transformed Gaussian process (GP) model prioritizing specified target metrics and a customized acquisition function (EHRM) in multi-objective optimization. Extensive experiments on large-scale RISC-V SoC architecture design explorations for LLMs, such as Transformer, BERT, and GPT-1, demonstrate that our method not only can effectively find the design according to QoR values from the spec, but also outperforms 34.59% in ADRS over state-of-the-art approach with only 66.67% runtime overhead.
items.abstract_zh: AI 芯片在大语言模型 (LLM) 时代可以方便地扩展。相比之下，现有的芯片设计空间探索（DSE）方法旨在发现最佳但通常不可行或无法生产的帕累托前沿设计，但由于忽视设计规范而受到阻碍。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的规范驱动的转换贝叶斯优化框架，为 LLM 任务找到预期的最佳 RISC-V SoC 架构设计。我们框架的亮点在于定制的变换高斯过程（GP）模型，优先考虑指定的目标指标和多目标优化中的定制采集函数（EHRM）。针对 LLM（例如 Transformer、BERT 和 GPT-1）的大规模 RISC-V SoC 架构设计探索的大量实验表明，我们的方法不仅可以根据规范中的 QoR 值有效地找到设计，而且在 ADRS 方面的性能比最先进的方法高出 34.59%，而运行时开销仅为 66.67%。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Fast System Technology Co-Optimization Framework for Emerging Technology Based on Graph Neural Networks.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a fast system technology co-optimization (STCO) framework that optimizes power, performance, and area (PPA) for next-generation IC design, addressing the challenges and opportunities presented by novel materials and device architectures. We focus on accelerating the technology level of STCO using AI techniques, by employing graph neural network (GNN)-based approaches for both TCAD simulation and cell library characterization, which are interconnected through a unified compact model, collectively achieving over a 100X speedup over traditional methods. These advancements enable comprehensive STCO iterations with runtime speedups ranging from 1.9X to 14.1X and supports both emerging and traditional technologies.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种快速系统技术协同优化 (STCO) 框架，可优化下一代 IC 设计的功耗、性能和面积 (PPA)，应对新型材料和器件架构带来的挑战和机遇。我们专注于利用人工智能技术加速 STCO 的技术水平，采用基于图神经网络 (GNN) 的方法进行 TCAD 仿真和单元库表征，这些方法通过统一的紧凑模型互连，总体实现比传统方法提高 100 倍以上的速度。这些进步实现了全面的 STCO 迭代，运行时加速范围从 1.9 倍到 14.1 倍，并支持新兴和传统技术。

items.title: A Holistic Functionalization Approach to Optimizing Imperative Tensor Programs in Deep Learning.
items.abstract: As deep learning empowers various fields, many domain-specific non-neural network operators have been proposed to improve the accuracy of deep learning models. Researchers often use the imperative programming diagram (PyTorch) to express these new operators, leaving the fusion optimization of these operators to deep learning compilers. Unfortunately, the inherent side effects introduced by imperative tensor programs, especially tensor-level mutations, often make optimization extremely difficult. Previous works either fail to eliminate the side effects of tensor-level mutations or require programmers to manually analyze and transform them. In this paper, we present a holistic functionalization approach (TensorSSA) to optimizing imperative tensor programs beyond control flow boundaries. We first introduce TensorSSA intermediate representation for removing tensor-level mutation and expanding the scope and ability of operator fusion. Based on TensorSSA IR, we propose a TensorSSA conversion algorithm that performs functionalization crossing the boundary of control flow. TensorSSA achieves a 1.79X (1.34X on average) speedup in representative deep learning tasks than state-of-the-art works.
items.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习赋能各个领域，许多特定领域的非神经网络算子被提出来提高深度学习模型的准确性。研究人员经常使用命令式编程图（PyTorch）来表达这些新的运算符，将这些运算符的融合优化留给深度学习编译器。不幸的是，命令式张量程序引入的固有副作用，尤其是张量级突变，通常使优化变得极其困难。之前的工作要么无法消除张量级突变的副作用，要么需要程序员手动分析和转换它们。在本文中，我们提出了一种整体功能化方法（TensorSSA）来优化超出控制流边界的命令式张量程序。我们首先引入 TensorSSA 中间表示，用于消除张量级变异并扩展算子融合的范围和能力。基于TensorSSA IR，我们提出了一种TensorSSA转换算法，该算法可以执行跨越控制流边界的功能化。 TensorSSA 在代表性深度学习任务中比最先进的作品实现了 1.79 倍（平均 1.34 倍）的加速。

items.title: Accelerating Regular Path Queries over Graph Database with Processing-in-Memory.
items.abstract: Regular path queries (RPQs) in graph databases are bottlenecked by the memory wall. Emerging processing-in-memory (PIM) technologies offer a promising solution to dispatch and execute path matching tasks in parallel within PIM modules. We present Moctopus, a PIM-based data management system for graph databases that supports efficient batch RPQs and graph updates. Moctopus employs a PIM-friendly dynamic graph partitioning algorithm, which tackles graph skewness and preserves graph locality with low overhead for RPQ processing. Moctopus enables efficient graph update by amortizing the host CPU's update overhead to PIM modules. Evaluation of Moctopus demonstrates superiority over the state-of-the-art traditional graph database.
items.abstract_zh: 图数据库中的常规路径查询（RPQ）受到内存墙的瓶颈。新兴的内存处理 (PIM) 技术提供了一种有前途的解决方案，可以在 PIM 模块内并行调度和执行路径匹配任务。我们推出了 Moctopus，这是一种基于 PIM 的图形数据库数据管理系统，支持高效的批量 RPQ 和图形更新。 Moctopus 采用 PIM 友好的动态图分区算法，该算法可以解决图偏斜问题并以较低的 RPQ 处理开销保留图局部性。 Moctopus 通过将主机 CPU 的更新开销分摊到 PIM 模块来实现高效的图形更新。 Moctopus 的评估显示了相对于最先进的传统图数据库的优越性。

items.title: A Combined Content Addressable Memory and In-Memory Processing Approach for k-Clique Counting Acceleration.
items.abstract: k-Clique counting problem plays an important role in graph mining which has seen a growing number of applications. However, current k-Clique counting accelerators cannot meet the performance requirement mainly because they struggle with high data transfer issue incurred by the intensive set intersection operations and the inability of load balancing. In this paper, we propose to solve this problem with a hybrid framework of content addressable memory (CAM) and in-memory processing (PIM). Specifically, we first utilize CAM for binary induced subgraph generation in order to reduce the search space, then we use PIM to implement in-place parallel k-Clique counting through iterative Boolean logic "AND" like operation. To take full advantage of this combined CAM and PIM framework, we develop dynamic task scheduling strategies that can achieve near optimal load balancing among the PIM arrays. Experimental results demonstrate that, compared with state-of-the-art CPU and GPU platforms, our approach achieves speedups of 167.5× and 28.8×, respectively. Meanwhile, the energy efficiency is improved by 788.3× over the GPU baseline.
items.abstract_zh: k-Clique 计数问题在图挖掘中发挥着重要作用，其应用越来越多。然而，当前的k-Clique计数加速器无法满足性能要求，主要是因为它们面临着密集的集合交集操作所带来的高数据传输问题以及无法进行负载平衡。在本文中，我们建议通过内容可寻址存储器（CAM）和内存处理（PIM）的混合框架来解决这个问题。具体来说，我们首先利用 CAM 进行二进制诱导子图生成，以减少搜索空间，然后使用 PIM 通过迭代布尔逻辑“AND”之类的操作来实现就地并行 k-Clique 计数。为了充分利用这种组合的 CAM 和 PIM 框架，我们开发了动态任务调度策略，可以在 PIM 阵列之间实现近乎最佳的负载平衡。实验结果表明，与最先进的 CPU 和 GPU 平台相比，我们的方法分别实现了 167.5 倍和 28.8 倍的加速。同时，能效比 GPU 基线提高了 788.3 倍。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Machine Learning Based Reference Ripple Error Suppression in Successive Approximation Register Analog-to-Digital Converters.
items.abstract: This work presents a machine learning (ML) technique to suppress reference ripple errors in successive approximation register (SAR) analog-to-digital converter (ADC). Reference voltage ripple due to switching in SAR ADC introduces dynamic error which manifests as spurs in the output spectrum and limits ADC resolution.
