Conventional techniques to suppress reference ripple require large decoupling capacitor and high-speed reference voltage buffer which consume large area and power. The proposed ML approach uses a supervised technique in which a low-speed 10MHz SAR ADC is used for learning and correcting reference ripple error in a 200MHz SAR ADC. Simulated in 28nm CMOS technology, the proposed ML approach reduces overall ADC power consumption by 4.9x without degrading performance.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种机器学习 (ML) 技术，用于抑制逐次逼近寄存器 (SAR) 模数转换器 (ADC) 中的参考纹波误差。 SAR ADC 中的切换引起的参考电压纹波会引入动态误差，表现为输出频谱中的毛刺并限制 ADC 分辨率。抑制参考纹波的传统技术需要大的去耦电容器和高速参考电压缓冲器，这会消耗很大的面积和功率。所提出的 ML 方法使用一种监督技术，其中使用低速 10MHz SAR ADC 来学习和纠正 200MHz SAR ADC 中的参考纹波误差。所提出的 ML 方法在 28nm CMOS 技术中进行模拟，可将 ADC 整体功耗降低 4.9 倍，而不会降低性能。

items.title: CDLS: Constraint Driven Generative AI Framework for Analog Layout Synthesis.
items.abstract: In advanced process technology nodes, analog circuit performance is intrinsically linked to layout parasitics and layout dependent effects (LDE). In contrast to digital designs, layout generation for analog mixed signal circuits remains predominantly a slow manual task, impeding rapid design convergence. To address this bottleneck, we introduce CDLS - a Constraint Driven Generative AI Framework for Analog Layout Synthesis. CDLS is fundamentally a constraint driven framework that enables analog circuit designers to auto-generate simulation-ready layout. Unlike traditional algorithmic approaches, CDLS uses generative AI and machine learning techniques to generate key design constraints that drive the quality of autogenerated placement and routing. Using CDLS, on average we reduce layout iteration time by 2-3X on industrial designs. By reducing the turn-around-time on layout iterations we estimate a 30% reduction to overall design convergence cycle. We also demonstrate that the quality of results achieved through CDLS is on par with manually drawn layout on state-of-the-art analog designs developed on an Intel sub-10nm process technology node.
items.abstract_zh: 在先进工艺技术节点中，模拟电路性能与布局寄生效应和布局相关效应 (LDE) 有着内在的联系。与数字设计相比，模拟混合信号电路的布局生成仍然主要是一项缓慢的手动任务，阻碍了设计的快速收敛。为了解决这个瓶颈，我们引入了 CDLS——一种用于模拟布局综合的约束驱动生成人工智能框架。 CDLS 从根本上来说是一个约束驱动框架，使模拟电路设计人员能够自动生成可用于仿真的布局。与传统算法方法不同，CDLS 使用生成式人工智能和机器学习技术来生成关键设计约束，从而提高自动生成布局和布线的质量。使用 CDLS，我们将工业设计的布局迭代时间平均减少了 2-3 倍。通过减少布局迭代的周转时间，我们估计总体设计收敛周期将减少 30%。我们还证明，通过 CDLS 实现的结果质量与在英特尔 10 纳米以下工艺技术节点上开发的最先进模拟设计上手动绘制的布局相当。

items.title: HyCaMi: High-Level Synthesis for Cache Side-Channel Mitigation.
items.abstract: Cache side-channels are a major threat to cryptographic implementations, particularly block ciphers. Traditional manual hardening methods transform block ciphers into Boolean circuits, a practice refined since the late 90s. The only existing automatic approach based on Boolean circuits achieves security but suffers from performance issues. This paper examines the use of Lookup Tables (LUTs) for automatic hardening of block ciphers against cache side-channel attacks. We present a novel method combining LUT-based synthesis with quantitative static analysis in our HyCaMi framework. Applied to seven block cipher implementations, HyCaMi shows significant improvement in efficiency, being 9.5× more efficient than previous methods, while effectively protecting against cache side-channel attacks. Additionally, for the first time, we explore balancing speed with security by adjusting LUT sizes, providing faster performance with slightly reduced leakage guarantees, suitable for scenarios where absolute security and speed must be balanced.
items.abstract_zh: 缓存侧通道是加密实现（尤其是分组密码）的主要威胁。传统的手动强化方法将分组密码转换为布尔电路，这是自 90 年代末以来改进的做法。现有的唯一基于布尔电路的自动方法实现了安全性，但存在性能问题。本文研究了如何使用查找表 (LUT) 自动强化分组密码以抵御缓存侧通道攻击。我们在 HyCaMi 框架中提出了一种将基于 LUT 的合成与定量静态分析相结合的新方法。 HyCaMi 应用于七种分组密码实现，显示出效率的显着提高，比以前的方法效率提高了 9.5 倍，同时有效防止缓存侧通道攻击。此外，我们首次通过调整LUT大小来探索速度与安全性的平衡，提供更快的性能并略微减少泄漏保证，适用于必须平衡绝对安全性和速度的场景。

items.title: VARADE: a Variational-based AutoRegressive model for Anomaly Detection on the Edge.
items.abstract: Detecting complex anomalies on massive amounts of data is a crucial task in Industry 4.0, best addressed by deep learning. However, available solutions are computationally demanding, requiring cloud architectures prone to latency and bandwidth issues. This work presents VARADE, a novel solution implementing a light autoregressive framework based on variational inference, which is best suited for real-time execution on the edge. The proposed approach was validated on a robotic arm, part of a pilot production line, and compared with several state-of-the-art algorithms, obtaining the best trade-off between anomaly detection accuracy, power consumption and inference frequency on two different edge platforms.
items.abstract_zh: 检测大量数据中的复杂异常是工业 4.0 中的一项关键任务，最好通过深度学习来解决。然而，可用的解决方案对计算要求很高，需要容易出现延迟和带宽问题的云架构。这项工作提出了 VARADE，这是一种新颖的解决方案，实现了基于变分推理的轻型自回归框架，最适合边缘实时执行。所提出的方法在作为试验生产线一部分的机械臂上进行了验证，并与几种最先进的算法进行了比较，在两个不同的边缘平台上获得了异常检测精度、功耗和推理频率之间的最佳权衡。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Language-level QoR modeling for High-Level Synthesis.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a language-level modeling approach for HighLevel Synthesis based on the state-of-the-art Transformer architecture. Our approach estimates the performance and required resources of HLS applications directly from the source code when different synthesis directives, in terms of HLS #pragmas, are applied. Results show that the proposed architecture achieves 96.02% accuracy for predicting the feasibility class of applications and an average of 0.95 and 0.91 R2 scores for predicting the actual performance and required resources, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于最先进的 Transformer 架构的语言级建模方法。当应用不同的综合指令（根据 HLS #pragmas）时，我们的方法直接从源代码估计 HLS 应用程序的性能和所需资源。结果表明，所提出的架构在预测应用程序可行性类别方面的准确率达到了 96.02%，在预测实际性能和所需资源方面的平均 R2 分数分别为 0.95 和 0.91。

items.title: Mixed-Dimensional Qudit State Preparation Using Edge-Weighted Decision Diagrams.
items.abstract: Quantum computers have the potential to solve important problems which are fundamentally intractable on a classical computer. The underlying physics of quantum computing platforms supports using multi-valued logic, which promises a boost in performance over the prevailing two-level logic. One key element to exploiting this potential is the capability to efficiently prepare quantum states for multi-valued, or qudit, systems. Due to the time sensitivity of quantum computers, the circuits to prepare the required states have to be as short as possible. In this paper, we investigate quantum state preparation with a focus on mixed-dimensional systems, where the individual qudits may have different dimensionalities. The proposed approach automatically realizes quantum circuits constructing a corresponding mixed-dimensional quantum state. To this end, decision diagrams are used as a compact representation of the quantum state to be realized. We further incorporate the ability to approximate the quantum state to enable a finely controlled trade-off between accuracy, memory complexity, and number of operations in the circuit. Empirical evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach in facilitating fast and scalable quantum state preparation, with performance directly linked to the size of the decision diagram. The implementation is freely available as part of Munich Quantum Toolkit (MQT) at github.com/cda-tum/mqt-qudits.
items.abstract_zh: 量子计算机有潜力解决传统计算机根本上难以解决的重要问题。量子计算平台的底层物理支持使用多值逻辑，这有望比流行的两级逻辑提高性能。开发这一潜力的一个关键要素是能够为多值或 qdit 系统有效地准备量子态。由于量子计算机的时间敏感性，准备所需状态的电路必须尽可能短。在本文中，我们研究了量子态制备，重点关注混合维度系统，其中各个量子体可能具有不同的维度。所提出的方法自动实现构建相应的混合维量子态的量子电路。为此，决策图被用作要实现的量子态的紧凑表示。我们进一步结合了近似量子态的能力，以实现精确度、存储器复杂性和电路中操作数量之间的精细控制权衡。实证评估证明了所提出的方法在促进快速且可扩展的量子态制备方面的有效性，其性能与决策图的大小直接相关。该实现可作为慕尼黑量子工具包 (MQT) 的一部分免费提供，网址为 github.com/cda-tum/mqt-qudits。

items.title: Deep Reorganization: Retaining Residuals in TinyML.
items.abstract: Designing intelligent, tiny devices with limited memory is immensely challenging, exacerbated by the additional memory requirement of residual connections in deep neural networks. In contrast to existing approaches that eliminate residuals to reduce peak memory usage at the cost of significant accuracy degradation, this paper presents DERO, which reorganizes residual connections by leveraging insights into the types and interdependencies of operations across residual connections. Evaluations were conducted across diverse model architectures designed for common computer vision applications. DERO consistently achieves peak memory usage comparable to plain-style models without residuals, while closely matching the accuracy of the original models with residuals.
items.abstract_zh: 设计内存有限的智能微型设备极具挑战性，而深度神经网络中剩余连接的额外内存要求更是雪上加霜。与现有的以显着降低精度为代价消除残差以减少峰值内存使用的方法相比，本文提出了 DERO，它通过利用对残差连接之间操作的类型和相互依赖性的洞察来重新组织残差连接。对为常见计算机视觉应用设计的不同模型架构进行了评估。 DERO 始终达到与没有残差的普通模型相当的峰值内存使用量，同时与带有残差的原始模型的准确性紧密匹配。

items.title: NSPG: Natural language Processing-based Security Property Generator for Hardware Security Assurance.
items.abstract: The efficiency of validating complex System-on-Chips (SoCs) is contingent on the quality of the security properties provided. Generating security properties with traditional approaches often requires expert intervention and is limited to a few IPs, thereby resulting in a time-consuming and non-robust process. To address this issue, we, for the first time, propose a novel and automated Natural Language Processing (NLP)-based Security Property Generator (NSPG). Specifically, our approach utilizes hardware documentation in order to propose the first hardware security-specific language model, HS-BERT, for extracting security properties dedicated to hardware design. It is capable of phasing a significant amount of hardware specification, and the generated security properties can be easily converted into hardware assertions, thereby reducing the manual effort required for hardware verification. NSPG is trained using sentences from several SoC documentations and achieves up to 88% accuracy for property classification, outperforming ChatGPT. When assessed on five untrained OpenTitan hardware IP documents, NSPG aided in identifying eight security vulnerabilities in the buggy OpenTitan SoC presented in Hack@DAC 2022.
items.abstract_zh: 验证复杂片上系统 (SoC) 的效率取决于所提供的安全属性的质量。使用传统方法生成安全属性通常需要专家干预，并且仅限于少数 IP，从而导致过程耗时且不稳健。为了解决这个问题，我们首次提出了一种新颖且自动化的基于自然语言处理（NLP）的安全属性生成器（NSPG）。具体来说，我们的方法利用硬件文档来提出第一个硬件安全特定语言模型 HS-BERT，用于提取专用于硬件设计的安全属性。它能够分阶段划分大量的硬件规范，并且生成的安全属性可以轻松转换为硬件断言，从而减少硬件验证所需的手动工作。 NSPG 使用多个 SoC 文档中的句子进行训练，属性分类准确率高达 88%，优于 ChatGPT。在对五个未经训练的 OpenTitan 硬件 IP 文档进行评估时，NSPG 帮助识别了 Hack@DAC 2022 中提出的有缺陷的 OpenTitan SoC 中的八个安全漏洞。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Coulomb Force-Based Routability-Driven Placement Considering Global and Local Congestion.
items.abstract: Placement is a critical stage for VLSI routability optimization. A placement engine without considering the layout congestion might lead to poor solutions with routing failures. This paper introduces a Coulomb force-based global placement framework that addresses global and local routing congestions. We first present a routing path-based cell padding strategy for local congestion mitigation. Then, we construct a routability-aware placement model that utilizes virtual Coulomb forces to eliminate crucial global congestion. Compared with a leading academic placer, RePlAce, and the advanced commercial tool, Innovus, the experimental results on industrial benchmark suites show that our proposed algorithm achieves the best routability within the shortest runtime.
items.abstract_zh: 布局是VLSI可布线性优化的关键阶段。不考虑布局拥塞的布局引擎可能会导致路由失败的不良解决方案。本文介绍了一种基于库仑力的全局布局框架，可解决全局和局部路由拥塞问题。我们首先提出一种基于路由路径的单元填充策略，用于缓解局部拥塞。然后，我们构建了一个可路由性感知的布局模型，该模型利用虚拟库仑力来消除关键的全局拥塞。与领先的学术布局器RePlAce和先进的商业工具Innovus相比，工业基准套件上的实验结果表明，我们提出的算法在最短的运行时间内实现了最佳的可布线性。

items.title: Plug Your Volt: Protecting Intel Processors against Dynamic Voltage Frequency Scaling based Fault Attacks.
items.abstract: Existing countermeasures to DVFS based fault attacks are overly restrictive because (1) they prevent benign, non-SGX processes from utilizing DVFS, and (2) rely upon a less practical threat model than that of Intel SGX. Consequently, this work proposes a new countermeasure principle to defend against DVFS based fault attacks on modern Intel systems. First, we establish that the fundamental cause of DVFS fault attacks is the ability to independently control the frequency and voltage of a processor. Using this observation, we construct a partition of frequency-voltage tuples into unsafe-safe states based on whether a tuple causes timing violations according to switching circuit theoretic principles. Our countermeasure completely prevents DVFS faults on three Intel generation CPUs: Sky Lake, Kaby Lake R, and Comet Lake. Further, it can also be deployed both as microcode or as model-specific registers at the hardware level, unlike previous countermeasures. Our countermeasure incurs a slowdown of only 0.28% on overall system performance when benchmarked against SPEC2017.
items.abstract_zh: 针对基于 DVFS 的故障攻击的现有对策过于严格，因为 (1) 它们阻止良性非 SGX 进程利用 DVFS，以及 (2) 依赖于比 Intel SGX 不太实用的威胁模型。因此，这项工作提出了一种新的对策原则来防御现代英特尔系统上基于 DVFS 的故障攻击。首先，我们确定DVFS故障攻击的根本原因是独立控制处理器频率和电压的能力。利用这一观察结果，我们根据开关电路理论原理，根据元组是否导致时序违规，将频率电压元组划分为不安全-安全状态。我们的对策完全防止了三代 Intel CPU 上的 DVFS 故障：Sky Lake、Kaby Lake R 和 Comet Lake。此外，与之前的对策不同，它还可以部署为硬件级别的微代码或特定于模型的寄存器。与 SPEC2017 进行基准测试时，我们的对策仅导致整体系统性能下降 0.28%。

items.title: FCM: A Fusion-aware Wire Cutting Approach for Measurement-based Quantum Computing.
items.abstract: Measurement-based quantum computing (MBQC) is a promising quantum computing paradigm that carries out computation through one-way measurements on entangled photon qubits. Practical photonic hardware first generates a 2D mesh of resource states with each being a small number of entangled photon qubits and then exploits fusion operations to connect resource states to scale up the computation. Given that the fusion operation is highly error-prone, it is important to reduce the number of fusions for an MBQC circuit.
items.abstract_zh: 基于测量的量子计算（MBQC）是一种有前途的量子计算范式，它通过对纠缠光子量子位的单向测量来进行计算。实用的光子硬件首先生成资源状态的二维网格，每个资源状态都是少量纠缠光子量子位，然后利用融合操作连接资源状态以扩大计算规模。鉴于融合操作非常容易出错，因此减少 MBQC 电路的融合次数非常重要。

items.title: PIVOT- Input-aware Path Selection for Energy-efficient ViT Inference.
items.abstract: The attention module in vision transformers(ViTs) performs intricate spatial correlations, contributing significantly to accuracy and delay. It is thereby important to modulate the number of attentions according to the input feature complexity for optimal delay-accuracy tradeoffs. To this end, we propose PIVOT - a co-optimization framework which selectively performs attention skipping based on the input difficulty. For this,PIVOT employs a hardware-in-loop co-search to obtain optimal attention skip configurations. Evaluations on the ZCU102 MPSoC FPGA show that PIVOT achieves 2.7× lower EDP at 0.2% accuracy reduction compared to LVViT-S ViT. PIVOT also achieves 1.3% and 1.8× higher accuracy and throughput than prior works on traditional CPUs and GPUs. The PIVOT project can be found at this Github link.
items.abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViTs）中的注意力模块执行复杂的空间相关性，对准确性和延迟有显着贡献。因此，根据输入特征复杂性来调整注意力的数量以实现最佳延迟精度权衡非常重要。为此，我们提出了 PIVOT——一种协同优化框架，它根据输入难度有选择地执行注意力跳跃。为此，PIVOT 采用硬件在环协同搜索来获得最佳的注意力跳跃配置。对 ZCU102 MPSoC FPGA 的评估表明，与 LVViT-S ViT 相比，PIVOT 的 EDP 降低了 2.7 倍，精度降低了 0.2%。与之前在传统 CPU 和 GPU 上进行的研究相比，PIVOT 的精度和吞吐量分别提高了 1.3% 和 1.8 倍。 PIVOT 项目可以在此 Github 链接中找到。

items.title: Lightator: An Optical Near-Sensor Accelerator with Compressive Acquisition Enabling Versatile Image Processing.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a high-performance and energy-efficient optical near-sensor accelerator for vision applications, called Lightator. Harnessing the promising efficiency offered by photonic devices, Lightator features innovative compressive acquisition of input frames and fine-grained convolution operations for low-power and versatile image processing at the edge for the first time. This will substantially diminish the energy consumption and latency of conversion, transmission, and processing within the established cloud-centric architecture as well as recently designed edge accelerators. Our device-to-architecture simulation results show that with favorable accuracy, Lightator achieves 84.4 Kilo FPS/W and reduces power consumption by a factor of ~24× and 73× on average compared with existing photonic accelerators and GPU baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于视觉应用的高性能、高能效光学近传感器加速器，称为 Lightator。 Lightator 利用光子器件提供的令人鼓舞的效率，首次采用输入帧的创新压缩采集和细粒度卷积运算，以实现边缘的低功耗和多功能图像处理。这将大大减少已建立的以云为中心的架构以及最近设计的边缘加速器内转换、传输和处理的能耗和延迟。我们的设备到架构仿真结果表明，与现有光子加速器和 GPU 基准相比，Lightator 具有良好的精度，可实现 84.4 Kilo FPS/W，并将功耗平均降低约 24 倍和 73 倍。

items.title: Alchemist: A Unified Accelerator Architecture for Cross-Scheme Fully Homomorphic Encryption.
items.abstract: The use of cross-scheme fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) in privacy-preserving applications present to be a new challenge to hardware accelerator design. Existing accelerator architectures with customized polynomial-level operator abstraction fail to efficiently handle hybrid FHE schemes due to the mismatch between computational demands and available hardware resources under various parameter settings. In this work, we propose a new accelerator architecture that consists of a novel finer-grained low-level operator, i.e., Meta-OP, that not only mathematically supports a diverse range of polynomial operations, but is also hardware-friendly for accelerator design without complex topological logic. We then design a new slot-based data management scheme to efficiently handle the distinct memory access patterns over the Meta-OP. With a slot-based data management approach, Alchemist can accelerate both arithmetic and logic FHE workloads with high hardware utilization rates. In the experiment, we show that Alchemist is up to 24,829X faster than CPU. For arithmetic FHE, compared with the SOTA ASIC accelerators, Alchemist achieves a 29.4X performance per area improvement on average. For logic FHE, compared with the SOTA ASIC accelerators, Alchemist achieves a 7.0X overall speed up on average.
items.abstract_zh: 在隐私保护应用中使用跨方案全同态加密（FHE）对硬件加速器设计提出了新的挑战。由于各种参数设置下计算需求与可用硬件资源之间的不匹配，具有定制多项式级算子抽象的现有加速器架构无法有效地处理混合 FHE 方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的加速器架构，它由一种新颖的更细粒度的低级运算符（即 Meta-OP）组成，它不仅在数学上支持各种多项式运算，而且对于加速器设计来说也是硬件友好的，无需复杂的拓扑逻辑。然后，我们设计了一种新的基于槽的数据管理方案，以有效地处理 Meta-OP 上不同的内存访问模式。通过基于槽的数据管理方法，Alchemist 可以加速算术和逻辑 FHE 工作负载，并具有较高的硬件利用率。在实验中，我们表明 Alchemist 的速度比 CPU 快 24,829 倍。对于算术 FHE，与 SOTA ASIC 加速器相比，Alchemist 平均每面积性能提高了 29.4 倍。对于逻辑 FHE，与 SOTA ASIC 加速器相比，Alchemist 平均实现了 7.0 倍的整体加速。

items.title: Architectural Whispers: Robust Machine Learning Models Fingerprinting via Frequency Throttling Side-Channels.
items.abstract: Machine Learning (ML) security practices include hiding ML model architectures to protect intellectual property and prevent attacks. We introduce a novel fingerprinting attack using frequency throttling-based Side-Channel Attack (SCA) to detect an ML model's architecture family by converting power side-channel data into timing variations. This method involves using adversary kernels and a time series ML classifier to discern the architecture from execution time patterns during model operation. We achieved up to 96% accuracy in identifying known ML models' architecture families under Ring 0 privileges and we demonstrated its effectiveness across different platforms. Moreover, our code is publicly available 1.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 安全实践包括隐藏 ML 模型架构以保护知识产权并防止攻击。我们引入了一种新颖的指纹识别攻击，使用基于频率限制的侧通道攻击 (SCA)，通过将功率侧通道数据转换为时序变化来检测 ML 模型的架构系列。该方法涉及使用对手内核和时间序列 ML 分类器来从模型操作期间的执行时间模式中辨别架构。我们在 Ring 0 权限下识别已知 ML 模型架构系列的准确率高达 96%，并且在不同平台上展示了​​其有效性。此外，我们的代码是公开的1。

items.title: Invited: The Magnificent Seven Challenges and Opportunities in Domain-Specific Accelerator Design for Autonomous Systems.
items.abstract: The end of Moore's Law and Dennard Scaling has combined with advances in agile hardware design to foster a golden age of domain-specific acceleration. However, this new frontier of computing opportunities is not without pitfalls. As computer architects approach unfamiliar domains, we have seen common themes emerge in the challenges that can hinder progress in the development of useful acceleration. In this work, we present the Magnificent Seven Challenges in domain-specific accelerator design that can guide adventurous architects to contribute meaningfully to novel application domains. Although these challenges appear across domains ranging from ML to genomics, we examine them through the lens of autonomous systems as a motivating example in this work. To that end, we identify opportunities for the path forward in a successful domain-specific accelerator design from these challenges.
items.abstract_zh: 摩尔定律和登纳德缩放比例的终结与敏捷硬件设计的进步相结合，催生了特定领域加速的黄金时代。然而，这一新的计算机会领域并非没有陷阱。当计算机架构师进入不熟悉的领域时，我们看到在挑战中出现了共同的主题，这些挑战可能会阻碍有用加速的开发进展。在这项工作中，我们提出了特定领域加速器设计中的七大挑战，可以指导富有冒险精神的架构师为新颖的应用领域做出有意义的贡献。尽管这些挑战出现在从机器学习到基因组学的各个领域，但我们通过自主系统的视角来研究它们，作为这项工作的激励示例。为此，我们从这些挑战中确定了成功的特定领域加速器设计的前进道路的机会。

items.title: S2RAM PUF: An Ultra-low Power Subthreshold SRAM PUF with Zero Bit Error Rate.
items.abstract: The reliability of physical unclonable function (PUF) has become the biggest challenge for key generation. Existing reliability improvement technologies incur high hardware overhead or testing costs. This paper proposes S2RAM-PUF, a novel, highly reliable and energy-efficient subthreshold SRAM PUF fabricated in 65nm process, with zero bit error rate (BER) across all voltage/temperature corners from 0.5V to 0.8V and from -40°C to 120°C. The 20480 bits generated by the fabricated 5 S2RAM PUF chips pass the NIST 800-22 randomness test and exhibit almost ideal uniqueness with a mean inter-die hamming distance of 0.5007. The total energy per bit is as low as 3.12fJ at 0.5V supply voltage. Both stabilization BER and energy outperform the two state-of-the-art SRAM-type PUFs reported in JSSC 2020 and 2021.
items.abstract_zh: 物理不可克隆功能（PUF）的可靠性已成为密钥生成的最大挑战。现有的可靠性改进技术会带来较高的硬件开销或测试成本。本文提出了 S2RAM-PUF，这是一种采用 65nm 工艺制造的新型、高度可靠且节能的亚阈值 SRAM PUF，在 0.5V 至 0.8V 以及 -40°C 至 120°C 的所有电压/温度范围内具有零误码率 (BER)。所制造的 5 个 S2RAM PUF 芯片生成的 20480 位通过了 NIST 800-22 随机性测试，并表现出几乎理想的唯一性，平均芯片间汉明距离为 0.5007。在 0.5V 电源电压下，每位总能量低至 3.12fJ。稳定性 BER 和能量均优于 JSSC 2020 和 2021 中报告的两种最先进的 SRAM 型 PUF。

items.title: Effective Quantum Resource Optimization via Circuit Resizing in BQSKit.
items.abstract: In the noisy intermediate-scale quantum era, mid-circuit measurement and reset operations facilitate novel circuit optimization strategies by reducing a circuit's qubit count in a method called resizing. This paper introduces two such algorithms. The first one leverages gate-dependency rules to reduce qubit count by 61.6% or 45.3% when optimizing depth as well. Based on numerical instantiation and synthesis, the second algorithm finds resizing opportunities in previously unresizable circuits via dependency rules and other state-of-the-art tools. This resizing algorithm, implemented in BQSKit, reduces qubit count by 20.7% on average for these previously impossible-to-resize circuits.
items.abstract_zh: 在嘈杂的中规模量子时代，中间电路测量和重置操作通过一种称为调整大小的方法减少电路的量子位计数，从而促进新颖的电路优化策略。本文介绍了两种这样的算法。第一个在优化深度时也利用门依赖规则将量子位数量减少 61.6% 或 45.3%。基于数值实例化和综合，第二种算法通过依赖规则和其他最先进的工具在以前不可调整的电路中找到调整大小的机会。这种在 BQSKit 中实现的大小调整算法将这些以前无法调整大小的电路的量子位数量平均减少了 20.7%。

items.title: Control Flow Divergence Optimization by Exploiting Tensor Cores.
items.abstract: Kernels are scheduled on Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) in the granularity of GPU warp, which is a bunch of threads that must be scheduled together. When executing kernels with conditional branches, the threads within a warp may execute different branches sequentially, resulting in a considerable utilization loss and unpredictable execution time. This problem is known as the control flow divergence. In this work, we propose a novel method to predict threads' execution path before the launch of the kernel by deploying a branch prediction network on the GPU's tensor cores, which can efficiently parallel run with the kernels on CUDA cores, so that the divergence problem can be eased in a large extent with the lowest overhead. Combined with a well-designed thread data reorganization algorithm, this solution can better mitigate GPUs' control flow divergence problem.
items.abstract_zh: 内核以 GPU warp 的粒度在图形处理单元 (GPU) 上进行调度，GPU warp 是一堆必须一起调度的线程。当执行带有条件分支的内核时，warp 内的线程可能会顺序执行不同的分支，从而导致相当大的利用率损失和不可预测的执行时间。这个问题被称为控制流发散。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种在内核启动之前预测线程执行路径的新方法，通过在 GPU 张量核心上部署分支预测网络，可以与 CUDA 核心上的内核高效地并行运行，从而可以以最低的开销在很大程度上缓解发散问题。结合精心设计的线程数据重组算法，该解决方案可以更好地缓解GPU的控制流发散问题。

items.title: Finding Bugs in RTL Descriptions: High-Level Synthesis to the Rescue.
items.abstract: Most Register Transfer Level (RTL) designs originate from behavioral descriptions specified in C or C++ often written by Software (SW) designers. Hardware (HW) designers then manually describe an efficient hardware implementation of that application using a Hardware Description Language (HDL) like Verilog or VHDL. Although it has been shown that High-Level Synthesis (HLS) provides a direct path to synthesizing these behavioral descriptions into RTL, the quality of the generated RTL is often still unacceptable, hence, requiring to manually design the HW. This is nevertheless time consuming and error prone. In particular, finding bugs introduced in the manual design is very tedious as HW designers rely on long simulations that generate large waveforms that have to be thoroughly scrutinized.
items.abstract_zh: 大多数寄存器传输级 (RTL) 设计源自通常由软件 (SW) 设计人员编写的 C 或 C++ 中指定的行为描述。然后，硬件 (HW) 设计人员使用 Verilog 或 VHDL 等硬件描述语言 (HDL) 手动描述该应用程序的高效硬件实现。尽管已经证明高级综合（HLS）提供了将这些行为描述综合到 RTL 中的直接途径，但生成的 RTL 的质量通常仍然不可接受，因此需要手动设计 HW。然而，这既耗时又容易出错。特别是，查找手动设计中引入的错误非常繁琐，因为硬件设计人员依赖于长时间的仿真，生成必须彻底检查的大型波形。

items.title: Token-Picker: Accelerating Attention in Text Generation with Minimized Memory Transfer via Probability Estimation.
items.abstract: The attention mechanism in text generation is memory-bounded due to its sequential characteristics. Therefore, off-chip memory accesses should be minimized for faster execution. Although previous methods addressed this by pruning unimportant tokens, they fall short in selectively removing tokens with near-zero attention probabilities in each instance. Our method estimates the probability before the softmax function, effectively removing low probability tokens and achieving an 12.1x pruning ratio without fine-tuning. Additionally, we present a hardware design supporting seamless on-demand off-chip access. Our approach shows 2.6x reduced memory accesses, leading to an average 2.3x speedup and a 2.4x energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 文本生成中的注意力机制由于其顺序特征而受到内存限制。因此，应尽量减少片外存储器访问以加快执行速度。尽管以前的方法通过修剪不重要的标记来解决这个问题，但它们在选择性地删除每个实例中注意力概率接近于零的标记方面存在不足。我们的方法在 softmax 函数之前估计概率，有效地去除低概率标记，并在无需微调的情况下实现 12.1 倍的剪枝率。此外，我们还提出了一种支持无缝按需片外访问的硬件设计。我们的方法显示内存访问量减少了 2.6 倍，从而实现平均 2.3 倍的加速和 2.4 倍的能源效率。

items.title: HiLight: A Comprehensive Framework for High-Performance and Lightweight Scalability in Surface Code Communication.
items.abstract: In pursuing fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC), the surface code (SC) serves as a key quantum error correction protocol. The double-defect mode of the SC enables long-range two-qubit communication via braiding. However, intersecting braiding paths create communication bottlenecks, leading to increased circuit latency.
items.abstract_zh: 在追求容错量子计算（FTQC）时，表面代码（SC）是关键的量子纠错协议。 SC 的双缺陷模式可通过编织实现远距离两个量子位通信。然而，交叉的编织路径会产生通信瓶颈，导致电路延迟增加。

items.title: Accelerating DTCO with a Sample-Efficient Active Learning Framework for TCAD Device Modeling.
items.abstract: Design-Technology Co-Optimization (DTCO) can be significantly accelerated by employing Neural Compact Models (NCMs). However, the effective deployment of NCMs requires a substantial amount of training data for accurate device modeling. This paper introduces an Active Learning (AL) framework designed to enhance the efficiency of both device modeling and process optimization, particularly addressing the challenges of time-intensive Technology Computer-Aided Design (TCAD) simulations. The framework employs a ranking algorithm that assesses metrics such as the expected variance from the neural tangent kernel (NTK), TCAD simulation time, and the complexity of I-V curves. This strategy considerably reduces the number of required simulations while maintaining high accuracy. Demonstrating the effectiveness of our AL framework, we achieved a 28.5% improvement in MSE within a 30-minute time budget for device modeling, and an 86.7% reduction in the data points required for process optimization of a 51-stage ring oscillator (RO). These results offer a streamlined, adaptable solution for rapid device modeling and process optimization in various DTCO applications.
items.abstract_zh: 通过采用神经紧凑模型 (NCM) 可以显着加速设计技术协同优化 (DTCO)。然而，NCM 的有效部署需要大量的训练数据来进行准确的设备建模。本文介绍了一种主动学习（AL）框架，旨在提高设备建模和流程优化的效率，特别是解决时间密集型技术计算机辅助设计（TCAD）模拟的挑战。该框架采用排名算法来评估神经正切核 (NTK) 的预期方差、TCAD 模拟时间和 I-V 曲线的复杂性等指标。该策略大大减少了所需模拟的数量，同时保持了高精度。为了证明我们的 AL 框架的有效性，我们在器件建模的 30 分钟时间预算内实现了 MSE 提高了 28.5%，并且 51 级环形振荡器 (RO) 流程优化所需的数据点减少了 86.7%。这些结果为各种 DTCO 应用中的快速设备建模和流程优化提供了简化、适应性强的解决方案。

items.title: Lesyn: Placement-aware Logic Resynthesis for Non-Integer Multiple-Cell-Height Designs.
items.abstract: Non-integer multiple cell height (NIMCH) standard-cell libraries offer promising co-optimization for power, performance and area in advanced technology nodes. However, such non-uniform design introduces new layout constraints where any sub-region can only accommodate gates of the same cell height due to manufacturability concerns. The existing physical design flow for NIMCH circuits, which handles the layout constraint by clustering and relocating gates according to their cell heights, often leads to substantial gate displacement that harms circuit performance. To alleviate the above issue, this paper proposes a row-based logic resynthesis procedure that explicitly adjusts cell heights after initial placement without changing cell positions. Experiment results demonstrate that compared with the conventional NIMCH physical design flow, our proposed approach can reduce the maximal delay by 26.1%.
items.abstract_zh: 非整数倍单元高度 (NIMCH) 标准单元库为先进技术节点中的功耗、性能和面积提供了有前景的协同优化。然而，这种不均匀的设计引入了新的布局限制，由于可制造性问题，任何子区域只能容纳相同单元高度的栅极。 NIMCH 电路的现有物理设计流程通过根据单元高度对栅极进行聚类和重新定位来处理布局约束，通常会导致严重的栅极位移，从而损害电路性能。为了缓解上述问题，本文提出了一种基于行的逻辑再综合过程，该过程在初始放置后显式调整单元高度，而不改变单元位置。实验结果表明，与传统的NIMCH物理设计流程相比，我们提出的方法可以将最大延迟降低26.1%。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: LLM-assisted Automated Incremental Proof Generation for Hardware Verification.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose a methodology for hardware verification assisted by Large Language Models (LLMs) in the incremental proof generation process. First, an LLM identifies the basic module of the Design Under Verification (DUV), followed by expanding the proof scope as more modules are added. LLMs assist in defining and verifying invariants for each module using the Z3 solver, and in formulating integration properties at module interfaces. Our case studies on a Ripple Carry Adder (RCA) and a Dadda Tree Multiplier (DTM) demonstrate that LLMs enhance the efficiency and accuracy of hardware verification.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种在增量证明生成过程中由大型语言模型（LLM）辅助的硬件验证方法。首先，法学硕士确定验证设计（DUV）的基本模块，然后随着更多模块的添加而扩大证明范围。 LLM 协助使用 Z3 求解器定义和验证每个模块的不变量，并在模块接口处制定集成属性。我们对纹波进位加法器 (RCA) 和 Dada 树乘法器 (DTM) 的案例研究表明，LLM 提高了硬件验证的效率和准确性。

items.title: C-Nash: A Novel Ferroelectric Computing-in-Memory Architecture for Solving Mixed Strategy Nash Equilibrium.
items.abstract: The concept of Nash equilibrium (NE), pivotal within game theory, has garnered widespread attention across numerous industries. However, verifying the existence of NE poses a significant computational challenge, classified as an NP-complete problem. Recent advancements introduced several quantum Nash solvers aimed at identifying pure strategy NE solutions (i.e., binary solutions) by integrating slack terms into the objective function, commonly referred to as slack-quadratic unconstrained binary optimization (S-QUBO). However, incorporation of slack terms into the quadratic optimization results in changes of the objective function, which may cause incorrect solutions. Furthermore, these quantum solvers only identify a limited subset of pure strategy NE solutions, and fail to address mixed strategy NE (i.e., decimal solutions), leaving many solutions undiscovered. In this work, we propose C-Nash, a novel ferroelectric computing-in-memory (CiM) architecture that can efficiently handle both pure and mixed strategy NE solutions. The proposed architecture consists of (i) a transformation method that converts quadratic optimization into a MAX-QUBO form without introducing additional slack variables, thereby avoiding objective function changes; (ii) a ferroelectric FET (FeFET) based bi-crossbar structure for storing payoff matrices and accelerating the core vector-matrix-vector (VMV) multiplications of QUBO form; (iii) A winner-takes-all (WTA) tree implementing the MAX form and a two-phase based simulated annealing (SA) logic for searching NE solutions. Evaluations show that C-Nash has up to 68.6% increase in the success rate for identifying NE solutions, finding all pure and mixed NE solutions rather than only a portion of pure NE solutions, compared to D-Wave based quantum approaches. Moreover, C-Nash boasts a reduction up to 157.9X/79.0X in time-to-solutions compared to D-Wave 2000 Q6 and D-Wave Advantage 4.1, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 纳什均衡（NE）的概念在博弈论中至关重要，已经引起了众多行业的广泛关注。然而，验证 NE 的存在提出了重大的计算挑战，被归类为 NP 完全问题。最近的进展引入了几种量子纳什求解器，旨在通过将松弛项集成到目标函数中来识别纯策略 NE 解决方案（即二元解决方案），通常称为松弛二次无约束二元优化（S-QUBO）。然而，将松弛项纳入二次优化会导致目标函数发生变化，从而可能导致解不正确。此外，这些量子求解器仅识别纯策略 NE 解的有限子集，而无法解决混合策略 NE（即十进制解），从而导致许多解未被发现。在这项工作中，我们提出了 C-Nash，一种新颖的铁电内存计算 (CiM) 架构，可以有效地处理纯策略 NE 解决方案和混合策略 NE 解决方案。所提出的架构包括（i）一种变换方法，将二次优化转换为 MAX-QUBO 形式，无需引入额外的松弛变量，从而避免目标函数的变化； (ii) 基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的双交叉结构，用于存储支付矩阵并加速 QUBO 形式的核心向量-矩阵-向量 (VMV) 乘法； (iii) 实现 MAX 形式的赢者通吃 (WTA) 树和用于搜索 NE 解的基于两阶段的模拟退火 (SA) 逻辑。评估表明，与基于 D-Wave 的量子方法相比，C-Nash 识别 NE 解的成功率提高了 68.6%，找到了所有纯 NE 解和混合 NE 解，而不是仅部分纯 NE 解。此外，与 D-Wave 2000 Q6 和 D-Wave Advantage 4.1 相比，C-Nash 的解决方案时间分别缩短了 157.9 倍/79.0 倍。

items.title: HyCiM: A Hybrid Computing-in-Memory QUBO Solver for General Combinatorial Optimization Problems with Inequality Constraints.
items.abstract: Computationally challenging combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) play a fundamental role in various applications. To tackle COPs, many Ising machines and Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) solvers have been proposed, which typically involve direct transformation of COPs into Ising models or equivalent QUBO forms (D-QUBO). However, when addressing COPs with inequality constraints, this D-QUBO approach introduces numerous extra auxiliary variables, resulting in a substantially larger search space, increased hardware costs, and reduced solving efficiency. In this work, we propose HyCiM, a novel hybrid computing-inmemory (CiM) based QUBO solver framework, designed to overcome aforementioned challenges. The proposed framework consists of (i) an innovative transformation method (first to our known) that converts COPs with inequality constraints into an inequality-QUBO form, thus eliminating the need of expensive auxiliary variables and associated calculations; (ii) "inequality filter", a ferroelectric FET (FeFET)-based CiM circuit that accelerates the inequality evaluation, and filters out infeasible input configurations; (iii) a FeFET-based CiM annealer that is capable of approaching global solutions of COPs via iterative QUBO computations within a simulated annealing process. The evaluation results show that HyCiM drastically narrows down the search space, eliminating 2100 to 22536 infeasible input configurations compared to the conventional D-QUBO approach. Consequently, the narrowed search space, reduced to 2100 feasible input configurations, leads to a substantial hardware area overhead reduction, ranging from 88.06% to 99.96%. Additionally, HyCiM consistently exhibits a high solving efficiency, achieving a remarkable average success rate of 98.54%, whereas D-QUBO implementatoin shows only 10.75%.
items.abstract_zh: 具有计算挑战性的组合优化问题 (COP) 在各种应用中发挥着基础作用。为了解决 COP，人们提出了许多 Ising 机和二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO) 求解器，它们通常涉及将 COP 直接转换为 Ising 模型或等效 QUBO 形式 (D-QUBO)。然而，在解决具有不等式约束的 COP 时，这种 D-QUBO 方法引入了许多额外的辅助变量，导致搜索空间显着增大，硬件成本增加，求解效率降低。在这项工作中，我们提出了 HyCiM，一种基于内存混合计算 (CiM) 的 QUBO 求解器框架，旨在克服上述挑战。所提出的框架包括（i）一种创新的转换方法（据我们所知第一个），将具有不等式约束的 COP 转换为不等式 QUBO 形式，从而消除了昂贵的辅助变量和相关计算的需要； (ii)“不等式滤波器”，一种基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 的 CiM 电路，可加速不等式评估，并滤除不可行的输入配置； (iii) 基于 FeFET 的 CiM 退火器，能够通过模拟退火过程中的迭代 QUBO 计算来接近 COP 的全局解。评估结果表明，与传统的 D-QUBO 方法相比，HyCiM 极大地缩小了搜索空间，消除了 2100 至 22536 个不可行的输入配置。因此，缩小的搜索空间减少到 2100 个可行的输入配置，导致硬件面积开销大幅减少，范围从 88.06% 到 99.96%。此外，HyCiM 始终表现出较高的求解效率，平均成功率高达 98.54%，而 D-QUBO 实现仅显示 10.75%。

items.title: GNNavigator: Towards Adaptive Training of Graph Neural Networks via Automatic Guideline Exploration.
items.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) succeed significantly in many applications recently. However, balancing GNNs training runtime cost, memory consumption, and attainable accuracy for various applications is non-trivial. Previous training methodologies suffer from inferior adaptability and lack a unified training optimization solution. To address the problem, this work proposes GNNavigator, an adaptive GNN training configuration optimization framework. GN-Navigator meets diverse GNN application requirements due to our unified software-hardware co-abstraction, proposed GNNs training performance model, and practical design space exploration solution. Experimental results show that GNNavigator can achieve up to 3.1× speedup and 44.9% peak memory reduction with comparable accuracy to state-of-the-art approaches.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）最近在许多应用中取得了巨大成功。然而，平衡 GNN 训练运行时成本、内存消耗和各种应用程序可达到的准确性并非易事。以往的训练方法适应性较差，缺乏统一的训练优化方案。为了解决这个问题，这项工作提出了 GNNavigator，一种自适应 GNN 训练配置优化框架。由于我们统一的软硬件联合抽象、提出的 GNN 训练性能模型和实用的设计空间探索解决方案，GN-Navigator 满足了多样化的 GNN 应用需求。实验结果表明，GNNavigator 可以实现高达 3.1 倍的加速和 44.9% 的峰值内存减少，且精度与最先进的方法相当。

items.title: Minimizing Labeling, Maximizing Performance: A Novel Approach to Nanoscale Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) Defect Segmentation.
items.abstract: In semiconductor manufacturing, pinpointing nanoscale wafer defects is crucial for yield and reliability. Deep learning methods for defect segmentation rely heavily on large, labor-intensive datasets and focus mainly on macroscopic wafer defects, not nanoscale morphology. Our research introduces a hybrid weakly supervised scanning electron microscope (SEM) defect segmentation system with two sub-networks: one for accurate defect localization and image cropping, another for detailed segmentation. Validated on 1,328 SEM image defects from a real facility, our model surpasses existing weakly supervised methods and equals fully supervised models in accuracy, with 10% labeling effort, providing a novel approach for high-precision defect segmentation.
items.abstract_zh: 在半导体制造中，精确定位纳米级晶圆缺陷对于产量和可靠性至关重要。用于缺陷分割的深度学习方法严重依赖于大型、劳动密集型数据集，并且主要关注宏观晶圆缺陷，而不是纳米级形态。我们的研究引入了一种混合弱监督扫描电子显微镜（SEM）缺陷分割系统，该系统具有两个子网络：一个用于精确的缺陷定位和图像裁剪，另一个用于详细分割。我们的模型在真实设施中对 1,328 个 SEM 图像缺陷进行了验证，其精度超越了现有的弱监督方法，与完全监督模型相当，标记工作量减少了 10%，为高精度缺陷分割提供了一种新颖的方法。

items.title: Reducing DRAM Latency via In-situ Temperature- and Process-Variation-Aware Timing Detection and Adaption.
items.abstract: Long DRAM access latency has a significant impact on modern system performance. However, the improvement of DRAM access latency is limited, as the DRAM vendors reserve considerable timing margins against seldom worst-case conditions. To mitigate such pessimistic timing margins, we propose a temperature- and process-variation-aware timing detection and adaption DRAM (TPDA-DRAM) architecture. It equips in-situ cross-coupled detectors to monitor the voltage difference between bitline pairs, enabling estimation of timing margins caused by process and temperature variations. Moreover, TPDA-DRAM incorporates two collaborative timing adaption schemes: 1) a process-variation-aware timing adaption scheme (PVA) that selectively accelerates the access to weak cells, and 2) a temperature-variation-aware timing adaption scheme (TVA) that precisely adjusts timing parameters by adopting temperature information. Compared to prior art, the proposed detector reduces detection deviation by 54.8% and area overhead by 88.1%. The system-level evaluation in an eight-core system shows that TPDA-DRAM improves the average performance and energy efficiency by 20.5% and 15.0%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 较长的 DRAM 访问延迟对现代系统性能具有重大影响。然而，DRAM 访问延迟的改善是有限的，因为 DRAM 供应商为很少出现的最坏情况条件保留了相当大的时序裕度。为了缓解这种悲观的时序裕度，我们提出了一种温度和工艺变化感知时序检测和自适应 DRAM (TPDA-DRAM) 架构。它配备了原位交叉耦合检测器来监控位线对之间的电压差，从而能够估计由工艺和温度变化引起的时序裕度。此外，TPDA-DRAM还采用了两种协作时序自适应方案：1）选择性地加速对弱单元的访问的工艺变化感知时序自适应方案（PVA），以及2）通过采用温度信息精确调整时序参数的温度变化感知时序自适应方案（TVA）。与现有技术相比，所提出的检测器将检测偏差减少了54.8%，将面积开销减少了88.1%。在八核系统中的系统级评估表明，TPDA-DRAM的平均性能和能效分别提高了20.5%和15.0%。

items.title: Enabling On-Device Large Language Model Personalization with Self-Supervised Data Selection and Synthesis.
items.abstract: After a large language model (LLM) is deployed on edge devices, it is desirable for these devices to learn from user-generated conversation data to generate user-specific and personalized responses in real-time. However, user-generated data usually contains sensitive and private information, and uploading such data to the cloud for annotation is not preferred if not prohibited. While it is possible to obtain annotation locally by directly asking users to provide preferred responses, such annotations have to be sparse to not affect user experience. In addition, the storage of edge devices is usually too limited to enable large-scale fine-tuning with full user-generated data. It remains an open question how to enable on-device LLM personalization, considering sparse annotation and limited on-device storage. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to select and store the most representative data online in a self-supervised way. Such data has a small memory footprint and allows infrequent requests of user annotations for further fine-tuning. To enhance fine-tuning quality, multiple semantically similar pairs of question texts and expected responses are generated using the LLM. Our experiments show that the proposed framework achieves the best user-specific content-generating capability (accuracy) and fine-tuning speed (performance) compared with vanilla baselines. To the best of our knowledge, this is the very first on-device LLM personalization framework.
items.abstract_zh: 在边缘设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 后，这些设备需要从用户生成的对话数据中学习，以实时生成特定于用户的个性化响应。然而，用户生成的数据通常包含敏感和隐私信息，如果不禁止，则不建议将此类数据上传到云端进行注释。虽然可以通过直接要求用户提供首选响应来在本地获取注释，但此类注释必须稀疏，以免影响用户体验。此外，边缘设备的存储通常非常有限，无法利用完整的用户生成数据进行大规模微调。考虑到稀疏注释和有限的设备存储，如何实现设备上的 LLM 个性化仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，以自我监督的方式在线选择和存储最具代表性的数据。此类数据的内存占用较小，并且允许不频繁地请求用户注释以进行进一步微调。为了提高微调质量，使用 LLM 生成多个语义相似的问题文本对和预期响应。我们的实验表明，与普通基线相比，所提出的框架实现了最佳的用户特定内容生成能力（准确性）和微调速度（性能）。据我们所知，这是第一个设备上的 LLM 个性化框架。

items.title: MSMAC: Accelerating Multi-Scalar Multiplication for Zero-Knowledge Proof.
items.abstract: Multi-scalar multiplication (MSM) is the most computation-intensive part in proof generation of Zero-knowledge proof (ZKP). In this paper, we propose MSMAC, an FPGA accelerator for large-scale MSM. MSMAC adopts a specially designed Instruction Set Architecture (ISA) for MSM and optimizes pipelined Point Addition Unit (PAU) with hybrid Karatsuba multiplier. Moreover, a runtime system is proposed to split MSM tasks with the optimal sub-task size and orchestrate execution of Processing Elements (PEs). Experimental results show that MSMAC achieves up to 328X and 1.96X speedups compared to the state-of-the-art implementation on CPU (one core) and GPU, respectively, outperforming the state-of-the-art ASIC accelerator by 1.79X. On 4 FPGAs, MSMAC performs 1,261X faster than a single CPU core.
items.abstract_zh: 多标量乘法（MSM）是零知识证明（ZKP）证明生成中计算最密集的部分。在本文中，我们提出了 MSMAC，一种用于大规模 MSM 的 FPGA 加速器。 MSMAC采用专门为MSM设计的指令集架构（ISA），并通过混合Karatsuba乘法器优化流水线点加法单元（PAU）。此外，还提出了一个运行时系统，以最佳子任务大小分割 MSM 任务，并编排处理元件（PE）的执行。实验结果表明，与 CPU（单核）和 GPU 上最先进的实现相比，MSMAC 分别实现了高达 328 倍和 1.96 倍的加速，比最先进的 ASIC 加速器高出 1.79 倍。在 4 个 FPGA 上，MSMAC 的执行速度比单个 CPU 内核快 1,261 倍。

items.title: DeepRIoT: Continuous Integration and Deployment of Robotic-IoT Applications.
items.abstract: We present DeepRIoT, a continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) based architecture that accelerates the learning and deployment of a Robotic-IoT system trained from deep reinforcement learning (RL). We adopted a multi-stage approach that agilely trains a multi-objective RL controller in the simulator. We then collected traces from the real robot to optimize its plant model, and used transfer learning to adapt the controller to the updated model. We automated our framework through CI/CD pipelines, and finally, with low cost, succeeded in deploying our controller in a real F1tenth car that is able to reach the goal and avoid collision from a virtual car through mixed reality.
items.abstract_zh: 我们推出 DeepRIoT，这是一种基于持续集成和持续部署 (CI/CD) 的架构，可加速通过深度强化学习 (RL) 训练的机器人物联网系统的学习和部署。我们采用了多阶段方法，可以在模拟器中灵活地训练多目标 RL 控制器。然后，我们从真实机器人收集痕迹来优化其工厂模型，并使用迁移学习使控制器适应更新的模型。我们通过 CI/CD 管道自动化了我们的框架，最终以低成本成功地将我们的控制器部署在一辆真正的 F1tenth 汽车上，该汽车能够通过混合现实达到目标并避免虚拟汽车的碰撞。

items.title: DACPara: A Divide-and-Conquer Parallel Approach for High-Quality Logic Rewriting in Large-Scale Circuits.
items.abstract: Logic rewriting is a critical and time-consuming task in logic synthesis, which determines the area and delay of the synthesized circuit. However, existing parallel solutions for this task suffer from limitations in terms of runtime or quality in large-scale complex circuits. In this paper, we propose a divide-and-conquer parallel approach namely DACPara for high-quality logic rewriting in large-scale circuits. Specifically, after nodes in AIG are divided in each level, dynamic global information is considered to divide and conquer rewriting into three stages for parallel processing. Experiments show that DACPara using 40 CPU physical cores can be 34.36x and 1.96x faster than logic rewriting in ABC and the state-of-the-art CPU parallel method on large benchmarks, respectively, with extremely comparable quality of result. Also, for large-scale complex benchmarks, compared with state-of-the-art GPU accelerated method ours can achieve 1.1% quality improvement.
items.abstract_zh: 逻辑重写是逻辑综合中一项关键且耗时的任务，它决定了综合电路的面积和延迟。然而，该任务的现有并行解决方案在大规模复杂电路中的运行时间或质量方面受到限制。在本文中，我们提出了一种分而治之的并行方法，即 DACPara，用于大规模电路中的高质量逻辑重写。具体来说，AIG中的节点进行各级划分后，考虑动态全局信息，将重写分为三个阶段进行并行处理。实验表明，在大型基准测试中，使用 40 个 CPU 物理核心的 DACPara 分别比 ABC 中的逻辑重写和最先进的 CPU 并行方法快 34.36 倍和 1.96 倍，并且结果质量极其可比。此外，对于大规模复杂的基准测试，与最先进的 GPU 加速方法相比，我们的质量可以实现 1.1% 的提升。

items.title: Trapped by Your WORDs: (Ab)using Processor Exception for Generic Binary Instrumentation on Bare-metal Embedded Devices.
items.abstract: Analyzing the security of closed-source drivers and libraries in embedded systems holds significant importance, given their fundamental role in the supply chain. Unlike x86, embedded platforms lack comprehensive binary manipulating tools, making it difficult for researchers and developers to effectively detect and patch security issues in such closed-source components. Existing works either depend on full-fledged operating system features or suffer from tedious corner cases, restricting their application to bare-metal firmware prevalent in embedded environments.
items.abstract_zh: 鉴于嵌入式系统中的闭源驱动程序和库在供应链中的基本作用，分析它们的安全性具有重要意义。与 x86 不同，嵌入式平台缺乏全面的二进制操作工具，这使得研究人员和开发人员很难有效地检测和修补此类闭源组件中的安全问题。现有的工作要么依赖于成熟的操作系统功能，要么受到繁琐的极端情况的影响，将其应用限制在嵌入式环境中普遍存在的裸机固件上。

items.title: CLUMAP: Clustered Mapper for CGRAs with Predication.
items.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable architectures (CGRAs) have gained popularity as accelerators for compute-intensive kernels. Complex CGRA architectures that support key features such as multi-context and predication are being developed to support a wider range of kernels. However, mapping applications on these complex architectures poses significant challenges. In this paper, we provide an architecture-agnostic clustered mapping technique and a new cost function tailored for simulated-annealing placement. The mapper simplifies placement and routing phases, demonstrating significant speedup for popular CGRA architectures: HyCUBE and ADRES. Additionally, our method demonstrates an increase in mapping success for the ADRES architecture.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构架构 (CGRA) 作为计算密集型内核的加速器而广受欢迎。支持多上下文和预测等关键功能的复杂 CGRA 架构正在开发中，以支持更广泛的内核。然而，在这些复杂的架构上映射应用程序带来了巨大的挑战。在本文中，我们提供了一种与架构无关的集群映射技术和一种为模拟退火布局量身定制的新成本函数。该映射器简化了布局和布线阶段，展示了流行的 CGRA 架构（HyCUBE 和 ADRES）的显着加速。此外，我们的方法表明 ADRES 架构的映射成功率有所提高。

items.title: Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design of Distribution-Aware Logarithmic-Posit Encodings for Efficient DNN Inference.
items.abstract: Traditional Deep Neural Network (DNN) quantization methods using integer or floating-point data types struggle to capture diverse DNN parameter distributions and often require large silicon overhead and intensive quantization-aware training. In this study, we introduce Logarithmic Posits (LP), an adaptive, hardware-friendly data type inspired by posits that dynamically adapts to DNN weight/activation distributions by parameterizing LP bit fields. We also develop a novel genetic-algorithm based framework, LP Quantization (LPQ), to find optimal layer-wise LP parameters while reducing representational divergence between quantized and full-precision models through a novel global-local contrastive objective. Additionally, we design a LP accelerator (LPA) architecture comprising of mixed-precision LP processing elements (PEs). Our algorithmhardware co-design demonstrates on average <1% drop in top-1 accuracy across various CNN and ViT models. It also achieves ~ 2× improvements in performance per unit area and 2.2× gains in energy efficiency compared to state-of-the-art quantization accelerators using different data types.
items.abstract_zh: 使用整数或浮点数据类型的传统深度神经网络 (DNN) 量化方法很难捕获不同的 DNN 参数分布，并且通常需要大量的芯片开销和密集的量化感知训练。在本研究中，我们引入了对数位置 (LP)，这是一种自适应的、硬件友好的数据类型，其灵感来自于通过参数化 LP 位字段动态适应 DNN 权重/激活分布的位置。我们还开发了一种基于遗传算法的新型框架，LP 量化（LPQ），以找到最佳的逐层 LP 参数，同时通过新颖的全局-局部对比目标减少量化模型和全精度模型之间的表征差异。此外，我们还设计了由混合精度 LP 处理元件 (PE) 组成的 LP 加速器 (LPA) 架构。我们的算法硬件协同设计表明，各种 CNN 和 ViT 模型的 top-1 准确率平均下降 <1%。与使用不同数据类型的最先进的量化加速器相比，它的单位面积性能提高了约 2 倍，能源效率提高了 2.2 倍。

items.title: Execution Sequence Optimization for Processing In-Memory using Parallel Data Preparation.
items.abstract: Processing in-memory (PIM) promises to unleash unprecedented computing capabilities for high-data-rate applications. Computation using PIM is performed by breaking down computationally expensive operations into in-memory kernels that can be efficiently executed using non-volatile memory. Logic styles such as MAGIC require that each output memory cell is prepared for evaluation before executing the functional logic operation. State-of-the-art synthesis algorithms perform the preparation immediately after memory cells have expired. Unfortunately, this results in that columns of cells are prepared greedily, instead of leveraging efficient parallel data preparation instructions. In this paper, we propose the PREP framework that maximizes the opportunities for parallel column preparation using execution sequence optimization. The key idea of the framework is to postpone data preparation instructions until there are no available prepared cells. Next, the accumulated memory cells are prepared in parallel to release the memory for functional evaluations. The framework is capable of exploring a frontier of area-performance solutions. The PREP framework is evaluated using 15 benchmarks from the SuiteSparse library. Compared with state-of-the-art synthesis tools, energy consumption and latency are respectively reduced by 27% and 25% with no additional cost in crossbar memory.
items.abstract_zh: 内存处理 (PIM) 有望为高数据速率应用释放前所未有的计算能力。使用 PIM 的计算是通过将计算成本较高的操作分解为内存内核来执行的，这些内核可以使用非易失性内存有效地执行。 MAGIC 等逻辑类型要求每个输出存储单元在执行功能逻辑操作之前准备好进行评估。最先进的合成算法会在存储单元失效后立即执行准备工作。不幸的是，这导致单元列被贪婪地准备，而不是利用有效的并行数据准备指令。在本文中，我们提出了 PREP 框架，该框架使用执行序列优化来最大化并行列准备的机会。该框架的关键思想是推迟数据准备指令，直到没有可用的准备单元。接下来，并行准备累积的存储器单元以释放存储器以进行功能评估。该框架能够探索区域性能解决方案的前沿。 PREP 框架使用 SuiteSparse 库中的 15 个基准进行评估。与最先进的综合工具相比，能耗和延迟分别降低了 27% 和 25%，并且没有额外的交叉存储器成本。

items.title: HiRISE: High-Resolution Image Scaling for Edge ML via In-Sensor Compression and Selective ROI.
items.abstract: With the rise of tiny IoT devices powered by machine learning (ML), many researchers have directed their focus toward compressing models to fit on tiny edge devices. Recent works have achieved remarkable success in compressing ML models for object detection and image classification on microcontrollers with small memory, e.g., 512kB SRAM. However, there remain many challenges prohibiting the deployment of ML systems that require high-resolution images. Due to fundamental limits in memory capacity for tiny IoT devices, it may be physically impossible to store large images without external hardware. To this end, we propose a high-resolution image scaling system for edge ML, called HiRISE, which is equipped with selective region-of-interest (ROI) capability leveraging analog in-sensor image scaling. Our methodology not only significantly reduces the peak memory requirements, but also achieves up to 17.7× reduction in data transfer and energy consumption.
items.abstract_zh: 随着由机器学习 (ML) 驱动的微型物联网设备的兴起，许多研究人员将注意力转向压缩模型以适应微型边缘设备。最近的工作在使用小内存（例如 512kB SRAM）的微控制器上压缩用于目标检测和图像分类的 ML 模型方面取得了显着的成功。然而，仍然存在许多挑战阻碍部署需要高分辨率图像的机器学习系统。由于微型物联网设备内存容量的基本限制，如果没有外部硬件，物理上可能无法存储大图像。为此，我们提出了一种用于边缘 ML 的高分辨率图像缩放系统，称为 HiRISE，它配备了利用模拟传感器内图像缩放的选择性感兴趣区域 (ROI) 功能。我们的方法不仅显着降低了峰值内存需求，而且还实现了数据传输和能耗降低高达 17.7 倍。

items.title: Invited: Leveraging Machine Learning for Quantum Compilation Optimization.
items.abstract: The design of quantum algorithms typically assumes the availability of an ideal quantum computer, characterized by full connectivity, noiseless operation, and unlimited coherence time. However, Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices present a stark contrast, with a limited number of qubits, non-negligible quantum operation errors, and stringent constraints on the connectivity of physical qubits within a Quantum Processing Unit (QPU). This necessitates the dynamic remapping of logical qubits to physical qubits within the compiler to facilitate the execution of two-qubit gates in the algorithm. However, this introduces additional operations, consequently reducing the fidelity of the algorithm. Therefore, minimizing the number of added gates becomes crucial. Finding such an optimal routing problem is NP-hard, and the task is conventionally addressed using human-crafted heuristics to search for SWAP sequences, but these lack performance guarantees. In this study, we employ a Seq2Seq machine learning model for the qubit routing task, incorporating a Transformer neural network to learn the routing information in the gate and SWAP sequence. Compared to heuristic search-based algorithms, our approach significantly reduces the overhead of quantum computing resources required to adapt logical circuits to physical circuits executable on specific quantum backend hardware.
items.abstract_zh: 量子算法的设计通常假设有一台理想的量子计算机，其特点是完全连接、无噪声运行和无限的相干时间。然而，嘈杂的中尺度量子（NISQ）设备却呈现出鲜明的对比，其量子位数量有限，量子运算错误不可忽略，并且对量子处理单元（QPU）内物理量子位的连接性有严格的限制。这需要在编译器内将逻辑量子位动态重新映射到物理量子位，以促进算法中双量子位门的执行。然而，这引入了额外的操作，从而降低了算法的保真度。因此，尽量减少添加的门的数量变得至关重要。找到这样的最优路由问题是 NP 困难的，并且该任务通常使用人工设计的启发式方法来搜索 SWAP 序列来解决，但这些缺乏性能保证。在本研究中，我们采用 Seq2Seq 机器学习模型来执行量子位路由任务，并结合 Transformer 神经网络来学习门和 SWAP 序列中的路由信息​​。与基于启发式搜索的算法相比，我们的方法显着减少了将逻辑电路适应在特定量子后端硬件上可执行的物理电路所需的量子计算资源的开销。

items.title: Cross-Layer Reliability Evaluation and Efficient Hardening of Large Vision Transformers Models.
items.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) are highly accurate Machine Learning (ML) models. However, their large size and complexity increase the expected error rate due to hardware faults. Measuring the error rate of large ViT models is challenging, as conventional microarchitectural fault simulations can take years to produce statistically significant data. This paper proposes a two-level evaluation based on data collected through more than 70 hours of neutron beam experiments and more than 600 hours of software fault simulation. We consider 12 ViT models executed in 2 NVIDIA GPU architectures. We first characterize the fault model in ViT's kernels to identify the faults more likely to propagate to the output. We then design dedicated procedures efficiently integrated into the ViT to locate and correct these faults. We propose Maximum corrupted Malicious values (MaxiMals), an experimentally tuned low-cost mitigation solution to reduce the impact of transient faults on ViTs. We demonstrate that MaxiMals can correct 90.7% of critical failures, with execution time overheads as low as 5.61%.
items.abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 是高度准确的机器学习 (ML) 模型。然而，它们的大尺寸和复杂性增加了由于硬件故障而导致的预期错误率。测量大型 ViT 模型的错误率具有挑战性，因为传统的微架构故障模拟可能需要数年时间才能产生具有统计意义的数据。本文根据70多个小时的中子束实验和600多个小时的软件故障模拟收集的数据提出了两级评估。我们考虑在 2 个 NVIDIA GPU 架构中执行 12 个 ViT 模型。我们首先描述 ViT 内核中的故障模型，以识别更有可能传播到输出的故障。然后，我们设计专用程序，有效地集成到 ViT 中来定位和纠正这些故障。我们提出了最大损坏恶意值 (MaxiMals)，这是一种经过实验调整的低成本缓解解决方案，可减少瞬时故障对 ViT 的影响。我们证明 MaxiMals 可以纠正 90.7% 的关键故障，而执行时间开销低至 5.61%。

items.title: Lost and Found in Speculation: Hybrid Speculative Vulnerability Detection.
items.abstract: Microarchitectural attacks represent a challenging and persistent threat to modern processors, exploiting inherent design vulnerabilities in processors to leak sensitive information or compromise systems. Of particular concern is the susceptibility of Speculative Execution, a fundamental part of performance enhancement, to such attacks. We introduce Specure, a novel pre-silicon verification method composing hardware fuzzing with Information Flow Tracking (IFT) to address speculative execution leakages. Integrating IFT enables two significant and non-trivial enhancements over the existing fuzzing approaches: i) automatic detection of microarchitectural information leakages vulnerabilities without golden model and ii) a novel Leakage Path coverage metric for efficient vulnerability detection. Specure identifies previously overlooked speculative execution vulnerabilities on the RISC-V BOOM processor and explores the vulnerability search space 6.45× faster than existing fuzzing techniques. Moreover, Specure detected known vulnerabilities 20× faster.
items.abstract_zh: 微架构攻击对现代处理器来说是一个具有挑战性和持续性的威胁，它利用处理器固有的设计漏洞来泄露敏感信息或危害系统。特别值得关注的是推测执行（性能增强的基本部分）对此类攻击的敏感性。我们介绍 Specure，这是一种新颖的硅前验证方法，由硬件模糊测试和信息流跟踪 (IFT) 组成，以解决推测性执行泄漏问题。集成 IFT 可以对现有模糊测试方法进行两项重要且重要的增强：i）无需黄金模型即可自动检测微架构信息泄漏漏洞；ii）用于高效漏洞检测的新颖的泄漏路径覆盖指标。 Specure 识别 RISC-V BOOM 处理器上以前被忽视的推测执行漏洞，并以比现有模糊测试技术快 6.45 倍的速度探索漏洞搜索空间。此外，Specure 检测已知漏洞的速度提高了 20 倍。

items.title: Deep Harmonic Finesse: Signal Separation in Wearable Systems with Limited Data.
items.abstract: We present a method, referred to as Deep Harmonic Finesse (DHF), for separation of non-stationary quasi-periodic signals when limited data is available. The problem frequently arises in wearable systems in which, a combination of quasi-periodic physiological phenomena give rise to the sensed signal, and excessive data collection is prohibitive. Our approach utilizes prior knowledge of time-frequency patterns in the signals to mask and in-paint spectrograms. This is achieved through an application-inspired deep harmonic neural network coupled with an integrated pattern alignment component. The network's structure embeds the implicit harmonic priors within the time-frequency domain, while the pattern-alignment method transforms the sensed signal, ensuring a strong alignment with the network. The effectiveness of the algorithm is demonstrated in the context of non-invasive fetal monitoring using both synthesized and in vivo data. When applied to the synthesized data, our method exhibits significant improvements in signal-to-distortion ratio (26% on average) and mean squared error (80% on average), compared to the best competing method. When applied to in vivo data captured in pregnant animal studies, our method improves the correlation error between estimated fetal blood oxygen saturation and the ground truth by 80.5% compared to the state of the art.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种称为深度谐波精细 (DHF) 的方法，用于在可用数据有限时分离非平稳准周期信号。这个问题经常出现在可穿戴系统中，其中准周期性生理现象的组合会产生感测信号，并且过多的数据收集是令人望而却步的。我们的方法利用信号中时频模式的先验知识来屏蔽和修复频谱图。这是通过应用启发的深度谐波神经网络与集成模式对齐组件相结合来实现的。该网络的结构将隐式谐波先验嵌入到时频域内，而模式对齐方法则对感测到的信号进行变换，确保与网络的强对齐。该算法的有效性在使用合成数据和体内数据的无创胎儿监测中得到了证明。当应用于合成数据时，与最佳竞争方法相比，我们的方法在信号失真比（平均 26%）和均方误差（平均 80%）方面表现出显着改进。当应用于怀孕动物研究中捕获的体内数据时，与现有技术相比，我们的方法将估计的胎儿血氧饱和度与真实值之间的相关误差提高了 80.5%。

items.title: Zeroth-Order Optimization of Optical Neural Networks with Linear Combination Natural Gradient and Calibrated Model.
items.abstract: Optical neural networks (ONNs) have attracted great attention due to their low energy consumption and high-speed processing. The usual neural network training scheme leads to poor performance for ONNs because of their special parameterization and fabrication variations. This paper contributes to extend zeroth-order (ZO) optimization, which can be used to train such ONNs, in two ways. The first is to propose linear combination natural gradient, which mitigates the optimization difficulty caused by the special parameterization of an ONN. The second is to generate a guided direction vector by calibration for better guessing than random vectors generated in ZO optimization. Experimental results show that the two extensions significantly outperformed the existing ZO optimization and related methods with little computational overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 光神经网络（ONN）由于其低能耗和高速处理而引起了极大的关注。由于其特殊的参数化和制造变化，通常的神经网络训练方案导致 ONN 的性能较差。本文有助于扩展零阶（ZO）优化，它可以通过两种方式用于训练此类 ONN。首先是提出线性组合自然梯度，减轻了ONN特殊参数化带来的优化难度。第二个是通过校准生成引导方向向量，以便比 ZO 优化中生成的随机向量更好地猜测。实验结果表明，这两种扩展显着优于现有的 ZO 优化和相关方法，且计算开销很小。

items.title: SARIS: Accelerating Stencil Computations on Energy-Efficient RISC-V Compute Clusters with Indirect Stream Registers.
items.abstract: Stencil codes are performance-critical in many compute-intensive applications, but suffer from significant address calculation and irregular memory access overheads. This work presents SARIS, a general and highly flexible methodology for stencil acceleration using register-mapped indirect streams. We demonstrate SARIS for various stencil codes on an eight-core RISC-V compute cluster with indirect stream registers, achieving significant speedups of 2.72x, near-ideal FPU utilizations of 81%, and energy efficiency improvements of 1.58x over an RV32G baseline on average. Scaling out to a 256-core manycore system, we estimate an average FPU utilization of 64%, an average speedup of 2.14x, and up to 15% higher fractions of peak compute than a leading GPU code generator.
items.abstract_zh: 模板代码在许多计算密集型应用程序中对性能至关重要，但会遭受大量的地址计算和不规则的内存访问开销。这项工作提出了 SARIS，这是一种使用寄存器映射间接流进行模板加速的通用且高度灵活的方法。我们在具有间接流寄存器的八核 RISC-V 计算集群上演示了各种模板代码的 SARIS，与 RV32G 基准相比，平均速度显着提高了 2.72 倍，FPU 利用率接近理想状态，达到 81%，能效提高了 1.58 倍。扩展到 256 核众核系统时，我们估计平均 FPU 利用率为 64%，平均加速为 2.14 倍，峰值计算比例比领先的 GPU 代码生成器高出 15%。

items.title: Hybrid Circuit Mapping: Leveraging the Full Spectrum of Computational Capabilities of Neutral Atom Quantum Computers.
items.abstract: Quantum computing based on Neutral Atoms (NAs) provides a wide range of computational capabilities, encompassing high-fidelity long-range interactions with native multi-qubit gates and the ability to shuttle arrays of qubits. While, previously, these capabilities have been studied individually, we propose a fast hybrid compiler to perform circuit mapping and routing utilizing both high-fidelity gate interactions and qubit shuttling. We delve into the intricacies of the compilation process when combining multiple capabilities and present effective solutions to address the resulting challenges. The final compilation strategy is then showcased across various hardware settings, revealing its versatility, and highlighting potential fidelity enhancements achieved through the strategic utilization of combined gate- and shuttling-based routing. With the additional multi-qubit gate support for both routing capabilities, the proposed approach is able to take advantage of the full spectrum of computational capabilities offered by NAs.
items.abstract_zh: 基于中性原子 (NA) 的量子计算提供了广泛的计算能力，包括与本机多量子位门的高保真远程交互以及穿梭量子位阵列的能力。虽然之前已经单独研究了这些功能，但我们提出了一种快速混合编译器，利用高保真门交互和量子位穿梭来执行电路映射和路由。我们深入研究了组合多种功能时编译过程的复杂性，并提出了有效的解决方案来应对由此产生的挑战。然后在各种硬件设置中展示最终的编译策略，揭示其多功能性，并强调通过战略性地利用组合的基于门和穿梭的路由来实现潜在的保真度增强。通过对两种路由功能的额外多量子位门支持，所提出的方法能够利用 NA 提供的全方位计算功能。

items.title: Invited: Human-Inspired Distributed Wearable AI.
items.abstract: The explosive surge in Human-AI interactions, fused with a soaring fascination in wearable technology, has ignited a frenzy of innovation and the emergence of a myriad of Wearable AI devices, each wielding diverse form factors, tackling tasks from health surveillance to turbocharging productivity. This paper delves into the vision for wearable AI technology, addressing the technical bottlenecks that stand in the way of its promised advancements.
items.abstract_zh: 人机交互的爆炸式增长，加上可穿戴技术的魅力不断飙升，引发了创新热潮，催生了无数可穿戴人工智能设备，每种设备都具有不同的外形，可以处理从健康监测到提高生产力等任务。本文深入探讨了可穿戴人工智能技术的愿景，解决了阻碍其进步的技术瓶颈。

items.title: OPTIMA: Design-Space Exploration of Discharge-Based In-SRAM Computing: Quantifying Energy-Accuracy Trade-offs.
items.abstract: In-SRAM computing promises energy efficiency, but circuit nonlinearities and PVT variations pose major challenges in designing robust accelerators. To address this, we introduce OPTIMA, a modeling framework that aids in analyzing bitline discharge and power consumption in 6T-SRAM-based accelerators. It provides insights into limiting factors and enables fast design-space exploration of circuit configurations. Leveraging OPTIMA for in-SRAM multiplications exhibits ~100 × simulation speed-up while maintaining an RMS modeling error of 0.88 mV. Exploration yields an optimized multiplier with 1.05 pJ energy consumption per 4-bit operation and classification accuracies of 71.8% (top-1) and 90.4% (top-5) for ImageNet and 92.5% for CIFAR-10 datasets respectively when applied in quantized DNNs. To further support research and development efforts, we have made our OPTIMAptima tool flow available as open source [https://github.com/sevjaeg/optima].
items.abstract_zh: SRAM 内计算保证了能源效率，但电路非线性和 PVT 变化对设计稳健的加速器提出了重大挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 OPTIMA，这是一个建模框架，有助于分析基于 6T-SRAM 的加速器中的位线放电和功耗。它提供了对限制因素的深入了解，并能够快速探索电路配置的设计空间。利用 OPTIMA 进行 SRAM 内乘法可实现约 100 倍的仿真加速，同时保持 0.88 mV 的 RMS 建模误差。当应用于量化 DNN 时，探索产生了一个优化乘法器，每 4 位操作的能耗为 1.05 pJ，ImageNet 的分类精度为 71.8%（top-1），CIFAR-10 数据集的分类精度为 90.4%（top-5），为 92.5%。为了进一步支持研究和开发工作，我们将 OPTIMaptima 工具流程开源 [https://github.com/sevjaeg/optima]。

items.title: SPECRUN: The Danger of Speculative Runahead Execution in Processors.
items.abstract: Runahead execution is a continuously evolving microarchitectural technique for processor performance. This paper introduces the first transient execution attack on the runahead execution, called SPECRUN, which exploits the unresolved branch prediction during runahead execution. We show that SPECRUN eliminates the limitation on the number of transient instructions posed by the reorder buffer size, enhancing the exploitability and harmfulness of the attack. We concretely demonstrate a proof-of-concept attack that causes leaking secrets from a victim process, validate the merit of SPECRUN, and design a secure runahead execution scheme. This paper highlights the need to consider the security of potential optimization techniques before implementing them in a processor.
items.abstract_zh: Runahead 执行是一种不断发展的微架构技术，旨在提高处理器性能。本文介绍了第一个针对超前执行的瞬态执行攻击，称为 SPECRUN，它利用超前执行期间未解析的分支预测。我们证明 SPECRUN 消除了重排序缓冲区大小对瞬态指令数量的限制，增强了攻击的可利用性和危害性。我们具体演示了一种导致受害进程泄露秘密的概念验证攻击，验证了 SPECRUN 的优点，并设计了一种安全的超前执行方案。本文强调在处理器中实现潜在优化技术之前需要考虑其安全性。

items.title: PT-Map: Efficient Program Transformation Optimization for CGRA Mapping.
items.abstract: Coarse-Grained Reconfigurable Array (CGRA) is a parallel architecture providing high energy efficiency and spatial-temporal re-configurability. Beyond loop scheduling for throughput optimization, program transformation is also crucial in CGRA mapping to optimize overall performance and efficiency. However, existing studies on program transformation optimization face challenges in exploring the transformation space systematically and evaluating candidates efficiently, leading to sub-optimal results. To tackle these challenges, this paper introduces PT-Map, an efficient program transformation optimization framework for CGRA mapping. PT-Map defines a comprehensive transformation space and employs a CGRA-specialized top-down exploration approach. It also incorporates a bottom-up evaluation scheme using architectural parameters and a graph neural network-based predictive model. Experiments demonstrate that PT-Map achieves up to 2.95X/1.80X speedups and 59.0%/23.2% energy-delay-product (EDP) reductions over the state-of-the-art approaches MapZero and PBP, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）是一种并行架构，提供高能效和时空可重构性。除了用于吞吐量优化的循环调度之外，程序转换在 CGRA 映射中对于优化整体性能和效率也至关重要。然而，现有的程序转换优化研究在系统地探索转换空间和有效评估候选方案方面面临挑战，导致结果次优。为了应对这些挑战，本文介绍了 PT-Map，一种用于 CGRA 映射的高效程序转换优化框架。 PT-Map定义了一个综合的变换空间，并采用了CGRA专门的自上而下的探索方法。它还结合了使用架构参数和基于图神经网络的预测模型的自下而上的评估方案。实验表明，与最先进的方法 MapZero 和 PBP 相比，PT-Map 分别实现了高达 2.95 倍/1.80 倍的加速和 59.0%/23.2% 的能量延迟产物 (EDP) 减少。

items.title: ViT-slice: End-to-end Vision Transformer Accelerator with Bit-slice Algorithm.
items.abstract: Vision Transformers have demonstrated remarkable performance in various vision tasks. However, general-purpose processors, such as CPUs and GPUs, face challenges in efficiently handling the inference of Vision Transformers. To address the issue, prior works have focused on accelerating only attention due to its high computational cost in NLP Transformers. In contrast, Vision Transformers demonstrate a higher computational cost due to linear modules such as linear transformation, linear projection and Feed-Forward Network (FFN), compared to attention. In this paper, we present ViT-slice, an algorithm-architecture co-design that enhances end-to-end performance and energy efficiency by optimizing not only attention but also linear modules. At the algorithm level, we propose bit-slice compression that avoids storing the redundant most significant bits (MSBs). Additionally, we present bit-slice dot product with early skip to efficiently compute the dot product using bit-sliced data. To enable early skip during the dot product computation, we leverage a trainable threshold. On the hardware level, we introduce a specialized bit-slice dot product unit (BSDPU) to efficiently process the bit-slice dot product with early skip algorithm. Additionally, we present a bit-slice encoder and decoder for on-chip bit-slice compression. ViT-slice achieves 244×, 35.3×, 16.8×, 10.4×, 5.0× end-to-end speedup over Xeon CPU, EdgeGPU, TITAN Xp GPU, Sanger accelerator and ViTCoD accelerator, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: Vision Transformers 在各种视觉任务中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，通用处理器（例如 CPU 和 GPU）在有效处理 Vision Transformers 的推理方面面临着挑战。为了解决这个问题，由于 NLP Transformer 中的计算成本很高，之前的工作只专注于加速注意力。相比之下，与注意力相比，视觉变换器由于线性变换、线性投影和前馈网络（FFN）等线性模块而表现出更高的计算成本。在本文中，我们提出了 ViT-slice，这是一种算法架构协同设计，它不仅通过优化注意力模块，还通过优化线性模块来增强端到端性能和能源效率。在算法层面，我们提出位片压缩，以避免存储冗余的最高有效位（MSB）。此外，我们提出了具有早期跳过功能的位片点积，以使用位片数据有效地计算点积。为了在点积计算期间启用早期跳过，我们利用可训练的阈值。在硬件层面，我们引入了专门的位片点积单元（BSDPU），通过早期跳过算法有效地处理位片点积。此外，我们还提出了用于片上位片压缩的位片编码器和解码器。 ViT-slice 相对于 Xeon CPU、EdgeGPU、TITAN Xp GPU、Sanger 加速器和 ViTCoD 加速器分别实现了 244×、35.3×、16.8×、10.4×、5.0× 端到端加速。

items.title: TSAcc: An Efficient \underline{T}empo-\underline{S}patial Similarity Aware \underline{Acc}elerator for Attention Acceleration.
items.abstract: Attention-based models provide significant accuracy improvement to Natural Language Processing (NLP) and computer vision (CV) fields at the cost of heavy computational and memory demands. Previous works seek to alleviate the performance bottleneck by removing useless relations for each position. However, their attempts only focus on intra-sentence optimization and overlook the opportunity in the temporal domain. In this paper, we accelerate attention by leveraging the tempo-spatial similarity across successive sentences, given the observation that successive sentences tend to bear high similarity. This is rational owing to many semantic similar words (namely tokens) in the attention-based models. We first propose an online-offline prediction algorithm to identify similar tokens/heads. We then design a recovery algorithm so that we can skip the computation on similar tokens/heads in succeeding sentences and recover their results by copying other tokens/heads features in preceding sentences to reserve accuracy. From the hardware aspect, we propose a specialized architecture TSAcc that includes a prediction engine and recovery engine to translate the computational saving in the algorithm to real speedup. Experiments show that TSAcc can achieve 8.5X, 2.7X, 14.1X, and 64.9X speedup compared to SpAtten, Sanger, 1080TI GPU, and Xeon CPU, with negligible accuracy loss.
items.abstract_zh: 基于注意力的模型为自然语言处理（NLP）和计算机视觉（CV）领域提供了显着的准确性提高，但代价是大量的计算和内存需求。以前的工作试图通过删除每个位置的无用关系来缓解性能瓶颈。然而，他们的尝试只关注句子内的优化，而忽略了时域中的机会。在本文中，鉴于连续句子往往具有高度相似性的观察结果，我们通过利用连续句子之间的时空相似性来加速注意力。这是合理的，因为基于注意力的模型中存在许多语义相似的单词（即标记）。我们首先提出一种在线离线预测算法来识别相似的令牌/头。然后，我们设计一种恢复算法，以便我们可以跳过对后续句子中相似标记/头部的计算，并通过复制前面句子中的其他标记/头部特征来恢复其结果，以保留准确性。从硬件方面，我们提出了一种专门的架构 TSAcc，其中包括预测引擎和恢复引擎，以将算法中的计算节省转化为真正的加速。实验表明，与 SpAtten、Sanger、1080TI GPU 和 Xeon CPU 相比，TSAcc 可以实现 8.5 倍、2.7 倍、14.1 倍和 64.9 倍的加速，且精度损失可以忽略不计。

items.title: CircuitVAE: Efficient and Scalable Latent Circuit Optimization.
items.abstract: Automatically designing fast and space-efficient digital circuits is challenging because circuits are discrete, must exactly implement the desired logic, and are costly to simulate. We address these challenges with CircuitVAE, a search algorithm that embeds computation graphs in a continuous space and optimizes a learned surrogate of physical simulation by gradient descent. By carefully controlling overfitting of the simulation surrogate and ensuring diverse exploration, our algorithm is highly sample-efficient, yet gracefully scales to large problem instances and high sample budgets. We test CircuitVAE by designing binary adders across a large range of sizes, IO timing constraints, and sample budgets. Our method excels at designing large circuits, where other algorithms struggle: compared to reinforcement learning and genetic algorithms, CircuitVAE typically finds 64-bit adders which are smaller and faster using less than half the sample budget. We also find CircuitVAE can design state-of-the-art adders in a real-world chip, demonstrating that our method can outperform commercial tools in a realistic setting.
items.abstract_zh: 自动设计快速且节省空间的数字电路具有挑战性，因为电路是分立的，必须精确实现所需的逻辑，并且仿真成本高昂。我们使用 CircuitVAE 来解决这些挑战，这是一种搜索算法，将计算图嵌入连续空间中，并通过梯度下降来优化物理模拟的学习代理。通过仔细控制模拟代理的过度拟合并确保多样化的探索，我们的算法具有很高的样本效率，但可以优雅地扩展到大型问题实例和高样本预算。我们通过设计各种尺寸、IO 时序约束和样本预算的二进制加法器来测试 CircuitVAE。我们的方法擅长设计大型电路，而其他算法则难以做到这一点：与强化学习和遗传算法相比，CircuitVAE 通常会使用不到一半的样本预算来找到更小、更快的 64 位加法器。我们还发现 CircuitVAE 可以在现实芯片中设计最先进的加法器，这证明我们的方法在现实环境中可以优于商业工具。

items.title: Engineering an Efficient Preprocessor for Model Counting.
items.abstract: Given a formula F, the problem of model counting is to compute the number of solutions (also known as models) of F. Over the past decade, model counting has emerged as key building block of quantitative reasoning in design automation and artificial intelligence. Given the wide-ranging applications, scalability remains the major challenge. Motivated by the observation that the formula simplification can dramatically impact the performance of the state-of-the-art exact model counters, we design a new state-of-the-art preprocessor, Arjun2, that relies on tight integration of techniques. The design of Arjun2 is motivated from our observation that it is often beneficial to employ preprocessing techniques whose overhead may be prohibitive for the task of SAT solving but not for model counting: accordingly, we rely on a specifically tailored SAT solver design for redundancy detection, sampling-boosted backbone detection, as well as storing of redundancy information for the purposes of improving propagation within top-down model counters. Our detailed empirical evaluation demonstrates that Arjun2 achieves significant performance improvements over prior model counting preprocessors in terms of instance-size reductions achieved as well as the runtime improvements of the downstream model counters.
items.abstract_zh: 给定公式 F，模型计数的问题是计算 F 的解（也称为模型）的数量。在过去的十年中，模型计数已成为设计自动化和人工智能中定量推理的关键构建块。鉴于应用范围广泛，可扩展性仍然是主要挑战。由于观察到公式简化可以极大地影响最先进的精确模型计数器的性能，我们设计了一种新的最先进的预处理器 Arjun2，它依赖于技术的紧密集成。 Arjun2 的设计源于我们的观察，即采用预处理技术通常是有益的，这些技术的开销可能对于 SAT 求解任务来说是令人望而却步的，但对于模型计数来说却不是：因此，我们依靠专门定制的 SAT 求解器设计来进行冗余检测、采样增强骨干检测以及存储冗余信息，以改善自上而下模型计数器内的传播。我们详细的实证评估表明，与之前的模型计数预处理器相比，Arjun2 在实例大小减小以及下游模型计数器的运行时改进方面实现了显着的性能改进。

items.title: Ev-Edge: Efficient Execution of Event-based Vision Algorithms on Commodity Edge Platforms.
items.abstract: Event cameras have emerged as a promising sensing modality for autonomous navigation systems, owing to their high temporal resolution, high dynamic range and negligible motion blur. To achieve the best performance across a range of vision tasks using the asynchronous temporal event streams from such sensors, recent research has shown that a mix of Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs), as well as hybrid SNN-ANN algorithms are desirable. However, we observe that such workloads achieve poor utilization and performance on commodity edge platforms which feature heterogeneous processing elements such as CPUs, GPUs and neural accelerators. This is due to the mismatch between the irregular nature of event streams and diverse characteristics of algorithms on the one hand and the underlying hardware platform on the other. We propose Ev-Edge, a framework that contains three key optimizations to boost the performance of event-based vision algorithms on edge platforms: (1) An Event2Sparse Frame converter directly transforms raw event streams into sparse frames, enabling the use of sparse libraries with minimal encoding overheads (2) A Dynamic Sparse Frame Aggregator merges sparse frames at runtime by trading off the temporal granularity of events and computational demand, thereby improving hardware utilization, and (3) A Network Mapper maps concurrently executing tasks to different processing elements while also selecting layer precision while considering both compute and communication overheads. On several state-of-art networks for a range of autonomous navigation tasks, Ev-Edge achieves 1.28x-2.05x improvements in latency and 1.23x-2.15x in energy over an all-GPU implementation on the NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX platform for single-task execution scenarios. Ev-Edge also achieves 1.43x-1.81x latency improvements over round-robin scheduling methods in multi-task execution scenarios.
items.abstract_zh: 事件相机因其高时间分辨率、高动态范围和可忽略的运动模糊而成为自主导航系统有前途的传感方式。为了使用来自此类传感器的异步时间事件流在一系列视觉任务中实现最佳性能，最近的研究表明，需要混合使用人工神经网络 (ANN)、尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 以及混合 SNN-ANN 算法。然而，我们观察到，此类工作负载在具有 CPU、GPU 和神经加速器等异构处理元件的商品边缘平台上的利用率和性能较差。这是由于事件流的不规则性质和算法的不同特征与底层硬件平台之间的不匹配造成的。我们提出了 Ev-Edge，一个包含三个关键优化的框架，可提高边缘平台上基于事件的视觉算法的性能：（1）Event2Sparse Frame 转换器直接将原始事件流转换为稀疏帧，从而以最小的编码开销使用稀疏库（2）动态稀疏帧聚合器通过权衡事件的时间粒度和计算需求在运行时合并稀疏帧，从而提高硬件利用率，以及（3）网络映射器将并发执行的任务映射到不同的处理元素，同时还选择层精度，同时考虑计算和通信开销。在用于一系列自主导航任务的多个最先进网络上，与 NVIDIA Jetson Xavier AGX 平台上针对单任务执行场景的全 GPU 实现相比，Ev-Edge 在延迟方面实现了 1.28 倍到 2.05 倍的延迟改进，在能耗方面实现了 1.23 倍到 2.15 倍的改进。在多任务执行场景中，Ev-Edge 还比循环调度方法实现了 1.43 倍至 1.81 倍的延迟改进。
