items.title: Invited: Conformal Inference meets Evidential Learning: Distribution-Free Uncertainty Quantification with Epistemic and Aleatoric Separability.
items.abstract: This paper introduces a lightweight framework for quantifying uncertainty in deep learning models deployed at the edge, addressing the challenge of making reliable predictions under computational constraints. By integrating conformal inference and evidential learning into a novel approach called Conformalized Evidential Quantile Regression (CEQR), it offers a practical solution for models to assess and communicate their confidence in predictions. The method efficiently distinguishes between aleatoric and epistemic uncertainties, ensuring statistical robustness and real-time applicability on resource-limited devices. This work paves the way for safer, more reliable AI applications in critical areas by enabling models to recognize when they don't know.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种轻量级框架，用于量化部署在边缘的深度学习模型的不确定性，解决在计算限制下做出可靠预测的挑战。通过将保形推理和证据学习集成到一种称为保形证据分位数回归 (CEQR) 的新方法中，它为模型提供了一种实用的解决方案来评估和传达其对预测的信心。该方法有效地区分任意不确定性和认知不确定性，确保统计稳健性和资源有限设备上的实时适用性。这项工作使模型能够识别它们何时不知道，从而为关键领域更安全、更可靠的人工智能应用铺平了道路。

items.title: Predicting Lemmas in Generalization of IC3.
items.abstract: The IC3 algorithm, also known as PDR, has made a significant impact in the field of safety model checking in recent years due to its high efficiency, scalability, and completeness. The most crucial component of IC3 is inductive generalization, which involves dropping variables one by one and is often the most time-consuming step. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to predict a possible minimal lemma before dropping variables by utilizing the counterexample to propagation (CTP). By leveraging this approach, we can avoid dropping variables if predict successfully. The comprehensive evaluation demonstrates a commendable success rate in lemma prediction and a significant performance improvement achieved by our proposed method.
items.abstract_zh: IC3算法，又称PDR，由于其高效率、可扩展性和完整性，近年来在安全模型检查领域产生了重大影响。 IC3 最关键的组成部分是归纳泛化，这涉及到将变量一一删除，并且通常是最耗时的步骤。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法，通过利用传播反例（CTP）在丢弃变量之前预测可能的最小引理。通过利用这种方法，如果预测成功，我们可以避免丢弃变量。综合评估表明，引理预测的成功率值得称赞，并且我们提出的方法取得了显着的性能改进。

items.title: GreenFPGA: Evaluating FPGAs as Environmentally Sustainable Computing Solutions.
items.abstract: Growing global concerns about climate change highlight the need for environmentally sustainable computing. The ecological impact of computing, including operational and embodied, is crucial. Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) stand out as promising sustainable computing platforms due to their reconfigurability across various applications. This paper introduces GreenFPGA, a tool estimating the total carbon footprint (CFP) of FPGAs over their lifespan, considering design, manufacturing, reconfigurability, operation, disposal, and recycling. Using GreenFPGA, the paper evaluates scenarios where the ecological benefits of FPGA reconfigurability outweigh operational and embodied carbon costs, positioning FPGAs as an environmentally sustainable choice for hardware acceleration compared to Application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs). Experimental results show that FPGAs have lower CFP than ASICs for multiple low-volume applications or short application lifespans.
items.abstract_zh: 全球对气候变化日益增长的担忧凸显了对环境可持续计算的需求。计算的生态影响，包括操作和体现，是至关重要的。现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 因其跨各种应用的可重新配置性而成为有前途的可持续计算平台。本文介绍了 GreenFPGA，这是一种估算 FPGA 在其生命周期内的总碳足迹 (CFP) 的工具，考虑了设计、制造、可重构性、操作、处置和回收。该论文使用 GreenFPGA 评估了 FPGA 可重构性的生态效益超过运营成本和隐含碳成本的场景，将 FPGA 定位为与专用集成电路 (ASIC) 相比环境可持续的硬件加速选择。实验结果表明，对于多个小批量应用或较短的应用寿命，FPGA 的 CFP 低于 ASIC。

items.title: EVDMARL: Efficient Value Decomposition-based Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning with Domain-Randomization for Complex Analog Circuit Design Migration.
items.abstract: Automated analog circuit design migration significantly alleviates the burden on designers in circuit sizing under various operating conditions. Conventional methods model the migration problem as black-box optimization, requiring excessive iterations of costly simulations to converge. Reinforcement learning exhibits significant promise in transfer learning, as it enables the generation of circuits that fulfill specifications efficiently. The paper proposes a novel value decomposition-based multi-agent reinforcement learning framework, aiming to model complex analog circuits and eliminate the need for manually defined specifications of sub-circuits for new operating conditions. Additionally, it incorporates domain randomization techniques to efficiently generate circuits that meet unforeseen scenarios with minimal simulations. Experiment demonstrates that our algorithm can efficiently generate circuits meeting specifications under new operating conditions in few number of steps, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh: 自动模拟电路设计迁移显着减轻了设计人员在各种工作条件下调整电路尺寸的负担。传统方法将迁移问题建模为黑盒优化，需要进行大量昂贵的模拟迭代才能收敛。强化学习在迁移学习中展现出巨大的前景，因为它能够生成有效满足规范的电路。本文提出了一种新颖的基于价值分解的多智能体强化学习框架，旨在对复杂的模拟电路进行建模，并消除针对新操作条件手动定义子电路规范的需要。此外，它还结合了域随机化技术，可以有效地生成电路，以最少的模拟来满足不可预见的场景。实验表明，我们的算法可以在新的操作条件下以很少的步骤有效地生成满足规格的电路，优于最先进的方法。

items.title: Partitioned Scheduling and Parallelism Assignment for Real-Time DNN Inference Tasks on Multi-TPU.
items.abstract: Pipelining on Edge Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) optimizes the deep neural network (DNN) inference by breaking it down into multiple stages processed concurrently on multiple accelerators. Such DNN inference tasks can be modeled as sporadic non-preemptive gangs with execution times that vary with their parallelism levels. This paper proposes a strict partitioning strategy for deploying DNN inferences in real-time systems. The strategy determines tasks' parallelism levels and assigns tasks to disjoint processor partitions. Configuring the tasks in the same partition with a uniform parallelism level avoids scheduling anomalies and enables schedulability verification using well-understood uniprocessor analyses. Evaluation using real-world Edge TPU benchmarks demonstrated that the proposed method achieves a higher schedulability ratio than state-of-the-art gang scheduling techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 边缘张量处理单元 (TPU) 上的流水线通过将深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理分解为在多个加速器上同时处理的多个阶段来优化深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理。此类 DNN 推理任务可以建模为零星的非抢占式组，其执行时间随并行级别的变化而变化。本文提出了一种在实时系统中部署 DNN 推理的严格划分策略。该策略确定任务的并行级别并将任务分配给不相交的处理器分区。使用统一的并行级别在同一分区中配置任务可以避免调度异常，并使用易于理解的单处理器分析来实现可调度性验证。使用现实世界的 Edge TPU 基准进行的评估表明，所提出的方法比最先进的组调度技术实现了更高的可调度性比率。

items.title: Massively Parallel AIG Resubstitution.
items.abstract: Resubstitution is a flexible algorithmic framework for circuit restructuring that has been incorporated into many high-effort logic optimization flows. It is thus important to speed up resubstitution in order to obtain high-quality realizations of large-scale designs. This paper proposes a massively parallel AIG resubstitution algorithm targeting GPUs, with effective approaches to addressing cyclic dependencies and restructuring conflicts. Compared with ABC and mockturtle, our algorithm achieves 41.9× and 50.3× acceleration on average without quality degradation. When combining our resubstitution with other GPU algorithms, a GPU-based resyn2rs sequence obtains 46.4× speedup over ABC with 0.8% and 5.8% smaller area and delay respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 重新代入是一种用于电路重组的灵活算法框架，已被纳入许多高强度逻辑优化流程中。因此，为了获得大规模设计的高质量实现，加速再替代非常重要。本文提出了一种针对 GPU 的大规模并行 AIG 重新替换算法，并提供了解决循环依赖和重组冲突的有效方法。与 ABC 和mockturtle 相比，我们的算法平均实现了 41.9× 和 50.3× 的加速，且质量没有下降。当将我们的重新替换与其他 GPU 算法相结合时，基于 GPU 的 resyn2rs 序列比 ABC 获得了 46.4 倍的加速，面积和延迟分别减小了 0.8% 和 5.8%。

items.title: Efficient ILT via Multigrid-Schwartz Method.
items.abstract: Inverse Lithography Technology (ILT) is an important Resolution Enhancement Technology (RET) in chip manufacturing. Due to the high computational demands of ILT, large-scale layouts are typically partitioned into smaller tiles for independent processing. In this paper, we propose a multigrid-Schwarz method to overcome challenges in tile assembly. Experimental results show that our approach achieves comparable performance to the full-chip ILT, offering increased parallelizability and speedup in parallel mode. Unlike the traditional divide-and-conquer algorithm, it effectively alleviates discontinuities of tile stitching, preventing manufacturing failures.
items.abstract_zh: 逆光刻技术（ILT）是芯片制造中重要的分辨率增强技术（RET）。由于 ILT 的高计算需求，大规模布局通常被分割成较小的图块以进行独立处理。在本文中，我们提出了一种多重网格施瓦茨方法来克服瓷砖组装中的挑战。实验结果表明，我们的方法实现了与全芯片 ILT 相当的性能，在并行模式下提供了更高的并行性和加速。与传统的分而治之算法不同，它有效地缓解了瓷砖拼接的不连续性，防止了制造故障。

items.title: Crop: An Analytical Cost Model for Cross-Platform Performance Prediction of Tensor Programs.
items.abstract: Learn-based cost models used for tensor compiler auto-tuning often suffer from poor performance when trained on one hardware platform and applied to another. This issue necessitates collecting performance data for each potential platform during model deployment, incurring significant overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 用于张量编译器自动调优的基于学习的成本模型在一个硬件平台上进行训练并应用于另一硬件平台时，通常会出现性能不佳的问题。此问题需要在模型部署期间收集每个潜在平台的性能数据，从而产生大量开销。

items.title: An IP-Agnostic Foundational Cell Array Offering Supply Chain Security.
items.abstract: Growing IC manufacturing complexity and reliance on third-party fabrication create supply chain fragility, contributing to chip shortages and IP security risks. General-purpose ICs can mitigate manufacturing security risks but rely on software-based configurations, which is not optimal for high-consequence applications. Our work proposes a novel IP-agnostic Foundational Cell Array (FC-Array) platform to overcome these challenges. Built on verified standard cells and industry-standard EDA tools, this platform preserves many advantages of an ASIC. By incorporating 3D split manufacturing, we provide semantically secure IP protection and a base wafer that can be stockpiled. Our tests demonstrate both power-efficient (100 MHz) and high-performance (1 GHz) options. In a post-place-and-route simulated 28nm design, our FC-Array shows a worst-case 1.85x increase in power consumption and a 2.61x increase in area compared to standard cell ASICs for equivalent timing performance.
items.abstract_zh: IC 制造复杂性不断增加以及对第三方制造的依赖导致供应链脆弱，导致芯片短缺和 IP 安全风险。通用 IC 可以降低制造安全风险，但依赖于基于软件的配置，这对于高后果应用来说并不是最佳选择。我们的工作提出了一种新颖的与 IP 无关的基础单元阵列 (FC-Array) 平台来克服这些挑战。该平台基于经过验证的标准单元和行业标准 EDA 工具构建，保留了 ASIC 的许多优点。通过整合 3D 分割制造，我们提供语义上安全的 IP 保护和可储存的基础晶圆。我们的测试展示了高能效 (100 MHz) 和高性能 (1​​ GHz) 选项。在布局布线后模拟 28nm 设计中，与具有同等时序性能的标准单元 ASIC 相比，我们的 FC 阵列在最坏情况下功耗增加了 1.85 倍，面积增加了 2.61 倍。

items.title: A HW/SW Co-Design of Video Dehazing Accelerator Using Decoupled Local Atmospheric Light Prior.
items.abstract: In this paper, we introduce DLAPID, a novel decoupled parallel hardware-software co-design architecture for real-time video dehazing. From a software point of view, DLAPID isolates the atmospheric light operation from the initial transmission estimation to take full advantage of the hardware accelerators' parallelization features. For the hardware implementation, we deploy DLAPID both on FPGA and GPU platforms and validate its effectiveness. Using both real-world driving scenario testing sets and ground-truth datasets, we quantitatively and qualitatively assess the proposed method against several SOTA (state-of-the-art) video dehazing models. The outcomes of our experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves better dehazing performance with lower power consumption and has real-time processing capabilities, thereby preventing potential accidents of autonomous vehicles.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 DLAPID，一种用于实时视频去雾的新型解耦并行硬件软件协同设计架构。从软件角度来看，DLAPID将大气光操作与初始传输估计隔离开来，以充分利用硬件加速器的并行化功能。对于硬件实现，我们在FPGA和GPU平台上部署DLAPID并验证其有效性。使用现实世界的驾驶场景测试集和地面实况数据集，我们针对几种 SOTA（最先进的）视频去雾模型对所提出的方法进行定量和定性评估。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法以较低的功耗实现了更好的去雾性能，并且具有实时处理能力，从而防止了自动驾驶车辆的潜在事故。

items.title: Synthesis of Compact Flow-based Computing Circuits from Boolean Expressions.
items.abstract: Processing in-memory has the potential to accelerate high-data-rate applications beyond the limits of modern hardware. Flow-based computing is a computing paradigm for executing Boolean logic within nanoscale memory arrays by leveraging the natural flow of electric current. Previous approaches of mapping Boolean logic onto flow-based computing circuits have been constrained by their reliance on binary decision diagrams (BDDs), which translates into high area overhead. In this paper, we introduce a novel framework called FACTOR for mapping logic functions into dense flow-based computing circuits. The proposed methodology introduces Boolean connectivity graphs (BCGs) as a more versatile representation, capable of producing smaller crossbar circuits. The framework constructs concise BCGs using factorization and expression trees. Next, the BCGs are modified to be amenable for mapping to crossbar hardware. We also propose a time multiplexing strategy for sharing hardware between different Boolean functions. Compared with the state-of-the-art approach, the experimental evaluation using 14 circuits demonstrates that FACTOR reduces area, speed, and energy with 80%, 2%, and 12%, respectively, compared with the state-of-the-art synthesis method for flow-based computing.
items.abstract_zh: 内存中处理有可能加速高数据速率应用程序，超越现代硬件的限制。基于流的计算是一种通过利用电流的自然流动在纳米级存储器阵列内执行布尔逻辑的计算范例。以前将布尔逻辑映射到基于流的计算电路的方法受到对二元决策图（BDD）的依赖的限制，这会转化为高面积开销。在本文中，我们介绍了一种称为 FACTOR 的新颖框架，用于将逻辑功能映射到基于密集流的计算电路。所提出的方法引入了布尔连接图（BCG）作为一种更通用的表示形式，能够产生更小的纵横电路。该框架使用因式分解和表达式树构建简洁的 BCG。接下来，BCG 被修改为适合映射到交叉开关硬件。我们还提出了一种在不同布尔函数之间共享硬件的时间复用策略。与最先进的方法相比，使用 14 个电路的实验评估表明，与基于流的计算的最先进的综合方法相比，FACTOR 的面积、速度和能量分别减少了 80%、2% 和 12%。

items.title: VITA: ViT Acceleration for Efficient 3D Human Mesh Recovery via Hardware-Algorithm Co-Design.
items.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a promising solution to enable efficient 3D Human Mesh Recovery (HMR) in augmented and virtual reality (AR/VR) applications. Despite many advancements in algorithm design, it remains a challenge to efficiently accelerate ViT-based HMR due to high computational complexity, substantial memory footprint, and compromised data locality. In this paper, we propose VITA, a hardware and algorithm co-design framework for ViT-based HMR with improved performance and energy efficiency. Specifically, on the algorithm side, we propose an average pooling model to replace conventional multi-head attention, which is further optimized with improved data locality. On the hardware side, we propose an accelerator architecture that can efficiently support various dataflows and computations demanded by pooling, normalization, and convolution operations. We evaluate the proposed VITA, and the evaluation result shows that the proposed VITA design can achieve 5.05× and 69.12× speedups on average over the state-of-the-art GPUs and CPUs on HMR tasks.
items.abstract_zh: 视觉变压器 (ViT) 已成为一种很有前景的解决方案，可在增强现实和虚拟现实 (AR/VR) 应用中实现高效的 3D 人体网格恢复 (HMR)。尽管算法设计取得了许多进步，但由于高计算复杂性、大量内存占用和数据局部性受损，有效加速基于 ViT 的 HMR 仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了 VITA，一种基于 ViT 的 HMR 的硬件和算法协同设计框架，具有改进的性能和能源效率。具体来说，在算法方面，我们提出了一种平均池化模型来代替传统的多头注意力，并通过改进的数据局部性进一步优化。在硬件方面，我们提出了一种加速器架构，可以有效地支持池化、标准化和卷积操作所需的各种数据流和计算。我们评估了所提出的 VITA，评估结果表明，所提出的 VITA 设计在 HMR 任务上比最先进的 GPU 和 CPU 平均可以实现 5.05 倍和 69.12 倍的加速。

items.title: RTLFixer: Automatically Fixing RTL Syntax Errors with Large Language Model.
items.abstract: This paper presents RTLFixer, a novel framework enabling automatic syntax errors fixing for Verilog code with Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite LLM's promising capabilities, our analysis indicates that approximately 55% of errors in LLM-generated Verilog are syntax-related, leading to compilation failures. To tackle this issue, we introduce a novel debugging framework that employs Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and ReAct prompting, enabling LLMs to act as autonomous agents in interactively debugging the code with feedback. This framework demonstrates exceptional proficiency in resolving syntax errors, successfully correcting about 98.5% of compilation errors in our debugging dataset, comprising 212 erroneous implementations derived from the VerilogEval benchmark. Our method leads to 32.3% and 10.1% increase in pass@1 success rates in the VerilogEval-Machine and VerilogEval-Human benchmarks, respectively. The source code and benchmark are available at https://github.com/NVlabs/RTLFixer.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 RTLFixer，这是一种新颖的框架，可以使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 自动修复 Verilog 代码的语法错误。尽管 LLM 的功能很有前途，但我们的分析表明，LLM 生成的 Verilog 中大约 55% 的错误与语法相关，从而导致编译失败。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种新颖的调试框架，该框架采用检索增强生成（RAG）和 ReAct 提示，使 LLM 能够充当自主代理，通过反馈交互式调试代码。该框架在解决语法错误方面表现出卓越的能力，成功纠正了调试数据集中约 98.5% 的编译错误，其中包括源自 VerilogEval 基准测试的 212 个错误实现。我们的方法使 VerilogEval-Machine 和 VerilogEval-Human 基准测试中的 pass@1 成功率分别提高了 32.3% 和 10.1%。源代码和基准测试可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/RTLFixer 上获取。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Power Rail Routing for Advanced Multi-Layered Printed Circuit Boards.
items.abstract: This paper proposes a power rail routing flow for advanced multi-layered printed circuit boards (PCBs) to optimize segment area and via usage while satisfying IR drop requirements. With increasing current/voltage demands in modern PCBs, ultra-wide power rails may consume most routing space and cause significant routing problems. We present an effective overlap-aware rail sizing technique to distribute routing spaces appropriately according to current/voltage demands and a resistance-aware A*-search algorithm to resolve overlapping regions by rail detouring. Experimental results show that our work significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art rail router in the metal area and runtime, achieving respective reductions of 49% and 28%, without any current/voltage violations.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种适用于高级多层印刷电路板 (PCB) 的电源轨布线流程，以优化段面积和通孔使用，同时满足 IR 压降要求。随着现代 PCB 中电流/电压需求的增加，超宽电源轨可能会占用大部分布线空间并导致严重的布线问题。我们提出了一种有效的重叠感知铁轨尺寸调整技术，可根据电流/电压需求适当分配布线空间，并提出电阻感知 A* 搜索算法，通过铁轨绕行解决重叠区域。实验结果表明，我们的工作在金属面积和运行时间方面显着优于最先进的铁路路由器，分别减少了 49% 和 28%，且没有任何电流/电压违规。

items.title: Late Breaking Results: Modern Automatic PCB Placement with Complex Constraints.
items.abstract: Existing printed circuit board (PCB) placement often fails to address complex constraints (e.g., diverse wire widths and intricate spacing rules) arising from heterogeneous components in modern designs. Manual placement requires expertise and is time-consuming. Thus, automated PCB placement is desired for large-scale, complex designs considering irregular component shapes, clearance conditions, wire areas, power circuit flow, and routability. This paper proposes an efficient force-directed global placement followed by legalization to handle these constraints. We derive power circuit anchor points to guide global placement when considering the power circuit flow and present a simulated annealing-based pad alignment method to handle complex spacing constraints. After global placement, we perform window-based legalization to remove component overlaps considering various constraints. Experimental results show our placer's superior routability and efficiency with complex constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 现有的印刷电路板 (PCB) 布局通常无法解决现代设计中异构组件产生的复杂约束（例如，不同的线宽和复杂的间距规则）。手动放置需要专业知识并且非常耗时。因此，考虑到不规则元件形状、间隙条件、布线面积、电源电路流程和可布线性，大规模、复杂的设计需要自动化 PCB 贴装。本文提出了一种有效的、以武力为导向的全球布局，然后通过合法化来处理这些限制。我们推导出电源电路锚点，以在考虑电源电路流程时指导全局布局，并提出一种基于模拟退火的焊盘对齐方法来处理复杂的间距约束。全局放置后，我们执行基于窗口的合法化，以考虑各种约束来消除组件重叠。实验结果表明，我们的布局器在复杂约束条件下具有卓越的可布线性和效率。

items.title: Advanced gate-level glitch modeling using ANNs.
items.abstract: Multiple Input Switching (MIS) effects commonly induce undesired glitch pulses at the output of CMOS gates, potentially leading to circuit malfunction and significant power consumption. Thus, accurate and efficient glitch modeling is crucial for the design of high-performance, low-power, and reliable ICs. In this work, we present a new gate-level approach for modeling glitch effects under MIS. Unlike previous studies, we leverage efficient Machine Learning (ML) techniques to accurately estimate the glitch shape characteristics, propagation delay, and power consumption. To this end, we evaluate various ML engines and explore different Artificial Neural Network (ANN) architectures. Moreover, we introduce a seamless workflow to integrate our ANNs into existing standard cell libraries, striking an optimal balance between model size and accuracy in gate-level glitch modeling. Experimental evaluation on gates implemented in 7 nm FinFET technology demonstrates that the proposed models achieve an average error of 2.19% against SPICE simulation while maintaining a minimal memory footprint.
items.abstract_zh: 多输入开关 (MIS) 效应通常会在 CMOS 门的输出端产生不需要的毛刺脉冲，从而可能导致电路故障和显着的功耗。因此，准确、高效的毛刺建模对于高性能、低功耗和可靠 IC 的设计至关重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的门级方法，用于在 MIS 下对毛刺效应进行建模。与之前的研究不同，我们利用高效的机器学习（ML）技术来准确估计毛刺形状特征、传播延迟和功耗。为此，我们评估了各种机器学习引擎并探索了不同的人工神经网络 (ANN) 架构。此外，我们引入了无缝工作流程，将我们的人工神经网络集成到现有的标准单元库中，从而在门级毛刺建模中的模型大小和准确性之间取得最佳平衡。对 7 nm FinFET 技术中实现的栅极进行的实验评估表明，所提出的模型相对于 SPICE 仿真的平均误差为 2.19%，同时保持最小的内存占用。

items.title: Synthesis of Resource-Efficient Superconducting Circuits with Clock-Free Alternating Logic.
items.abstract: Gate-level clocking, typical in traditional approaches to Single Flux Quantum (SFQ) technology, makes the effective synthesis of superconducting circuits a significant engineering hurdle. This paper addresses this challenge by employing the recently introduced alternating SFQ (xSFQ) logic family. xSFQ leverages dual-rail alternating encoding to eliminate the clock dependency from the superconducting gate semantics. This obviates the need for ad hoc modifications to existing synthesis tools and avoids unnecessary circuit resource overheads, marking a significant advancement in superconducting circuit design automation. Our implementation results demonstrate an average reduction of over 80% in the Josephson junction count for circuits from the ISCAS85, EPFL, and ISCAS89 benchmark suites.
items.abstract_zh: 门级时钟是单通量量子 (SFQ) 技术传统方法中的典型，它使超导电路的有效合成成为一个重大的工程障碍。本文通过采用最近推出的交替 SFQ (xSFQ) 逻辑系列来解决这一挑战。 xSFQ 利用双轨交替编码来消除超导门语义的时钟依赖性。这消除了对现有综合工具进行临时修改的需要，并避免了不必要的电路资源开销，标志着超导电路设计自动化的重大进步。我们的实施结果表明，ISCAS85、EPFL 和 ISCAS89 基准套件电路的约瑟夫森结数量平均减少了 80% 以上。

items.title: ZeroTetris: A Spacial Feature Similarity-based Sparse MLP Engine for Neural Volume Rendering.
items.abstract: Neural Volume Rendering (NVR), a novel paradigm for the longstanding problem of photo-realistic rendering of virtual worlds, has developed explosively in the past three years. The unique and substantial computational requirements of NVR pose challenge on deploying NVR to existing dedicated accelerator for neural networks. In this work, we propose ZeroTetris, a spacial feature similarity-based sparse multilayer perceptron (MLP) hardware accelerator for NVR. By leveraging the unique similarity-based sparsity between adjacent sampling points in NVR models, ZeroTetris efficiently bypass the computation of zero activations, thereby enhancing energy efficiency. Evaluation results affirm the effectiveness of the proposed design, showcasing ZeroTetris's superior performance in both area and power efficiency compared to other dedicated sparse matrix multiplication or MLP accelerator designs.
items.abstract_zh: 神经体积渲染 (NVR) 是解决虚拟世界真实感渲染这一长期存在问题的一种新颖范例，在过去三年中得到了爆炸性的发展。 NVR 独特且大量的计算要求对将 NVR 部署到现有的神经网络专用加速器提出了挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ZeroTetr​​is，一种用于 NVR 的基于空间特征相似性的稀疏多层感知器 (MLP) 硬件加速器。通过利用 NVR 模型中相邻采样点之间独特的基于相似性的稀疏性，ZeroTetr​​is 有效地绕过了零激活的计算，从而提高了能源效率。评估结果证实了所提出设计的有效性，展示了与其他专用稀疏矩阵乘法或 MLP 加速器设计相比，ZeroTetr​​is 在面积和功率效率方面的卓越性能。

items.title: High-Performance and Resource-Efficient Dynamic Memory Management in High-Level Synthesis.
items.abstract: With the merits of high productivity and ease of use, highlevel synthesis (HLS) tools bring hope to fast FPGA-based architecture development. However, their usability and popularity are still limited due to lack of support for dynamic memory management (DMM). Though HLS-compatible DMM solutions have been proposed recently, nevertheless, based on our investigation, none of them can hit high performance (i.e., minimal memory (de-)allocation latency) and resource efficiency (i.e., managing arbitrarily sized memory with minimal FPGA resource consumption) with one stone, seriously limiting their practicality. In response, we propose HeroDMM, a high-performance and resource-efficient dynamic memory manager for HLS. Specifically, HeroDMM organizes the managed memory area with a novel cartesian-like tree (CT) structure, a key to resolving the dilemma between (de-)allocation latency and resource efficiency standing in front of prior efforts. With the CT structure, HeroDMM further devises a delicate memory management algorithm and specializes the hardware implementation for achieving ever-higher performance while ensuring resource efficiency. Results show that HeroDMM outperforms state-of-the-art HLS-compatible DMM solutions by 61.69%~99.99% in performance improvement and 23.79%~97.22% in resource consumption savings.
items.abstract_zh: 凭借高生产率和易用性的优点，高级综合（HLS）工具为基于FPGA的架构的快速开发带来了希望。然而，由于缺乏对动态内存管理（DMM）的支持，它们的可用性和流行度仍然受到限制。尽管最近提出了兼容 HLS 的 DMM 解决方案，但根据我们的调查，它们都无法一举实现高性能（即最小的内存（解除）分配延迟）和资源效率（即以最小的 FPGA 资源消耗管理任意大小的内存），严重限制了它们的实用性。为此，我们提出了 HeroDMM，一种用于 HLS 的高性能且资源高效的动态内存管理器。具体来说，HeroDMM 使用新颖的类笛卡尔树 (CT) 结构来组织托管内存区域，这是解决先前努力中的（取消）分配延迟和资源效率之间困境的关键。 HeroDMM在CT结构的基础上，进一步设计了精细的内存管理算法，并专门进行硬件实现，在保证资源效率的同时实现更高的性能。结果表明，HeroDMM 比最先进的 HLS 兼容 DMM 解决方案的性能提升了 61.69%~99.99%，资源消耗节省了 23.79%~97.22%。

items.title: STAGGER: Enabling All-in-One Subarray Sensing for Efficient Module-level Processing in Open-Bitline ReRAM.
items.abstract: Emerging resistive RAM (ReRAM) devices can in-situ execute vector-matrix-multiplication (VMM) and is able to achieve energy-efficient in-memory scientific computing. However, the peripheral separated S&Hs and ADCs for row buffering and sensing in conventional designs are the system bottleneck. We propose an ADC-less all-in-one processing-in-ReRAM design that enables the precharge once, readout multiple-bits (PORM) functionality for overlapping the tRCD latencies of different-significance result bits sensed out on the same bitline. Specifically, to support PORM sensing, we propose a cascaded-feedback bitline sensing architecture for VMM and a buffering-and-sensing-collocated sense amplifier elemental design with the bitline and the storage node fully decoupled for enabling conflict-free column accesses. We further propose cross-level inter-leaving mechanism for successive column VMM accesses to reduce the overall latency through improving the hardware spatiotemporal utilization. Experimental results show that our proposed design achieves 297% overall performance improvement and 85.8% energy reduction, compared with an aggressive baseline.
items.abstract_zh: 新兴的电阻式 RAM (ReRAM) 器件可以原位执行矢量矩阵乘法 (VMM)，并能够实现节能的内存科学计算。然而，传统设计中用于行缓冲和感测的外设分离的 S&H 和 ADC 是系统瓶颈。我们提出了一种无 ADC 一体式 ReRAM 处理设计，可实现预充电一次、读出多位 (PORM) 功能，以重叠在同一位线上感测到的不同重要性结果位的 tRCD 延迟。具体来说，为了支持 PORM 感测，我们提出了一种用于 VMM 的级联反馈位线感测架构以及缓冲和感测并置的感测放大器元件设计，其中位线和存储节点完全解耦，以实现无冲突的列访问。我们进一步提出了连续列VMM访问的跨级交错机制，以通过提高硬件时空利用率来减少整体延迟。实验结果表明，与激进的基准相比，我们提出的设计实现了 297% 的整体性能提升和 85.8% 的能耗降低。

items.title: Top-Level Routing for Multiply-Instantiated Blocks with Topology Hashing.
items.abstract: Modern System-on-Chip (SoC) design is divided into hierarchical instances using the multiply-instantiated block (MIB) technique to simplify the design process. Top-level routing aims at providing routing prototyping between those instances. It requires consideration of replicated routing paths that can either be utilized for routing or remain as floating segments. Conventional path-searching based algorithm often fails to find a legal solution under such a scenario. To address this, we propose an effective and efficient top-level routing framework for MIBs by hashing the topology of each net and using a group maze routing scheme. Experimental results demonstrate promising performance compared to the winners of the MIB-aware top-level router contest 2022 organized by Synopsys.
items.abstract_zh: 现代片上系统 (SoC) 设计使用多重实例化块 (MIB) 技术划分为分层实例，以简化设计过程。顶级路由旨在提供这些实例之间的路由原型。它需要考虑复制的路由路径，这些路径可以用于路由或保留为浮动段。在这种情况下，传统的基于路径搜索的算法往往无法找到合法的解决方案。为了解决这个问题，我们通过散列每个网络的拓扑并使用组迷宫路由方案，提出了一种有效且高效的 MIB 顶级路由框架。与 Synopsys 组织的 2022 年 MIB 感知顶级路由器竞赛的获胜者相比，实验结果表明其性能表现出色。

items.title: EPIM: Efficient Processing-In-Memory Accelerators based on Epitome.
items.abstract: The utilization of large-scale neural networks on Processing-In-Memory (PIM) accelerators encounters challenges due to constrained on-chip memory capacity. To tackle this issue, current works explore model compression algorithms to reduce the size of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Most of these algorithms either aim to represent neural operators with reduced-size parameters (e.g., quantization) or search for the best combinations of neural operators (e.g., neural architecture search). Designing neural operators to align with PIM accelerators' specifications is an area that warrants further study. In this paper, we introduce the Epitome, a lightweight neural operator offering convolution-like functionality, to craft memory-efficient CNN operators for PIM accelerators (EPIM). On the software side, we evaluate epitomes' latency and energy on PIM accelerators and introduce a PIM-aware layer-wise design method to enhance their hardware efficiency. We apply epitome-aware quantization to further reduce the size of epitomes. On the hardware side, we modify the datapath of current PIM accelerators to accommodate epitomes and implement a feature map reuse technique to reduce computation cost. Experimental results reveal that our 3-bit quantized EPIM-ResNet50 attains 71.59% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, reducing crossbar areas by 30.65X. EPIM surpasses the state-of-the-art pruning methods on PIM.
items.abstract_zh: 由于片上内存容量有限，在内存处理 (PIM) 加速器上使用大规模神经网络遇到了挑战。为了解决这个问题，当前的工作探索模型压缩算法来减小卷积神经网络（CNN）的大小。这些算法中的大多数旨在表示具有减小尺寸的参数（例如量化）的神经算子，或者搜索神经算子的最佳组合（例如神经架构搜索）。设计神经算子以符合 PIM 加速器的规格是一个值得进一步研究的领域。在本文中，我们介绍了 Epitome，一种提供类似卷积功能的轻量级神经算子，为 PIM 加速器 (EPIM) 制作内存高效的 CNN 算子。在软件方面，我们评估了PIM加速器上缩影的延迟和能量，并引入了PIM感知的分层设计方法来提高其硬件效率。我们应用缩影感知量化来进一步减小缩影的大小。在硬件方面，我们修改了当前 PIM 加速器的数据路径以适应缩影，并实现特征图重用技术以降低计算成本。实验结果表明，我们的 3 位量化 EPIM-ResNet50 在 ImageNet 上达到了 71.59% 的 top-1 准确率，将交叉区域减少了 30.65 倍。 EPIM 超越了 PIM 上最先进的修剪方法。

items.title: MAUnet: Multiscale Attention U-Net for Effective IR Drop Prediction.
items.abstract: The efficient analysis of power grids is a crucial yet computationally challenging task in integrated circuit (IC) design, given the shrinking power supply voltage of ultra deep-submicron VLSI design. Different from the conventional modified nodal analysis technique, this paper introduces MAUnet, an innovative machine-learning model that redefines state-of-the-art full-chip static IR drop prediction. MAUnet ingeniously integrates multi-scale convolutional blocks, attention mechanisms, and U-Net architecture to optimize prediction accuracy. The multi-scale convolutional blocks significantly enhance feature extraction from image-based data, while the attention mechanism precisely identifies hotspot regions. The U-Net architecture, on the other hand, enables scalable image-to-image prediction applicable to circuits of any size. Uniquely, MAUnet also incorporates a pioneering fusion method that synergies both power grids and image-based data. Additionally, we introduce a low-rank approximation transfer learning technique to extend MAUnet's applicability to unseen test cases. Benchmark tests validate MAUnet's superior performance, achieving an average error of less than 6% relative to the average IR drop on three benchmarks. The performance enhancements offered by our proposed method are substantial, outperforming the current state-of-the-art method, IREDGe, by considerable margins of 29%, 65%, and 68% in three canonical benchmarks. Transfer learning is validated to enable model to achieve effective improvement on real circuit test cases. Compared to commercial tools, which often require hours to deliver results, the proposed method provides orders of magnitude speed-up with negligible error in practice.
items.abstract_zh: 考虑到超深亚微米 VLSI 设计不断缩小的电源电压，有效的电网分析是集成电路 (IC) 设计中一项至关重要但计算上具有挑战性的任务。与传统的改进节点分析技术不同，本文引入了 MAUnet，这是一种创新的机器学习模型，重新定义了最先进的全芯片静态 IR 压降预测。 MAUnet 巧妙地集成了多尺度卷积块、注意力机制和 U-Net 架构，以优化预测精度。多尺度卷积块显着增强了基于图像的数据的特征提取，而注意力机制则精确识别热点区域。另一方面，U-Net 架构支持可扩展的图像到图像预测，适用于任何规模的电路。独特的是，MAUnet 还采用了一种开创性的融合方法，可以协同电网和基于图像的数据。此外，我们引入了低秩近似迁移学习技术，以将 MAUnet 的适用性扩展到未见过的测试用例。基准测试验证了 MAUnet 的卓越性能，相对于三个基准的平均 IR 降，平均误差低于 6%。我们提出的方法提供的性能增强是显着的，在三个规范基准测试中，性能优于当前最先进的方法 IREDGe，显着提高了 29%、65% 和 68%。迁移学习经过验证，使模型能够对实际电路测试用例实现有效改进。与通常需要数小时才能提供结果的商业工具相比，所提出的方法提供了数量级的加速，并且在实践中误差可以忽略不计。

items.title: DL2Fence: Integrating Deep Learning and Frame Fusion for Enhanced Detection and Localization of Refined Denial-of-Service in Large-Scale NoCs.
items.abstract: This study introduces a refined Flooding Injection Rate-adjustable Denial-of-Service (DoS) model for Network-on-Chips (NoCs) and more importantly presents DL2Fence, a novel framework utilizing Deep Learning (DL) and Frame Fusion (2F) for DoS detection and localization. Two Convolutional Neural Networks models for classification and segmentation were developed to detect and localize DoS respectively. It achieves detection and localization accuracies of 95.8% and 91.7%, and precision rates of 98.5% and 99.3% in a 16x16 mesh NoC. The framework's hardware overhead notably decreases by 76.3% when scaling from 8x8 to 16x16 NoCs, and it requires 42.4% less hardware compared to state-of-the-arts. This advancement demonstrates DL2Fence's effectiveness in balancing outstanding detection performance in large-scale NoCs with extremely low hardware overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 本研究介绍了一种针对片上网络 (NoC) 的改进的泛洪注入速率可调拒绝服务 (DoS) 模型，更重要的是提出了 DL2Fence，这是一种利用深度学习 (DL) 和帧融合 (2F) 进行 DoS 检测和定位的新颖框架。开发了两种用于分类和分割的卷积神经网络模型来分别检测和定位 DoS。它在 16x16 网状片上网络中实现了 95.8% 和 91.7% 的检测和定位精度，以及 98.5% 和 99.3% 的精确率。当从 8x8 扩展到 16x16 NoC 时，该框架的硬件开销显着降低了 76.3%，并且与最先进的技术相比，它所需的硬件减少了 42.4%。这一进步证明了 DL2Fence 在平衡大规模 NoC 中出色的检测性能与极低的硬件开销方面的有效性。

items.title: Balloon-ZNS: Constructing High-Capacity and Low-Cost ZNS SSDs with Built-in Compression.
items.abstract: ZNS SSDs are emerging storage devices promising low cost, high performance, and software definability. This paper proposes Balloon-ZNS that enables transparent compression in ZNS SSDs to enhance cost efficiency. ZNS SSDs, unlike traditional SSDs, require data pages to be stored in logical zones and flash blocks with aligned offsets, conflicting with the management of compressed, variable-length pages. Motivated by a key observation that compressibility locality widely exists in data streams, Balloon-ZNS employs a compressibility-adaptive, slot-aligned storage management scheme to address the intractable conflict. Evaluation with RocksDB shows Balloon-ZNS can reap more than 80% of the compression gain while achieving 7.3% lower to 14.4% higher throughput than a vanilla ZNS SSD, on average, when data compressibility is not poor.
items.abstract_zh: ZNS SSD 是新兴的存储设备，有望实现低成本、高性能和软件可定义性。本文提出了 Balloon-ZNS，它可以在 ZNS SSD 中实现透明压缩，以提高成本效率。 ZNS SSD 与传统 SSD 不同，需要将数据页存储在偏移量对齐的逻辑区和闪存块中，这与压缩、可变长度页的管理相冲突。受数据流中广泛存在可压缩性局部性这一关键观察的启发，Balloon-ZNS 采用可压缩性自适应、槽对齐的存储管理方案来解决棘手的冲突。 RocksDB 的评估表明，当数据压缩率不差时，Balloon-ZNS 可以获得超过 80% 的压缩增益，同时吞吐量比普通 ZNS SSD 低 7.3% 到 14.4%。

items.title: InterArch: Video Transformer Acceleration via Inter-Feature Deduplication with Cube-based Dataflow.
items.abstract: In the realm of video-oriented tasks, Video Transformer models (VidT), an evolution from vision Transformers (ViT), have demonstrated considerable success. However, their widespread application is constrained by substantial computational demands and high energy consumption. Addressing these limitations and thus improving VidT efficiency has become a hot topic. Current methodologies solve this challenge by dividing a video into several features and applying intra-feature sparsity. However, they neglect the crucial point of inter-feature redundancy and often entail prolonged latency in fine-tuning phases. In response, this paper introduces InterArch, a tailored framework designed to significantly enhance VidT efficiency. We first design a novel inter-feature sparsity algorithm consisting of hierarchical deduplication and recovery. The deduplication phase capitalizes on temporal similarities at both block and element levels, enabling the elimination of redundant computations across features in both coarse-grained and fine-grained manners. To prevent long-latency fine-tuning, we employ a lightweight recovery mechanism that constructs approximate features for the sparsified data. Furthermore, InterArch incorporates a regular dataflow strategy, which consolidates sparse features and effectively translates sparse computations into dense ones. Complementing this, we develop a spatial array architecture equipped with augmented processing elements (PEs), specifically optimized for our proposed dataflow. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that InterArch can achieve satisfactory performance speedups and energy saving.
items.abstract_zh: 在面向视频的任务领域，从视觉 Transformer (ViT) 演变而来的视频 Transformer 模型 (VidT) 已经取得了相当大的成功。然而，它们的广泛应用受到大量计算需求和高能耗的限制。解决这些限制并从而提高 VidT 效率已成为一个热门话题。当前的方法通过将视频划分为多个特征并应用特征内稀疏性来解决这一挑战。然而，他们忽略了特征间冗余的关键点，并且常常需要在微调阶段延长延迟。为此，本文介绍了 InterArch，这是一个旨在显着提高 VidT 效率的定制框架。我们首先设计了一种新颖的特征间稀疏算法，包括分层重复数据删除和恢复。重复数据删除阶段利用块和元素级别的时间相似性，从而能够以粗粒度和细粒度的方式消除跨特征的冗余计算。为了防止长延迟微调，我们采用了一种轻量级恢复机制，为稀疏数据构造近似特征。此外，InterArch 还采用了常规的数据流策略，可以整合稀疏特征并有效地将稀疏计算转化为密集计算。作为补充，我们开发了一种配备增强处理元件（PE）的空间阵列架构，专门针对我们提出的数据流进行了优化。大量的实验结果表明InterArch可以实现令人满意的性能加速和节能。

items.title: Learn-by-Compare: Analog Performance Prediction using Contrastive Regression with Design Knowledge.
items.abstract: This paper introduces Learn-by-Compare (LbC), a novel approach for analog performance modeling by employing semi-supervised contrastive regression. LbC employs a deep neural network encoder to come up with latent representations of sizing solutions by comparing similarity/dissimilarity of the underlying performance. Leveraging two levels of transistor level sizing data augmentation (DA), namely LS-DA and GS-DA, LbC produces new data samples by employing design knowledge. Experimental results highlight LbC's superior predictive accuracy compared to traditional regression methods. Offering a streamlined semi-supervised learning methodology, LbC effectively incorporates simple design knowledge and representation learning for efficient analog performance modeling.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了比较学习 (LbC)，这是一种采用半监督对比回归进行模拟性能建模的新方法。 LbC 采用深度神经网络编码器，通过比较底层性能的相似性/不相似性，得出大小解决方案的潜在表示。 LbC 利用两个级别的晶体管级尺寸数据增强 (DA)，即 LS-DA 和 GS-DA，利用设计知识生成新的数据样本。实验结果凸显了 LbC 与传统回归方法相比具有卓越的预测准确性。 LbC 提供简化的半监督学习方法，有效地结合了简单的设计知识和表示学习，以实现高效的模拟性能建模。

items.title: ChatPattern: Layout Pattern Customization via Natural Language.
items.abstract: Existing works focus on fixed-size layout pattern generation, while the more practical free-size pattern generation receives limited attention. In this paper, we propose ChatPattern, a novel Large-Language-Model (LLM) powered framework for flexible pattern customization. ChatPattern utilizes a two-part system featuring an expert LLM agent and a highly controllable layout pattern generator. The LLM agent can interpret natural language requirements and operate design tools to meet specified needs, while the generator excels in conditional layout generation, pattern modification, and memory-friendly patterns extension. Experiments on challenging pattern generation setting shows the ability of ChatPattern to synthesize high-quality large-scale patterns.
items.abstract_zh: 现有的工作重点是固定尺寸的布局图案生成，而更实用的自由尺寸图案生成受到的关注有限。在本文中，我们提出了 ChatPattern，这是一种新颖的大语言模型 (LLM) 支持的框架，用于灵活的模式定制。 ChatPattern 采用由两部分组成的系统，其中包括专业的 LLM 代理和高度可控的布局模式生成器。 LLM 代理可以解释自然语言要求并操作设计工具来满足指定需求，而生成器则擅长条件布局生成、模式修改和内存友好型模式扩展。在具有挑战性的模式生成设置上的实验表明了 ChatPattern 合成高质量大规模模式的能力。

items.title: Garrison: A High-Performance GPU-Accelerated Inference System for Adversarial Ensemble Defense.
items.abstract: In the face of huge threats from adversarial attacks, developing an efficient defense mechanism is crucial for deep learning systems. Adversarial ensemble defense method is one of the most effective techniques for defending against adversarial attacks, which constructs ensembles of multiple DNNs to improve model's robustness. However, deploying ensemble defense methods on existing DNN inference systems is inefficient and impractical due to their dynamics and randomness. To this end, we propose an inference system for adversarial ensemble defense called Garrison, which can deliver robust and low-latency predictions using Multi-Instance GPUs. Garrison employs a multi-granularity GPU partitioning strategy, optimizing hardware utilization by capitalizing on the intrinsic heterogeneity of GPUs. It also integrates a reinforcement learning-based scheduling mechanism, enabling random ensemble of diverse defense models to enhance robustness while maintaining bounded latency. Our evaluations show that Garrison can improve adversarial robustness by up to 24.5%, while accelerating ensemble inference by up to 6.6X compared to the state-of-the-art inference framework.
items.abstract_zh: 面对对抗性攻击的巨大威胁，开发有效的防御机制对于深度学习系统至关重要。对抗性集成防御方法是防御对抗性攻击最有效的技术之一，它构建多个 DNN 的集成来提高模型的鲁棒性。然而，由于其动态性和随机性，在现有 DNN 推理系统上部署集成防御方法效率低下且不切实际。为此，我们提出了一种称为 Garrison 的对抗性集成防御推理系统，它可以使用多实例 GPU 提供稳健且低延迟的预测。 Garrison 采用多粒度 GPU 分区策略，通过利用 GPU 固有的异构性来优化硬件利用率。它还集成了基于强化学习的调度机制，使不同防御模型的随机集成能够增强鲁棒性，同时保持有限的延迟。我们的评估表明，与最先进的推理框架相比，Garrison 可以将对抗鲁棒性提高高达 24.5%，同时将集成推理速度提高高达 6.6 倍。

items.title: SC-GNN: A Communication-Efficient Semantic Compression for Distributed Training of GNNs.
items.abstract: Training big graph neural networks (GNNs) in distributed systems is quite time-consuming mainly because of the ubiquitous aggregate operations that involve a large amount of cross-partition communication for collecting embeddings/gradients during the forward and backward propagation. To reduce the volume of the communication, some recent approaches focused on decaying each of connections via sampling, quantifying, or delaying until satisfactory trade-off are obtained between volume and accuracy. However, when applied to popular GNNs, those approaches are found to be bounded by a common volume/accuracy Pareto frontier which shows that the decaying for individual connection cannot further accelerate the aggregate of training. In this work, SC-GNN, a semantic compression of the cross-partition communication, is proposed to concentrate a group of connections as a high-level semantics and transmit to a target partition. Since carrying the overall intent of a group, the semantics can keep transferring the interactions, i.e., embeddings/gradients, between a pair of remote partitions until GNN models converge. In addition, a connection-pattern based differential optimization is proposed to further prune those weak connections, while guaranteeing the training accuracy. The results show that, for multi-field datasets, the compression rate of SC-GNN is 40.8 × higher than SOTA methods and the epoch time is reduced to 31.8% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 在分布式系统中训练大图神经网络（GNN）非常耗时，主要是因为普遍存在的聚合操作涉及大量跨分区通信，以在前向和反向传播期间收集嵌入/梯度。为了减少通信量，最近的一些方法侧重于通过采样、量化或延迟来衰减每个连接，直到在通信量和准确性之间获得令人满意的权衡。然而，当应用于流行的 GNN 时，这些方法被发现受到共同的体积/精度帕累托前沿的限制，这表明个体连接的衰减不能进一步加速训练的聚合。在这项工作中，提出了跨分区通信的语义压缩 SC-GNN，将一组连接集中为高级语义并传输到目标分区。由于承载了一个群体的整体意图，语义可以在一对远程分区之间不断传输交互，即嵌入/梯度，直到 GNN 模型收敛。此外，提出了一种基于连接模式的差分优化，以进一步修剪那些弱连接，同时保证训练精度。结果表明，对于多字段数据集，SC-GNN 的压缩率比 SOTA 方法高 40.8 倍，epoch 时间平均减少至 31.8%。

items.title: FRM-CIM: Full-Digital Recursive MAC Computing in Memory System Based on MRAM for Neural Network Applications.
items.abstract: Computing in memory (CIM) realizes energy-efficient neural network algorithms by implementing highly parallel multiply-and-accumulate (MAC) operation. However, the MAC delay of CIM will sharply increase with the improvement of computing precision, which restricts its development. In this work, we propose a full-digital recursive MAC (FRM) operation based on spin-transfer-torque magnetic random access memory (STT-MRAM) CIM system to enable fast and energy-efficient image recognition application. First, the fast FRM scheme is proposed by utilizing the recursive operations of read and addition in segmented bit-line array, which effectively reduces the delay of MAC operations to 3.5ns and 4ns for 8-bit and 16-bit input and weight precision, respectively. Second, we design an image recognition system using FRM-CIM architecture as the processing element (PE), where the adaptive pruning method for layers is proposed to improve the compatibility of it with the neural network. By performing image recognition for the MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets, results show that the throughput and energy efficiency of the FRM-CIM system are 58.51TOPS/mm2 and 11.3--56.72 TOPS/W under 8--16-bit precision, which are improved by 4.3 times and 2.6 times compared with the state-of-the-art works. Finally, the recognition accuracy can reach 96.65% and 82.7% on MNIST and CIFAR-10, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 内存计算（CIM）通过实现高度并行的乘法累加（MAC）运算来实现节能的神经网络算法。然而，CIM的MAC延迟会随着计算精度的提高而急剧增加，制约了其发展。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于自旋转移矩磁性随机存取存储器（STT-MRAM）CIM系统的全数字递归MAC（FRM）操作，以实现快速且节能的图像识别应用。首先，利用分段位线阵列中的读取和加法递归操作，提出了快速FRM方案，对于8位和16位输入和权重精度，该方案有效地将MAC操作的延迟分别降低到3.5ns和4ns。其次，我们设计了一个使用FRM-CIM架构作为处理元件（PE）的图像识别系统，其中提出了层的自适应剪枝方法以提高其与神经网络的兼容性。通过对MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集进行图像识别，结果表明，FRM-CIM系统在8--16位精度下的吞吐量和能效分别为58.51TOPS/mm2和11.3--56.72 TOPS/W，与现有技术相比分别提高了4.3倍和2.6倍。最终，在 MNIST 和 CIFAR-10 上识别准确率分别达到 96.65% 和 82.7%。

items.title: DySpMM: From Fix to Dynamic for Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication Accelerators.
items.abstract: Sparse Matrix-Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) is one of the key operators in many fields, showing dynamic features in terms of sparsity, element distribution, and data dependency. Previous studies have proposed FPGA-based SpMM accelerators with fixed configurations of on-chip dataflow, leaving three major challenges unsolved: 1) Partitioning matrices with the fixed sub-matrix size to fit limited on-chip buffer on FPGA leads to performance loss because the optimal sub-matrix size to minimize memory access varies with dynamic sparsity. 2) The fixed row-wise allocation scheme of sparse elements in streaming architecture leads to unbalanced workloads because of dynamic element distribution across sparse matrix rows. 3) Read-after-write (RAW) hazard caused by floating-point adder makes the elements in one row cannot be processed consecutively. Architectures with fixed execution order rely on time-consuming pre-processing to deal with dynamic data dependency. Motivated by the observation that fixed configurations lead to performance loss, we propose DySpMM by introducing the dynamic design methodology to SpMM architectures. The configurable data distributor is introduced to enable dynamic sub-matrix size, achieving up to 3.79× less memory access amount. The element-wise allocator is designed for dynamic workload balance, improving utilization up to 3.74×. The interleaved reorder unit is proposed to reorder the elements and dynamically avoid RAW hazards at runtime, avoiding time-consuming pre-processing. We implement DySpMM on U280 FPGA, and the evaluation shows that it achieves 1.42× geomean throughput compared with the state-of-the-art accelerator Sextans and 1.78× energy efficiency compared with V100S GPU.
items.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法（SpMM）是许多领域的关键算子之一，在稀疏性、元素分布和数据依赖性方面表现出动态特征。先前的研究提出了基于 FPGA 的 SpMM 加速器，具有固定的片上数据流配置，但仍存在三个未解决的主要挑战：1）使用固定子矩阵大小的分区矩阵以适应 FPGA 上有限的片上缓冲区会导致性能损失，因为最小化内存访问的最佳子矩阵大小随动态稀疏性而变化。 2）流式架构中稀疏元素的固定行分配方案会由于稀疏矩阵行之间的动态元素分布而导致工作负载不平衡。 3) 浮点加法器引起的读后写(RAW)危险使得一行中的元素无法连续处理。具有固定执行顺序的架构依赖于耗时的预处理来处理动态数据依赖性。由于观察到固定配置会导致性能损失，我们通过将动态设计方法引入 SpMM 架构来提出 DySpMM。引入可配置数据分配器以实现动态子矩阵大小，最多可减少 3.79 倍的内存访问量。逐元素分配器专为动态工作负载平衡而设计，可将利用率提高高达 3.74 倍。提出了交错重新排序单元来重新排序元素并在运行时动态避免 RAW 危险，从而避免耗时的预处理。我们在 U280 FPGA 上实现了 DySpMM，评估表明，与最先进的加速器 Sextans 相比，它实现了 1.42 倍的几何平均吞吐量，与 V100S GPU 相比，它实现了 1.78 倍的能效。

items.title: PPGNN: Fast and Accurate Privacy-Preserving Graph Neural Network Inference via Parallel and Pipelined Arithmetic-and-Logic FHE Accelerator.
items.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are increasingly used in fields like social media and bioinformatics, promoting the prosperity of cloud-based GNN inference services. Nevertheless, data privacy becomes a critical issue when handling sensitive information. Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE) enables computations on encrypted data, while privacy-preserving GNN inference generally necessitates ensuring graph structure data confidentiality and maintaining computation precision, both of which are computationally expensive in FHE. Existing schemes of GNNs inference with FHE are deterred by either computational overhead, accuracy degradation, or incomplete data protection. This paper presents PPGNN to address these challenges all at once. We first propose a novel privacy-preserving GNN inference algorithm utilizing a high-accuracy arithmetic-and-logic FHE approach, meanwhile only need much smaller parameters, substantially reducing computational complexity and facilitating parallel processing. Correspondingly, a dedicated hardware architecture has been designed to implement these innovations, with featured specialized units for arithmetic and logic FHE operations in a pipelined manner. Collectively, PPGNN achieves 2.7× and 1.5× speedup over state-of-the-art Arithmetic FHE and Logic FHE accelerators while ensuring high accuracy, simultaneously with about 18× energy reduction on average.
items.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）越来越多地应用于社交媒体、生物信息学等领域，促进了基于云的 GNN 推理服务的繁荣。然而，在处理敏感信息时，数据隐私成为一个关键问题。完全同态加密（FHE）可以对加密数据进行计算，而保护隐私的 GNN 推理通常需要确保图结构数据的机密性和保持计算精度，这两者在 FHE 中的计算成本都很高。现有的 GNN 与 FHE 推理方案因计算开销、准确性下降或不完整的数据保护而受到阻碍。本文提出 PPGNN 来同时解决这些挑战。我们首先提出了一种新颖的隐私保护 GNN 推理算法，利用高精度算术逻辑 FHE 方法，同时只需要更小的参数，大大降低了计算复杂度并促进并行处理。相应地，我们设计了专用硬件架构来实现这些创新，并具有以流水线方式进行算术和逻辑 FHE 运算的专用单元。总的来说，PPGNN 比最先进的算术 FHE 和逻辑 FHE 加速器实现了 2.7 倍和 1.5 倍的加速，同时确保高精度，同时平均能耗降低约 18 倍。

items.title: How to Steal CPU Idle Time When Synchronous I/O Mode Becomes Promising.
items.abstract: The advent of Ultra-Low-Latency storage devices has narrowed the performance gap between storage and CPU in computing platforms, facilitating synchronous I/O adoption. Yet, this approach introduces substantial busy waiting time and underutilizes computing units. To address this, we propose a light-weighted Idle-Time-Stealing (ITS) design. This involves a self-improving thread conducting prefetching for high-priority processes during synchronous I/O, and an I/O-waiting process continuing subsequent instruction executions when justifiable. Another thread, the self-sacrificing thread, proactively switches low-priority process I/O requests from synchronous to asynchronous mode, prioritizing high-priority executions. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our ITS design in reducing CPU idle time.
items.abstract_zh: 超低延迟存储设备的出现缩小了计算平台中存储和CPU之间的性能差距，促进了同步I/O的采用。然而，这种方法引入了大量的繁忙等待时间并且未充分利用计算单元。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种轻量级的空闲时间窃取（ITS）设计。这涉及到一个自我改进的线程在同步 I/O 期间对高优先级进程进行预取，以及一个 I/O 等待进程在合理时继续后续指令执行。另一个线程，即自我牺牲线程，主动将低优先级进程 I/O 请求从同步模式切换到异步模式，优先执行高优先级的执行。实验结果证明了我们的 ITS 设计在减少 CPU 空闲时间方面的有效性。

items.title: TATOO: A Flexible Hardware Platform for Binary-Only Fuzzing.
items.abstract: Hardware-based tracing, being efficient, can be a good alternative to the computationally-expensive software-based instrumentation in binary-only greybox fuzzing. However, it only records all branches within a specified address range, lacking the flexibility to re-filter them. To overcome these limitations, this paper introduces Tatoo, a hardware platform that employs tagged architectures and hardware tracing to enable users to perform instruction-level tagging, which can significantly reduce the volume of traced data and improve fuzzing efficiency. Tatoo also supports recording the dataflow information for smart mutations. Implemented on a real hardware FPGA platform, Tatoo demonstrates a mere 8.7% performance overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 基于硬件的跟踪非常高效，可以成为纯二进制灰盒模糊测试中计算成本高昂的基于软件的仪器的良好替代方案。然而，它只记录指定地址范围内的所有分支，缺乏重新过滤它们的灵活性。为了克服这些限制，本文引入了Tatoo，这是一个采用标记架构和硬件跟踪的硬件平台，使用户能够执行指令级标记，这可以显着减少跟踪数据量并提高模糊测试效率。 Tatoo还支持记录智能突变的数据流信息。 Tatoo 在真实的硬件 FPGA 平台上实现时，性能开销仅为 8.7%。

items.title: LEAF: An Adaptation Framework against Noisy Data on Edge through Ultra Low-Cost Training.
items.abstract: The deployment of machine learning in real-life computer vision applications is often subject to the degraded input data by various noise sources and time-varying conditions. Continual re-training is one potential solution to adapt to the real-time noise sources and achieve the target performance. However, this approach requires massive computing complexity for the training, particularly demanding on resource-constrained edge devices. To address this challenge, for the first time, we present a hardware-efficient framework named LEAF, tailored for the adaptation to degraded images (ADI) scenario. Leveraging both qualitative and quantitative profiling of CNN dynamics when operating on degraded images, we propose two techniques: 1) selective experience replay (SER)-based unimportant image skipping to reduce both the forward pass (FwP) and backward pass (BwP) costs, and 2) pseudo noise dithering (PND)-assisted extremely low precision quantization (3/4-bit) for error gradients to enable nearly full integer computing. Extensive experiments on CIFAR10 and Tiny ImageNet datasets employing VGGNet and ResNet, along with five different types of image degradations with varying strengths demonstrate virtually no accuracy degradation (< 0.5%) at 3/4-bits with 3.64 ~ 8.40× reduced forward and backward processing.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习在现实生活中的计算机视觉应用中的部署通常会受到各种噪声源和时变条件造成的输入数据降级的影响。持续重新训练是适应实时噪声源并实现目标性能的一种潜在解决方案。然而，这种方法需要大量的计算复杂性来进行训练，特别是对资源受限的边缘设备的要求更高。为了应对这一挑战，我们首次提出了一个名为 LEAF 的硬件高效框架，专为适应降级图像（ADI）场景而定制。在处理退化图像时，利用 CNN 动态的定性和定量分析，我们提出了两种技术：1）基于选择性经验重放（SER）的不重要图像跳过，以减少前向传递（FwP）和后向传递（BwP）成本，2）伪噪声抖动（PND）辅助误差梯度的极低精度量化（3/4 位），以实现几乎完整的整数计算。使用 VGGNet 和 ResNet 在 CIFAR10 和 Tiny ImageNet 数据集上进行的大量实验，以及五种不同类型的具有不同强度的图像退化，表明在 3/4 位上几乎没有精度退化（< 0.5%），并且前向和后向处理减少了 3.64 ~ 8.40 倍。

items.title: Dyn-Bitpool: A Two-sided Sparse CIM Accelerator Featuring a Balanced Workload Scheme and High CIM Macro Utilization.
items.abstract: Computing-in-memory (CIM), a promising computing paradigm, has demonstrated great energy-efficiency by integrating computing units into memory. However, previous research on CIM has rarely utilized sparsity in activation and weight concurrently. Moreover, new challenges arise when harnessing sparsity in both activation and weight (two-sided sparsity), such as unbalanced workload and low hardware substrate utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 内存计算 (CIM) 是一种很有前景的计算范式，通过将计算单元集成到内存中，展示了巨大的能源效率。然而，之前关于 CIM 的研究很少同时利用激活和权重的稀疏性。此外，利用激活和权重的稀疏性（两侧稀疏性）时会出现新的挑战，例如工作负载不平衡和硬件基板利用率低。

items.title: Fake Node-Based Perception Poisoning Attacks against Federated Object Detection Learning in Mobile Computing Networks.
items.abstract: Federated learning (FL) supports massive edge devices to collaboratively train object detection models in mobile computing scenarios. However, the distributed nature of FL exposes significant security vulnerabilities. Existing attack methods either require considerable costs to compromise the majority of participants, or suffer from poor attack success rates. Inspired by this, we devise an efficient fake node-based perception poisoning attacks strategy (FNPPA) to target such weaknesses. In particular, FNPPA poisons local data and injects multiple fake nodes to participate in aggregation, aiming to make the local poisoning model more likely to overwrite clean updates. Moreover, it can achieve greater malicious influence on target objects at a lower cost without affecting the normal detection of other objects. We demonstrate through exhaustive experiments that FNPPA exhibits superior attack impact than the state-of-the-art in terms of average precision and aggregation effect.
items.abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）支持海量边缘设备在移动计算场景中协作训练对象检测模型。然而，FL 的分布式特性暴露了重大的安全漏洞。现有的攻击方法要么需要相当大的成本才能危害大多数参与者，要么攻击成功率很低。受此启发，我们设计了一种高效的基于假节点的感知中毒攻击策略（FNPPA）来针对此类弱点。特别是，FNPPA对本地数据进行投毒，并注入多个假节点参与聚合，旨在使本地投毒模型更有可能覆盖干净的更新。而且，可以在不影响其他对象正常检测的情况下，以较低的成本实现对目标对象更大的恶意影响。我们通过详尽的实验证明，FNPPA 在平均精度和聚合效果方面表现出优于最先进技术的攻击影响。

items.title: Efficient Approximate Decomposition Solver using Ising Model.
items.abstract: Computing with memory is an energy-efficient computing approach. It pre-computes a function and stores its values in a lookup table (LUT), which can be retrieved at runtime. Approximate Boolean decomposition reduces the LUT size for implementing complex functions, but it takes a long time to find a decomposition with a minimal error. In this work, to address this issue, we propose an efficient Ising model-based approximate Boolean decomposition solver. First, a new column-based approximate disjoint decomposition method is proposed to fit the Ising model. Then, it is adapted to the Ising model-based optimization solver. Moreover, two improvement techniques are developed for an efficient search of the approximate disjoint decomposition when using simulated bifurcation to solve the Ising model. Experimental results show that compared to the state-of-the-art work, our approach achieves a 11% smaller mean error distance with an average 1.16× speedup when approximately decomposing 16-input Boolean functions.
items.abstract_zh: 使用内存计算是一种节能的计算方法。它预先计算一个函数并将其值存储在查找表 (LUT) 中，可以在运行时检索该表。近似布尔分解减少了实现复杂功能的 LUT 大小，但需要很长时间才能找到误差最小的分解。在这项工作中，为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种高效的基于 Ising 模型的近似布尔分解求解器。首先，提出了一种新的基于列的近似不相交分解方法来拟合Ising模型。然后，将其适应基于Ising模型的优化求解器。此外，还开发了两种改进技术，用于在使用模拟分岔求解伊辛模型时有效搜索近似不相交分解。实验结果表明，与最先进的工作相比，我们的方法在近似分解 16 输入布尔函数时，平均误差距离减小了 11%，平均加速提高了 1.16 倍。

items.title: A High Level Approach to Co-Designing 3D ICs.
items.abstract: 3D ICs promise increased logic density and reduced routing congestion over conventional monolithic 2D ICs. High level synthesis (HLS) tools promise reduced design complexity by approaching the design from a higher abstraction level and allow for more optimization flexibility. We propose improving timing closure of 3D ICs by co-designing the architecture and physical design by integrating HLS and 3D IC macro placement into the same holistic loop. On average our method is able to reduce estimated total negative slack (TNS) by 62% and 92% when compared to a traditional binding and placement technique for 2D and 3D ICs respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 与传统单片 2D IC 相比，3D IC 有望提高逻辑密度并减少布线拥塞。高级综合 (HLS) 工具有望通过从更高的抽象级别进行设计来降低设计复杂性，并提供更大的优化灵活性。我们建议通过将 HLS 和 3D IC 宏布局集成到同一个整体环路中，共同设计架构和物理设计，从而改进 3D IC 的时序收敛。平均而言，与 2D 和 3D IC 的传统绑定和放置技术相比，我们的方法能够将估计的总负裕度 (TNS) 分别减少 62% 和 92%。

items.title: KATO: Knowledge Alignment And Transfer for Transistor Sizing Of Different Design and Technology.
items.abstract: Automatic transistor sizing in circuit design continues to be a formidable challenge. Despite that Bayesian optimization (BO) has achieved significant success, it is circuit-specific, limiting the accumulation and transfer of design knowledge for broader applications. This paper proposes (1) efficient automatic kernel construction, (2) the first transfer learning across different circuits and technology nodes for BO, and (3) a selective transfer learning scheme to ensure only useful knowledge is utilized. These three novel components are integrated into BO with Multi-objective Acquisition Ensemble (MACE) to form Knowledge Alignment and Transfer Optimization (KATO) to deliver state-of-the-art performance: up to 2x simulation reduction and 1.2x design improvement over the baselines.
items.abstract_zh: 电路设计中的自动晶体管尺寸调整仍然是一项艰巨的挑战。尽管贝叶斯优化（BO）取得了巨大的成功，但它是特定于电路的，限制了设计知识的积累和转移以实现更广泛的应用。本文提出了（1）高效的自动内核构建，（2）首次跨不同电路和技术节点的 BO 迁移学习，以及（3）选择性迁移学习方案以确保只利用有用的知识。这三个新颖的组件通过多目标采集集成 (MACE) 集成到 BO 中，形成知识对齐和传输优化 (KATO)，从而提供最先进的性能：与基线相比，模拟减少高达 2 倍，设计改进高达 1.2 倍。

items.title: Every Failure Is A Lesson: Utilizing All Failure Samples To Deliver Tuning-Free Efficient Yield Evaluation.
items.abstract: Yield estimation and optimization have become increasingly important for circuit design as technology nodes scale down. Simple yet well-established minimal norm importance sampling (MNIS) still serves as an industrial standard due to its robustness and reliability. In this study, we generalize the classic MNIS and propose Every Failure Is A Lesson (EFIAL) to utilize every failure sample (instead of one in MNIS) to construct the proposal distribution. EFIAL is completely tuning-free and the update computation complexity is only O(M) (M is the number of failure samples) by utilizing the blessing of dimensionality. The idea of EFIAL is then extended to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) pre-sampling method, onion sampling, to significantly boost efficiency, by up to 9.08x (4.68x on average). Extensive evaluations against SOTA yield estimation methods reveal that EFIAL achieves a speedup of up to 13.54x (5.16x on average) and an accuracy improvement of up to 24.91%.
items.abstract_zh: 随着技术节点规模的缩小，良率估算和优化对于电路设计变得越来越重要。简单但完善的最小范数重要性抽样 (MNIS) 由于其稳健性和可靠性，仍然作为行业标准。在本研究中，我们概括了经典的 MNIS 并提出“每个失败都是一次教训”（EFIAL），以利用每个失败样本（而不是 MNIS 中的一个）来构建提案分布。 EFIAL 完全免调优，利用维数的优势，更新计算复杂度仅为 O(M)（M 为失败样本数）。然后，EFIAL 的理念被扩展到最先进的 (SOTA) 预采样方法（洋葱采样），以显着提高效率高达 9.08 倍（平均 4.68 倍）。针对 SOTA 良率估算方法的广泛评估表明，EFIAL 的加速比高达 13.54 倍（平均 5.16 倍），准确率提高高达 24.91%。

items.title: Performance-driven Analog Routing via Heterogeneous 3DGNN and Potential Relaxation.
items.abstract: Analog routing is crucial for performance optimization in analog circuit design, but conventionally takes significant development time and requires design expertise. Recent research has attempted to use machine learning (ML) to generate guidance to preserve circuit performance after analog routing. These methods face challenges such as expensive data acquisition and biased guidance. This paper presents AnalogFold, a new paradigm of analog routing that leverages ML to provide performance-oriented routing guidance. Our approach learns performance-driven routing guidance and uses it to help automatic routers for performance-driven routing optimization. We propose to use a 3DGNN that incorporates cost-aware distance to make accurate predictions on post-layout performance. A pool-assisted potential relaxation process derives the effective routing guidance. The experimental results on multiple benchmarks under the TSMC 40nm technology node demonstrate the superiority of the proposed framework compared to the cutting-edge works.
items.abstract_zh: 模拟布线对于模拟电路设计中的性能优化至关重要，但通常需要大量的开发时间并且需要设计专业知识。最近的研究尝试使用机器学习 (ML) 来生成指导，以在模拟布线后保持电路性能。这些方法面临着昂贵的数据采集和有偏见的指导等挑战。本文提出了 AnalogFold，这是一种新的模拟路由范例，它利用 ML 提供面向性能的路由指导。我们的方法学习性能驱动的路由指导，并使用它来帮助自动路由器进行性能驱动的路由优化。我们建议使用包含成本感知距离的 3DGNN 来对布局后性能做出准确预测。池辅助的潜在松弛过程得出有效的路由指导。台积电40nm技术节点下多个基准测试的实验结果证明了所提出的框架与前沿作品相比的优越性。

items.title: GSPO: A Graph Substitution and Parallelization Joint Optimization Framework for DNN Inference.
items.abstract: This work proposes GSPO, an automatic unified framework that jointly applies graph substitution and parallelization for DNN inference. GSPO uses a joint optimization computation graph (JOCG) to represent graph substitution and parallelization at the operator level. Then, a novel cost model customized for joint optimization is used to evaluate the computation graph execution time quickly. With the graph partition and backtracking search algorithm, GSPO can find the optimal joint optimization solution within an acceptable search time. Compared to existing frameworks applying graph substitution or parallelization, GSPO can achieve up to 27.1% end-to-end performance improvement and reduce search time by up to 94.3%.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了 GSPO，一种自动统一框架，联合应用图替换和并行化进行 DNN 推理。 GSPO 使用联合优化计算图（JOCG）来表示算子级别的图替换和并行化。然后，使用为联合优化定制的新颖成本模型来快速评估计算图的执行时间。通过图划分和回溯搜索算法，GSPO可以在可接受的搜索时间内找到最优的联合优化解。与现有的应用图替换或并行化的框架相比，GSPO 可以实现高达 27.1% 的端到端性能提升，并减少高达 94.3% 的搜索时间。

items.title: Compact and Efficient CAM Architecture through Combinatorial Encoding and Self-Terminating Searching for In-Memory-Searching Accelerator.
items.abstract: Content addressable memory (CAM) has triggered a lot of attention for data-intensive applications due to highly parallel pattern searching capability. Most state-of-the-art works focus on reducing hardware cost of CAM by exploiting various emerging non-volatile memory (NVM) technologies. However, the existing CAM designs still mainly follow the conventional encoding scheme which requires two complementary storage nodes and search signals for each bit of entry and query respectively, along with separate precharging and evaluation phases for bit-vector searching, limiting the further improvement of area- and energy-efficiency. In this work, a compact and efficient CAM architecture is proposed through two techniques: (1) a combinatorial encoding scheme for CAM by encoding entry/query states with permutations and combinations of multiple storage nodes as a group, which can significantly improve the encoding efficiency and thus greatly reduce the hardware implementation cost of CAM compared with conventional encoding scheme; (2) an one-step self-terminating searching scheme for CAM by detecting matching condition during precharging phase and terminating precharging once a match is detected, which can further reduce the search delay and energy. The experiments and evaluations of the proposed CAM architecture with co-optimization of combinatorial encoding and self-terminating searching are carried out based on ferroelectric FET (FeFET), which can reduce the area-energy-delay product (AEDP) by 1182X over the conventional CMOS-based CAM in data searching tasks, showing its great potential for area- and energy-efficient in-memory-searching accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: 由于高度并行的模式搜索能力，内容可寻址存储器（CAM）引起了数据密集型应用的广泛关注。大多数最先进的工作都集中在通过利用各种新兴的非易失性存储器 (NVM) 技术来降低 CAM 的硬件成本。然而，现有的CAM设计仍然主要遵循传统的编码方案，需要两个互补的存储节点，分别为条目和查询的每一位提供搜索信号，以及用于位向量搜索的单独的预充电和评估阶段，限制了面积效率和能量效率的进一步提高。在这项工作中，通过两种技术提出了一种紧凑高效的CAM架构：（1）一种CAM组合编码方案，通过将多个存储节点作为一组进行排列组合来编码条目/查询状态，与传统编码方案相比，可以显着提高编码效率，从而大大降低CAM的硬件实现成本； (2)一种CAM的一步自终止搜索方案，在预充电阶段检测匹配条件，一旦检测到匹配就终止预充电，这可以进一步减少搜索延迟和能量。所提出的具有组合编码和自终止搜索联合优化的 CAM 架构的实验和评估是基于铁电 FET (FeFET) 进行的，与传统基于 CMOS 的 CAM 相比，在数据搜索任务中，该架构可以将面积能量延迟积 (AEDP) 减少 1182 倍，显示出其作为面积和能源高效内存搜索加速器的巨大潜力。

items.title: DEFA: Efficient Deformable Attention Acceleration via Pruning-Assisted Grid-Sampling and Multi-Scale Parallel Processing.
items.abstract: Multi-scale deformable attention (MSDeformAttn) has emerged as a key mechanism in various vision tasks, demonstrating explicit superiority attributed to multi-scale grid-sampling. However, this newly introduced operator incurs irregular data access and enormous memory requirement, leading to severe PE under-utilization. Meanwhile, existing approaches for attention acceleration cannot be directly applied to MSDeformAttn due to lack of support for this distinct procedure. Therefore, we propose a dedicated algorithm-architecture co-design dubbed DEFA, the first-of-its-kind method for MSDeformAttn acceleration. At the algorithm level, DEFA adopts frequency-weighted pruning and probability-aware pruning for feature maps and sampling points respectively, alleviating the memory footprint by over 80%. At the architecture level, it explores the multi-scale parallelism to boost the throughput significantly and further reduces the memory access via fine-grained layer fusion and feature map reusing. Extensively evaluated on representative benchmarks, DEFA achieves 10.1-31.9X speedup and 20.3-37.7X energy efficiency boost compared to powerful GPU platforms. It also rivals the related accelerators by 2.2-3.7X energy efficiency improvement while providing pioneering support of MSDeformAttn.
items.abstract_zh: 多尺度可变形注意力（MSDeformAttn）已成为各种视觉任务中的关键机制，证明了多尺度网格采样的明显优越性。然而，这个新引入的算子会带来不规则的数据访问和巨大的内存需求，导致严重的PE利用率不足。同时，由于缺乏对这种独特过程的支持，现有的注意力加速方法不能直接应用于 MSDeformAttn。因此，我们提出了一种名为 DEFA 的专用算法架构协同设计，这是第一种 MSDeformAttn 加速方法。在算法层面，DEFA对特征图和采样点分别采用频率加权剪枝和概率感知剪枝，内存占用减少80%以上。在架构层面，它探索了多尺度并行性，以显着提高吞吐量，并通过细粒度层融合和特征图重用进一步减少内存访问。经过对代表性基准的广泛评估，与强大的 GPU 平台相比，DEFA 实现了 10.1-31.9 倍的加速和 20.3-37.7 倍的能效提升。它还可与相关加速器相媲美，能效提高 2.2-3.7 倍，同时提供 MSDeformAttn 的开创性支持。

items.title: Enabling Multiple Tensor-wise Operator Fusion for Transformer Models on Spatial Accelerators.
items.abstract: In transformer models, data reuse within an operator is insufficient, which prompts more aggressive multiple tensor-wise operator fusion (multi-tensor fusion). Due to the complexity in tensor-wise operator dataflow, conventional fusion techniques often fall short by limited dataflow options and short fusion length. In this study, we first identify three challenges on multi-tensor fusion that result in inferior fusions. Then we propose dataflow adaptive tiling (DAT), a novel inter-operator dataflow to enable an efficient fusion of multiple operators connected in any form and chained in any length. Then, we broaden the dataflow exploration from intraoperator to inter-operator and develop an exploration framework to quickly find the best dataflow on spatial accelerators with given on-chip buffer size. Experiment results show that DAT delivers 2.24× and 1.74× speedup and 35.5% and 15.5% energy savings on average for edge and cloud accelerators, respectively, comparing to the state-of-the-art dataflow explorer FLAT. DAT is open-sourced at https://github.com/lxu28973/DAT.git.
items.abstract_zh: 在 Transformer 模型中，算子内的数据重用是不够的，这促使更积极的多张量算子融合（多张量融合）。由于张量算子数据流的复杂性，传统的融合技术常常因数据流选项有限和融合长度短而不足。在这项研究中，我们首先确定了多张量融合的三个挑战，这些挑战导致融合效果较差。然后，我们提出了数据流自适应切片（DAT），这是一种新颖的运营商间数据流，可以实现以任何形式连接并以任何长度链接的多个运营商的有效融合。然后，我们将数据流探索从操作员内扩展到操作员间，并开发了一个探索框架，以在给定片上缓冲区大小的空间加速器上快速找到最佳数据流。实验结果表明，与最先进的数据流浏览器 FLAT 相比，DAT 为边缘加速器和云加速器平均分别提供 2.24 倍和 1.74 倍的加速以及 35.5% 和 15.5% 的节能。 DAT 在 https://github.com/lxu28973/DAT.git 上开源。

items.title: HEIRS: Hybrid Three-Dimension RRAM- and SRAM-CIM Architecture for Multi-task Transformer Acceleration.
items.abstract: Large-scale transformer with millions of weights achieves great success in multiple natural language processing (NLP) tasks. To release the memory bottleneck of multi-task model deployment, transfer learning tunes part of weights with shared parameters among tasks. Moreover, computing-in-memory (CIM) emerges as an efficient solution for neural network acceleration. With higher storage density, RRAM-CIM can store the large-scale model without costly weight loading, compared with another mainstream SRAM-CIM. However, the RRAM rewrite for tuned and dynamic weight matrix-vector-multiplication (MVM) in transformers requires high-cost RRAM writing in RRAM-CIM. Current hybrid CIM can compensate for the weakness of RRAM-CIM by adding SRAM-CIM with independent MVM. However, the tuned weights in transfer learning cannot be implemented due to the demand for the cooperative addition of MVM results from both shared and tuned weights. In this paper, a hybrid three-dimension RRAM-CIM and SRAM-CIM architecture (HEIRS) is proposed for multi-task transformer acceleration, with monolithically 3D integration of high-density RRAM-CIM and high-performance SRAM-CIM. The 3D RRAM-CIM with ultra-high density stores the whole model with mitigated off-chip weight loading. The SRAM-CIM is employed for efficiently performing dynamic weight MVM without RRAM rewrite. Moreover, a novel hybrid-CIM paradigm is proposed with an input selective adder tree, to support cooperative addition in transfer learning. Experiments show that, compared with RRAM-CIM and SRAM-CIM, the proposed HEIRS improves the energy efficiency by up to 7.83x and 2.29x on BERT, respectively. Meanwhile, the latency is also reduced by up to 85.5% and the storage density is enhanced by 7.2x, compared to RRAM-CIM.
items.abstract_zh: 具有数百万权值的大规模 Transformer 在多个自然语言处理（NLP）任务中取得了巨大成功。为了释放多任务模型部署的内存瓶颈，迁移学习通过任务之间共享的参数来调整部分权重。此外，内存计算（CIM）成为神经网络加速的有效解决方案。与另一种主流SRAM-CIM相比，RRAM-CIM具有更高的存储密度，可以存储大型模型，而无需昂贵的重量加载。然而，变压器中调谐和动态权重矩阵向量乘法 (MVM) 的 RRAM 重写需要在 RRAM-CIM 中进行高成本的 RRAM 写入。目前的混合CIM可以通过添加具有独立MVM的SRAM-CIM来弥补RRAM-CIM的弱点。然而，由于共享权重和调整权重需要协同添加 MVM 结果，因此迁移学习中的调整权重无法实现。本文提出了一种用于多任务变压器加速的混合三维 RRAM-CIM 和 SRAM-CIM 架构（HEIRS），其中单片 3D 集成了高密度 RRAM-CIM 和高性能 SRAM-CIM。超高密度的 3D RRAM-CIM 可存储整个模型，并减轻片外重量负载。 SRAM-CIM 用于高效执行动态权重 MVM，无需重写 RRAM。此外，提出了一种带有输入选择性加法器树的新型混合 CIM 范式，以支持迁移学习中的协作加法。实验表明，与 RRAM-CIM 和 SRAM-CIM 相比，所提出的 HEIRS 在 BERT 上的能效分别提高了 7.83 倍和 2.29 倍。同时，与 RRAM-CIM 相比，延迟也降低了高达 85.5%，存储密度提高了 7.2 倍。

items.title: Invited: Automatic Hardware/Software Design for High-Speed Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles Guided by a Flight Model.
items.abstract: Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) are on the rise in the industrial and academic communities. Since most UAVs are severely size, weight, and power (SWaP) constrained, building computing system for high-speed UAVs is challenging. Current domain-specific hardware-software (HW-SW) designs for UAVs are mainly bottom-up, focusing on optimizing a single module in the whole system, such as visual-inertial odometry (VIO), depth estimation, or planning. But this leads to underdesign for flight speed as agile navigation depends on a tight combination of multiple modules. To find the optimal HW-SW design for systematic flight performance, we propose a top-down automatic design framework. A flight model is introduced to guide the inter-module and the intra-module HW-SW optimization towards the system-level goal. For the perception algorithms, we define the representative design space. And some critical non-AI operators are accelerated and profiled on embedded GPU to achieve better hardware performance. The design framework is evaluated on a micro UAV equipped with a Nvidia Jetson Orin NX. In a specific navigation scenario, the design found by our framework achieve 40% and 65% increase on flight speed than two manual design methods respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 自主无人机（UAV）在工业界和学术界正在兴起。由于大多数无人机的尺寸、重量和功率 (SWaP) 受到严重限制，因此为高速无人机构建计算系统具有挑战性。目前无人机的特定领域硬件软件（HW-SW）设计主要是自下而上的，重点是优化整个系统中的单个模块，例如视觉惯性里程计（VIO）、深度估计或规划。但这会导致飞行速度设计不足，因为敏捷导航依赖于多个模块的紧密组合。为了找到系统飞行性能的最佳硬件-软件设计，我们提出了一个自上而下的自动设计框架。引入飞行模型来指导模块间和模块内硬件-软件优化以实现系统级目标。对于感知算法，我们定义了代表性设计空间。一些关键的非人工智能算子在嵌入式 GPU 上进行加速和分析，以实现更好的硬件性能。该设计框架在配备 Nvidia Jetson Orin NX 的微型无人机上进行了评估。在特定的导航场景中，我们的框架发现的设计比两种手动设计方法分别实现了 40% 和 65% 的飞行速度提高。

items.title: Cache-aware Task Decomposition for Efficient Intermittent Computing Systems.
items.abstract: Energy harvesting offers a scalable and cost-effective power solution for IoT devices, but it introduces the challenge of frequent and unpredictable power failures due to the unstable environment. To address this, intermittent computing has been proposed, which periodically backs up the system state to non-volatile memory (NVM), enabling robust and sustainable computing even in the face of unreliable power supplies. In modern processors, write back cache is extensively utilized to enhance system performance. However, it poses a challenge during backup operations as it buffers updates to memory, potentially leading to inconsistent system states. One solution is to adopt a write-through cache, which avoids the inconsistency issue but incurs increased memory access latency for each write reference. Some existing work enforces a cache flushing before backups to maintain a consistent system state, resulting in significant backup overhead. In this paper, we point out that although cache delays updates to the main memory, it may preserve a recoverable system state in the main memory. Leveraging this characteristic, we propose a cache-aware task decomposition method that divides an application into multiple tasks, ensuring that no dirty cache lines are evicted during their execution. Furthermore, the cache-aware task decomposition maintains an unchanged memory state during the execution of each task, enabling us to parallelize the backup process with task execution and effectively hide the backup latency. Experimental results with different power traces demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed system.
items.abstract_zh: 能量收集为物联网设备提供了可扩展且经济高效的电源解决方案，但它带来了由于环境不稳定而导致频繁且不可预测的电源故障的挑战。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了间歇计算，它定期将系统状态备份到非易失性存储器（NVM），即使在电源不可靠的情况下也能实现稳健且可持续的计算。在现代处理器中，广泛利用回写式缓存来增强系统性能。然而，它在备份操作期间带来了挑战，因为它缓冲内存更新，可能导致系统状态不一致。一种解决方案是采用直写式缓存，这可以避免不一致问题，但会增加每次写入引用的内存访问延迟。一些现有的工作在备份之前强制刷新缓存以保持一致的系统状态，从而导致大量的备份开销。在本文中，我们指出，虽然缓存延迟了对主存的更新，但它可以在主存中保留可恢复的系统状态。利用这一特性，我们提出了一种缓存感知任务分解方法，将应用程序划分为多个任务，确保在执行过程中不会驱逐脏缓存行。此外，缓存感知任务分解在每个任务执行期间保持内存状态不变，使我们能够将备份过程与任务执行并行化，并有效隐藏备份延迟。不同功率轨迹的实验结果证明了所提出系统的有效性。

items.title: Towards Cost-Effective Real-Time High-Throughput End Station Design for Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN).
items.abstract: Time-Sensitive Networking (TSN) technology has been increasingly deployed in mission- and safety-critical industrial applications to achieve high throughput and deterministic communications. To provide stringent timing guarantee, TSN requires that network devices follow a predefined communication schedule for real-time end-to-end packet processing, involving both TSN bridges and end stations. Extensive efforts have been devoted on the TSN bridge design in the literature. Achieving TSN compatibility on the end stations (especially on COTS hardware), however is challenging due to their constrained resources. To fill this gap, this work presents a software-based open-source TSN end station design that i) enables ultra-low latency and nanosecond-level transmission accuracy based on DPDK, and ii) employs a novel multi-core scheduling framework to boost the throughput of real-time TSN traffic. Our proposed solution leverages existing COTS hardware and thus is more generic and cost-effective compared to existing hardware-centric solutions. We validate our design by developing a prototype end station and incorporating it in a real-world TSN testbed. Our extensive experiments demonstrate the efficiency and effectiveness of our design compared with other state-of-the-art solutions.
items.abstract_zh: 时间敏感网络 (TSN) 技术已越来越多地部署在任务关键型和安全关键型工业应用中，以实现高吞吐量和确定性通信。为了提供严格的时序保证，TSN 要求网络设备遵循预定义的通信时间表来进行实时端到端数据包处理，涉及 TSN 网桥和终端站。文献中对 TSN 桥设计进行了大量的工作。然而，由于资源有限，在终端站（尤其是 COTS 硬件）上实现 TSN 兼容性具有挑战性。为了填补这一空白，这项工作提出了一种基于软件的开源 TSN 终端站设计，i）基于 DPDK 实现超低延迟和纳秒级传输精度，ii）采用新颖的多核调度框架来提高实时 TSN 流量的吞吐量。我们提出的解决方案利用现有的 COTS 硬件，因此与现有的以硬件为中心的解决方案相比更通用且更具成本效益。我们通过开发原型终端站并将其合并到现实世界的 TSN 测试台中来验证我们的设计。我们广泛的实验证明了我们的设计与其他最先进的解决方案相比的效率和有效性。

items.title: Oltron: Algorithm-Hardware Co-design for Outlier-Aware Quantization of LLMs with Inter-/Intra-Layer Adaptation.
items.abstract: In Large Language Models (LLMs), outliers are identified by a small number of values with exceptionally high magnitudes, critically affecting model accuracy. Researchers have proposed several mixed-precision quantization techniques to manage these activation outliers. These approaches, employing value-wise outlier granularity, face challenges in balancing model accuracy with hardware efficiency. To address this issue, we capitalize on the observation that activation outliers of LLMs typically cluster within specific channels. Consequently, we introduce Oltron, a comprehensive software/hardware co-design strategy for outlier-aware quantization of LLMs with inter-/intra-layer adaptation. Our method includes three key innovations: firstly, a novel quantization algorithm that identifies the optimal ratio of outliers across different layers and channel groups within a layer; secondly, a reconfigurable architecture that adapts to inter- and intra-layer distributions; and thirdly, a tile-based dataflow optimizer that intricately arranges complex computations and memory access for mixed-precision tensors. Oltron outperforms the state-of-the-art outlier-aware accelerator, OliVe, achieving a 1.9x performance boost and 1.6x greater energy efficiency, while also enhancing model accuracy.
